name: DNC HQ
subject: This email is only 60 words
body:

Hi Derek, We know your time is valuable, so this email is only 60 words. Critical elections are approaching in states like Virginia, New Jersey, and California. But we’re running out of time to reach voters who are undecided. name: Roy Cooper HQ
subject: A dark money group just started airing ads in our race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
They’re trying to buy this race.
#
_Head’s up, Peter:_ A dark money organization that pours _millions_ into right-wing causes just launched a TV ad for our opponent.
**[DON’T WAIT: Split a donation NOW between Roy and State Democrats Committee to show your support >>>](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96568?refcode=em20251010-9558&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9558%2E614464%2Enczx5Z)**
The group (which doesn’t report its donors) has a track record of spending money on top-tier U.S. Senate races. With this early investment, they’re making it clear that North Carolina is in their sights now.
Peter, we knew that our race would attract national attention. It’s the most competitive Senate race on the map — and it’s the linchpin to taking back the Senate majority. This ad buy is just the start of what’s to come.
Pundits have predicted our race here in NC could be _the most expensive Senate race in history._
**[Dark money groups and far-right billionaire donors can try to buy this seat, but we are ready to take them on with YOUR grassroots support. Pitch in ASAP to help Roy and State Democrats Committee >>>](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96568?refcode=em20251010-9558&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9558%2E614464%2Enczx5Z)**

body:
We're in the home stretch, Peter.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117058289/575228400/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-10_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTFkOGVmNjUtM2FhNi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Bi70Bg-ETAB4yy1dxaYcGv8-3wR9yeFXulHfQtnalr4=)
Peter, you are one of Abigail Spanberger's top supporters, so you deserve an explanation for why we're asking for your $25 donation again today.
_The fact is, we have less than one month to turn out voters in the biggest election of 2025._
Our race is the only chance Democrats have to flip a Governor's office this year. It's considered a bellwether — a crucial test of Trump's power — just one year out from his reelection. For voters fed up with MAGA extremists wreaking havoc in Washington, Abigail's campaign is a beacon of hope. She's someone we can trust to put Virginia first, to put what's best for our communities ahead of her own self-interest.
_That's rarer and rarer in these hyper-partisan times._
But we have a major budget gap to fill in order to continue funding the investments that we need to win this November — and that's where you come in.
[_**Please, before midnight, will you make your first contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger as Governor of Virginia? clean_body: We're in the home stretch, Peter. = Peter, you are one of Abigail Spanberger's top supporters, so you deserve an explanation for why we're asking for your $25 donation again today. The fact is, we have less than one month to turn out voters in the biggest election of 2025. Our race is the only chance Democrats have to flip a Governor's office this year. It's considered a bellwether — a crucial test of Trump's power — just one year out from his reelection. For voters fed up with MAGA extremists wreaking havoc in Washington, Abigail's campaign is a beacon of hope. She's someone we can trust to put Virginia first, to put what's best for our communities ahead of her own self-interest. That's rarer and rarer in these hyper-partisan times. But we have a major budget gap to fill in order to continue funding the investments that we need to win this November — and that's where you come in. = = = = = = = We're in the home stretch, Peter. Let's keep up the momentum and set an example for the nation that will resonate for years to come. name: Ron Wyden
subject: What they say vs. the truth we know
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
The Trump administration is full of it and desperately lying to justify a military crackdown no one wants and no one needs
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117058310/575232072/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDA5MGM4NS0zYmE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ypWoy3T3tdT1HusLLhrWxqxS4JTAdhn_L9zepXfZ7o4=&emci=9d39c962-39a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=cd090c85-3ba6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Donald Trump, Kristi Noem, Pam Bondi, Stephen Miller, and the whole cabal have had quite a lot to say in recent days about my hometown of Portland. **They say we are violent insurrectionists who pose a clear and present danger to the republic – and that the**** _only_****way to control the situation is an influx of heavily-armed troops into our city.** Who has them so scared? Let me present some of the "insurrectionists" protesting ICE and various Trump administration policies: Every single one of these photos was taken over the last week outside Portland's ICE facility. You've got to hand it to the Trump administration for taking law and order seriously – it pardoned the thousands who attacked the Capitol on January 6, but it's sending the National Guard to deal with a few people dressed in frog, chicken, and capybara costumes. Joke aside, let's be very clear: **The Trump administration is doing everything in its power to spew dangerous propaganda about my hometown and to paint Portland as an out-of-control, "war-ravaged" city.** In reality, Portland is vibrant, peaceful, and resilient. We don't need federal troops patrolling our streets, and those troops deserve better than a delusional commander in chief who sees them as props in a PR mission. **Trump is hoping to provoke a violent confrontation in order to justify expanding his power, and we are not going to give him that.** When those in charge get desperate, there's often a vast gap between what they _say_ and the truth _we all know._ This is one of those times. We cannot let Trump-fueled propaganda become the image most Americans associate with our city. I'll keep amplifying the _true_ images and stories I see from our streets – and I'll hope you'll join me in those efforts. More soon, _Ron_ P.S. Please **share the images of any peaceful Portland protests you see on social media**! Every little bit can help correct misinformation and ensure that false narratives don't become ingrained in people's minds. |
---|---|---

| | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate.
---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Please have faith in me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I can guarantee you’ll want to hear this.
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
Friend,
I don’t want to beat a dead horse, so I’ll keep this short & to the point. But it’s very important you take ten seconds to read this in full. **PLEASE HAVE FAITH IN ME!**
We have officially closed the books on the third quarter of the year, and we’re so close to 2026.
We’ve accomplished a lot of great things - many historic things too!
**But despite all of our victories, the Democrats are angrier and nastier than perhaps ever before in the history of our country. They even shut down the government.**
Never before have they worked so hard to railroad us at every turn. It's almost impressive how much they keep shooting themselves in the foot.
**But one thing is for sure - the more we win... the more ruthless they grow!**
As much as I’d love to take my foot off the gas and enjoy our historic victories, we simply don’t have the time. MAGA is happening right now!

[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
As we accelerate into the midterms, the Democrats have made one thing clear: **they’re organizing earlier and spending a lot of money to do it.**
As the leader of our party and the great MAGA movement, I know we are capable of doing even more and better!
Not only will we have to fight back against the Democrats this cycle, we will also have to battle their strongest allies, judges, puppet masters, and the liberal fake news media.
**[With your help today, I know we will win this battle with ease.>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
Look at any great American accomplishment in the history of the world, and you will find all credit and success is owed to a number of incredible people just like YOU!
**[You are the REAL MAGA Movement, and I’m asking you to sacrifice $15 today for a better MAGA TOMORROW!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
The Presidential Fundraising Blitz I just announced ends tonight, so please hurry, so we can meet our goal and crush the Democrats.
Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN, and we will KEEP AMERICA GREAT.
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
THANK YOU.
\- President Donald J. Trump
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

name: Brianna For Colorado
subject: October Optimism 🍂
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f2bd36777c3c/october-optimism?e=8249791cac)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=380a95e0c9&e=8249791cac)
| | | | | | | | | | | | Happy fall everyone! This month’s edition will discuss the November Election Day, upcoming constituent and [community](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=1f6a341d68&e=8249791cac) events, and in case you missed it headlines. But first, let’s talk about some stuff I have been up to!
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | At the end of September, I attended Creek Week Clean-Up at the Pikeview Reservoir. Through the community’s efforts, we were able to clean up 34 bags of trash, from and around the river.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
Earlier this month, I was invited to a legislators hike with Mountain Mamas! Their members were able to share their concerns regarding climate change and its’ impact on their children with me. I had a wonderful time and thank you so much for Mountain Mamas for inviting me!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
I also was invited to tour the historic Climax Mine near Leadville. I got to learn all about how Climax is one of the world’s leading sources for [molybdenum](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=fbf306ddfd&e=8249791cac). It was an incredible tour and it made my geologist heart very happy.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| |
## [NOVEMBER ELECTION GUIDE]()
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
Election day is Tuesday, November 4th! Although it is not for a presidential election, it is still incredibly important to get out and vote. Mail-in ballots began to be mailed out to [Coloradans today](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=c5f23ebb10&e=8249791cac).
---
| |
One big thing on the **November 2026** ballot is electing the next Colorado State Treasurer. If you have been following along with my office, you will know that I am running. I have spent months traveling around the state and meeting with people about my run for State Treasurer. These travels have been met with great enthusiasm by Coloradans. People have shared with me that they are excited to see a public servant with a proven track record stepping up to run in such an important race. It would mean a lot to me if you elected me Colorado’s next State Treasurer.
If you would like to learn more about my campaign, you can [check out my website](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=eafdf5e525&e=8249791cac).
---
|
---
| | Two other big things on the Colorado ballot this election are Proposition LL and Proposition MM. Both these propositions help keep Colorado children fed, so remember to vote YES on them! My office created these graphics so they’re easy to remember.
---
|
---
|
---
| | If you would like more information on the upcoming election, the League of Women Voters of Colorado and the Bell Policy Center are both hosting virtual, free presentations:
* **LWV 2025 Election: Ballot Issue Information + Materials Presentation**
* Wednesday, October 15th, 2025 5:30 - 6:30 pm
* [Register here!](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=536899e2dc&e=8249791cac)
* **Bell Policy Center Ballot Guide Webinar**
* Wednesday, October 22nd, 12pm
* [Register here!](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=d2db748e0c&e=8249791cac)

Finally, if you are not yet registered to vote, here are two options:
* Register online now at [GoVoteColorado.gov](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=7c284673ce&e=8249791cac)
* Register in-person at polling facilities through election day.

---
|
---
|
---
| |
# [UPCOMING CONSTITUENT EVENTS]()
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | |
## Capitol Coffee Talk ☕️
**October 23rd @ 8:00 am** Let’s discuss your policy ideas while enjoying some of the best coffee in town!
📍**VELLICHOR COFFEE ROASTERS** 720 Golden Ridge Rd Ste D, Golden, CO 80401

---
| [ADD TO MY CALENDAR](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=6cda1ae9ad&e=8249791cac)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | |
## Beers with Brianna 🍺
**October 28th @ 7:00 pm** Join me to share your views and chat about the upcoming legislative session, all while enjoying a local craft brew!
📍**CODA Brewing Co** 15965 S Golden Road c2, CO 80401

---
| [ADD TO MY CALENDAR](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=6dea2ba5e3&e=8249791cac)
---
|
---
|
---
| | [**Virtual Office Hours**]()**** 💻
---
| | We have a simple sign-up process to schedule some one-on-one time with Rep. Titone at YOUR convenience, either via Zoom or phone.
[**Sign up here**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=9309d0fd94&e=8249791cac)**on Calendly!**
---
|
---
| | _Can't make it to any of my scheduled events? Don't hesitate to reach out if you have something on your mind or need help finding local resources. I'm just an email or phone call away!_
[_brianna.titone.house@coleg.gov_](mailto:brianna.titone.house@coleg.gov?subject=&body=) _| cell: 720.213.6660 | office: 303.866.2962_
---
| |
# [ IN THE DISTRICT]()
---
| |
## ARVADA
---
| | **EMERGENCY NOTIFICATIONS**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | Did you know only **13% of Arvada residents** are signed up for emergency notifications? Don’t miss critical alerts that could keep you and your family safe. Lookout Alert is the official notification system for Jefferson County—but you won’t receive alerts unless you sign up! Sign up today in one of three easy ways:
* Visit [lookoutalert.co](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=6da4965491&e=8249791cac)
* Text LookoutAlert to **67283**
* Download the Smart911 app from the App Store or Google Play.

---
|
---
| | **SNOWBUDDIES VOLUNTEERS**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | |
Believe it or not, winter is just around the corner, and that means we need snowbuddies volunteers! The City's Snow Buddies program matches qualified older residents and those with disabilities with a dedicated volunteer to remove snow from their sidewalks and half of their driveway.
[Learn more](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=d0ba5099f8&e=8249791cac)
---
|
---
|
---
| | To find events coming up in Arvada, check out [**Visit Arvada**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=c3e6ee05a0&e=8249791cac)!
---
|
---
| |
## GOLDEN
---
| | **HOMELESSNESS COMMUNITY FORUM**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | **Wednesday, October 15, 5:00 p.m. - 6:30 p.m.**
Golden is a community that cares for all who live here and increasing questions about homelessness reflect that spirit. Like many Front Range cities, the City is facing a regional shortage of shelter and affordable housing, especially as more people experience eviction or housing instability. In response, the City has built a coordinated team focused on outreach, mental health support, and pathways to stable housing—helping dozens of neighbors move off the streets in 2024—while keeping public safety and a sense of safety at the forefront.
Please join us for a business and community forum to learn more about the City’s approach on October 15, from 5:00 p.m. - 6:30 p.m. at the Community Room in the Golden Community Center.

---
| | **HOLIDAY “SCHOOL’S OUT” CAMPS**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | The holiday season is just around the corner—make sure your family is ready! Golden’s School’s Out Camps give kids ages 5–12 a safe, active, and fun place to spend their school breaks while you manage holiday plans.
**Thanksgiving Break Camp:** November 24, 25, and half day November 26**Winter Break Camp:** December 22, 23, 29, 30, January 5, and 6
Camp days are filled with swimming, arts and crafts, gym time, outdoor play, movie day, and plenty of opportunities to make new friends—all with the guidance of our caring counselors.
For details or to register, contact Sophie Ryan, Camps & Youth Enrichment Coordinator at sryan@cityofgolden.net or 303-384-8196.
---
|
---
|
---
| | For a list of upcoming Golden events, check out the [**Visit Golden website**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=6945658659&e=8249791cac)**or the City’s**[**Community Calendar**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=58e074caa5&e=8249791cac)**.**
---
|
---
| |
## EXTRA COMMUNITY NEWS
---
| | **JEFFERSON COUNTY CANDIDATE FORUM**
---
| | **October 15th, 6:30pm - 8pm****Jeffco Public Schools Education Center, 1829 Denver West Drive, Golden, CO 80401, Building 27, Fifth Floor**
Join us for a chance to hear directly from the people running to shape our local schools! You'll get to meet the candidates, learn where they stand on important issues like student mental health, bullying prevention, inclusion, accessibility, the politicization of classrooms, and safety in schools.
A respected community leader will moderate the conversation with questions, helping highlight each candidate’s priorities and approach. This is a nonpartisan, free and open event to help our community vote with confidence. Your voice matters. The doors to this event open at 6pm.
[Learn more and register here!](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=e864bb2f83&e=8249791cac)
---
| |

My office created these graphics so they’re easy to remember. | | | | If you would like more information on the upcoming election, the League of Women Voters of Colorado and the Bell Policy Center are both hosting virtual, free presentations: LWV 2025 Election: Ballot Issue Information + Materials Presentation Wednesday, October 15th, 2025 5:30 - 6:30 pm Bell Policy Center Ballot Guide Webinar Wednesday, October 22nd, 12pm Finally, if you are not yet registered to vote, here are two options: Register online now at Register in-person at polling facilities through election day. | | | | [UPCOMING CONSTITUENT EVENTS]() | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Capitol Coffee Talk ☕️ October 23rd @ 8:00 am Let’s discuss your policy ideas while enjoying some of the best coffee in town! 📍VELLICHOR COFFEE ROASTERS 720 Golden Ridge Rd Ste D, Golden, CO 80401 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Beers with Brianna 🍺 October 28th @ 7:00 pm Join me to share your views and chat about the upcoming legislative session, all while enjoying a local craft brew! 📍CODA Brewing Co 15965 S Golden Road c2, CO 80401 | | | | | [Virtual Office Hours]()** 💻 | | We have a simple sign-up process to schedule some one-on-one time with Rep. Titone at YOUR convenience, either via Zoom or phone. Calendly! | | | Can't make it to any of my scheduled events? Don't hesitate to reach out if you have something on your mind or need help finding local resources. I'm just an email or phone call away! mailto:brianna.titone.house@coleg.gov?subject=&body= | cell: 720.213.6660 | office: 303.866.2962 | | [ IN THE DISTRICT]() | | ARVADA | | EMERGENCY NOTIFICATIONS | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Did you know only 13% of Arvada residents are signed up for emergency notifications? Don’t miss critical alerts that could keep you and your family safe. Lookout Alert is the official notification system for Jefferson County—but you won’t receive alerts unless you sign up! Sign up today in one of three easy ways: Visit Text LookoutAlert to 67283 Download the Smart911 app from the App Store or Google Play. | | | SNOWBUDDIES VOLUNTEERS | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Believe it or not, winter is just around the corner, and that means we need snowbuddies volunteers! The City's Snow Buddies program matches qualified older residents and those with disabilities with a dedicated volunteer to remove snow from their sidewalks and half of their driveway. | | | | To find events coming up in Arvada, check out ! | | | GOLDEN | | HOMELESSNESS COMMUNITY FORUM | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Wednesday, October 15, 5:00 p.m. - 6:30 p.m. Golden is a community that cares for all who live here and increasing questions about homelessness reflect that spirit. Like many Front Range cities, the City is facing a regional shortage of shelter and affordable housing, especially as more people experience eviction or housing instability. In response, the City has built a coordinated team focused on outreach, mental health support, and pathways to stable housing—helping dozens of neighbors move off the streets in 2024—while keeping public safety and a sense of safety at the forefront. Please join us for a business and community forum to learn more about the City’s approach on October 15, from 5:00 p.m. - 6:30 p.m. at the Community Room in the Golden Community Center. | | HOLIDAY “SCHOOL’S OUT” CAMPS | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The holiday season is just around the corner—make sure your family is ready! Golden’s School’s Out Camps give kids ages 5–12 a safe, active, and fun place to spend their school breaks while you manage holiday plans. Thanksgiving Break Camp: November 24, 25, and half day November 26Winter Break Camp: December 22, 23, 29, 30, January 5, and 6 Camp days are filled with swimming, arts and crafts, gym time, outdoor play, movie day, and plenty of opportunities to make new friends—all with the guidance of our caring counselors. For details or to register, contact Sophie Ryan, Camps & Youth Enrichment Coordinator at sryan@cityofgolden.net or 303-384-8196. | | | | For a list of upcoming Golden events, check out the the City’s. | | | EXTRA COMMUNITY NEWS | | JEFFERSON COUNTY CANDIDATE FORUM | | October 15th, 6:30pm - 8pmJeffco Public Schools Education Center, 1829 Denver West Drive, Golden, CO 80401, Building 27, Fifth Floor Join us for a chance to hear directly from the people running to shape our local schools! You'll get to meet the candidates, learn where they stand on important issues like student mental health, bullying prevention, inclusion, accessibility, the politicization of classrooms, and safety in schools. A respected community leader will moderate the conversation with questions, helping highlight each candidate’s priorities and approach. This is a nonpartisan, free and open event to help our community vote with confidence. Your voice matters. The doors to this event open at 6pm. | | [ICYMI!]() | | | BRIANNA IN THE NEWS Governing: Colorado House Democrats: Colorado Pols: LA Times: State Scoop: | | STATE & LOCAL NEWS Bucket List: Denver Post: Denver Post: Denver Post: Denver Post: | | NATIONAL STORIES StateLine: AP News: NPR: | | GOOD NEWS 🎉 | | | | FIND ME ON SOCIAL MEDIA! Follow me to stay up to date with news, photos, bill details, events, community resources, and much more! 📲 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | The legislative session is over, but my work for you doesn’t stop. This summer, in addition to researching my next round of bills, I’ll be starting my campaign forstate treasurer! If you like the work I do, please consider a donation to my campaign or host a fundraiser in your community. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Representative Brianna Titone (she/her/hers) Chair, Joint Technology CommitteeVice Chair, Finance CommitteeAppropriations CommitteePension Review CommissionChair, LGBTQ Caucus mailto:brianna.titone.house@coleg.gov?subject=&body=303.866.2962 office | | | | | | | | | | A Message From Representative Brianna Titone, 2025 Want to change how you receive these emails? Friends,

One month ago, our nation and faith communities were shaken by the senseless killing of Charlie Kirk, a man whose passion for
truth, courage, and conviction inspired millions to stand boldly for faith and freedom. His absence has left a deep mark, not just
in the public square, but in the hearts of those who shared his vision: that believers should bring light into every corner of
culture - including government.

We chose, in those first days, inward reflection and prayer for the Kirk family, instead of adding to the noise. But now, as the
weeks have passed, a question weighs heavy on our hearts:

Have we already moved on?

The fire that was sparked in the days following Charlie Kirk's murder - the resolve, the unity, the call to action - it must not
fade! Revival doesn’t end when the headlines do. It begins within our hearts and stays ablaze long after the moment has passed.

If we truly want to see change in our churches, our communities, and our nation, it begins with us. It begins with renewed prayer,
bold faith, and unwavering action. God often uses seasons of loss to awaken His people, to remind us that we are called for more
than comfort...we are called for impact!

Let’s honor Charlie’s legacy not with words, but with movement. Let’s keep the fire burning. Let’s stay focused. Let’s see revival
spark a great awakening in our nation. Project 29:2 is committed.

Are you?

Help us Give Voters the Tools to Decide for Themselves

In a time when confusion and misinformation can drown out the truth, people of faith need trusted resources to make informed
decisions at the ballot box. That’s why we’ve created a comprehensive Voter Guide—to clearly lay out where candidates stand on the
issues that matter most to our communities and our values.

But getting this guide into the hands of voters across New Jersey takes resources. With your support, we can produce, mail, and
share these guides far and wide, ensuring that every voice has the information needed to vote with confidence and conviction.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: This is the inflection point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final stand. My freedom is on the line. The cavalry is here – YOU.

My final stand. My freedom is on the line. The cavalry is here – YOU.
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcasj8dg6loblf128vakgk9m892mg8ui1a79ipng_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chjm6o71c9h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
My final trial is closing in.
---
**An Obama-aligned Attorney General is forcing me into a rigged _state_ trial where President Trump legally can’t save me with a _federal_ pardon.**
---
In an earlier letter to you, I said that I’ve been left with no pardon, no lifeline, and _no cavalry coming over the hill._**
---
But boy, was I wrong!
---
Over 1 MILLION Americans signed the “ _People’s Pardon of Rudy W. Giuliani._ ” THANK YOU!
---
And now, a new report from _The Arizona Republic_ shows the Attorney General is losing ground in her witch hunt against me:
---
**Decision time nears: Attorney General Mayes outlines options...**
“...she did not rule out walking away from the high-profile prosecution”
---
**There _was_ a cavalry coming over the hill. It was YOU – the American people.**
---
But the battle isn’t won yet... Until I am proclaimed a **_FREE_ _MAN_** , until ALL charges are dropped, and until I’m no longer facing _20 YEARS_ IN PRISON, _I will not stop fighting_!
---
With “decision time” for the Attorney General fast approaching – and a real chance this wrongful prosecution could be dropped – I’m asking YOU to add your name to the public letter to “**FREE RUDY.** ”
---
[**Please add your name to the public letter to “FREE RUDY” to ensure I do not go to prison as an innocent man until I’m 100 years old.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg64tphcuh7cg8entkgnpusr5oi74k5mnjot3l9o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chjm6o71c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zugv4tp67scp3nde7sadcpv6jk1jqasus1tdfv18_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chjm6o71c9h2bs)
__
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z54llmm7merlgk9il2ttqu1f254m8ccrnma03aig_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chjm6o71c9h2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsleeijcbd3i0j8cq1pu1noivtqjbaa0am0a3290_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chjm6o71c9h2bs)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---
P.S. In other good news, I am continuing to recover well following the devastating car crash. Just as President Trump is fond of saying, “NEVER SURRENDER!”
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbb0hbih0as8a9fr93hucr469juqhree9b516190_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chjm6o71c9h2bs)
__

name: John James
subject: I have worn the uniform now I am carrying out a new mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
The weight of service never leaves you.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo0to2ks4m9af4jjr8b3lpl95emgcikr14469g0o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chjm6o76c5h2bs)
---
Friend, When I raised my hand and swore an oath to defend this nation,_**I meant every word.**_ That oath didn’t expire when I left the battlefield. It carried me into business, into church on Sundays, into Congress and now – into this race for Governor. **Michigan is struggling under weak, directionless leadership. The same values I defended overseas are being eroded here at home.** That’s why this filing period matters so much. Our report will show the country whether this campaign still has the firepower to finish the mission. **[I’m asking you to stand with me again if you still believe in service, in faith, and in the promise of America.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt8l6beeaiqrsnlh0f0c7i0si1tlo622f4al9poo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chjm6o76c5h2bs)**
---

Every contribution you make fuels this movement and honors that same spirit of service. For Faith and Freedom,John James

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: This is the inflection point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My final stand. My freedom is on the line. The cavalry is here – YOU.

My final stand. My freedom is on the line. The cavalry is here – YOU.
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu3ilfdk6rmvildd3p754jh8hdkh8pmli9pu23fg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chjm1or6cph2bs)
---
Dear Friend,
---
My final trial is closing in.
---
**An Obama-aligned Attorney General is forcing me into a rigged _state_ trial where President Trump legally can’t save me with a _federal_ pardon.**
---
In an earlier letter to you, I said that I’ve been left with no pardon, no lifeline, and _no cavalry coming over the hill._**
---
But boy, was I wrong!
---
Over 1 MILLION Americans signed the “ _People’s Pardon of Rudy W. Giuliani._ ” THANK YOU!
---
And now, a new report from _The Arizona Republic_ shows the Attorney General is losing ground in her witch hunt against me:
---
**Decision time nears: Attorney General Mayes outlines options...**
“...she did not rule out walking away from the high-profile prosecution”
---
**There _was_ a cavalry coming over the hill. It was YOU – the American people.**
---
But the battle isn’t won yet... Until I am proclaimed a **_FREE_ _MAN_** , until ALL charges are dropped, and until I’m no longer facing _20 YEARS_ IN PRISON, _I will not stop fighting_!
---
With “decision time” for the Attorney General fast approaching – and a real chance this wrongful prosecution could be dropped – I’m asking YOU to add your name to the public letter to “**FREE RUDY.** ”
---
[**Please add your name to the public letter to “FREE RUDY” to ensure I do not go to prison as an innocent man until I’m 100 years old.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbo3ion4uoovbisc49euacrt3u5l637knlgamdeg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chjm1or6cph2bs)
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7c0nun7su7c36r1afrg6em2piupc3utr6u6gueg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chjm1or6cph2bs)
__
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpbc6ml84rmimct8g7kds22fomkfbcp6sbck9kv8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chjm1or6cph2bs)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8g9jms3le5hrnp8ao85jb9k1kra8pbsr8ukqtvo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chjm1or6cph2bs)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---
P.S. In other good news, I am continuing to recover well following the devastating car crash. Just as President Trump is fond of saying, “NEVER SURRENDER!”
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5cte89nlb1o4k1rn7qfu3ska2hugusfeul81u78_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chjm1or6cph2bs)
__

---
The White House budget office said Friday that mass firings of federal workers have begun, escalating pressure on Democratic lawmakers as the government shutdown entered its 10th day. Russ Vought, director of the Office of Management and Budget, announced the move on X, formerly Twitter, writing that “the RIFs have begun,” referring to reduction-in-force plans [...]...Click to read more

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl0om09ul4ehvn9s6sdrmmsr64lb3u2afs943r8g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth2bs)
---

Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, Patriot. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**

---

And Patriot, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf68ft9udltkcqnlo5dl0h4fseg7r2pfduh2jrng_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth2bs)**

name: Tom Holbert, American Veteran Center
subject: Buy a veteran a beer today
body:
For just $10, you can buy a veteran a beer at this year's American Valor Conference.

| | |
---
Friend, It's just a pint...but it means everything.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zu17lp5s13ouinufpaj108ufb0ggrtgbgit59o20_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth2bs)
---
At this year's 28th annual **American Valor Conference** in November, veterans from World War II, Korea, Vietnam, and the War on Terror will gather in Washington, D.C. to share their stories with the next generation of cadets and midshipmen. During the conference our heroes will gather for a special evening reception. After a day of powerful storytelling, they'll have the chance to relax, reconnect, and raise a glass in camaraderie. **And you can be the one who makes that toast possible.** **[Friend, with a gift of just $10, you can buy a veteran a beer... or give $25, $50, or more to raise a glass with many more heroes.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmjiuv4rmbjid55bvjrcrkfabs1vsguia9mt2018_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth2bs)**
---
[ **Yes - I'll buy a beer for a veteran today!**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6qbk58i9acpvgoep8lkd516n4oh252i7htde638_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth2bs)
---
The American Veterans Center (AVC) preserves and promotes the legacy of America's veterans -- from the Greatest Generation to today's warriors. Through oral histories, educational initiatives, and hosting the National Memorial Day Parade and our annual American Valor Conference and televised gala, **AVC ensures veterans ' stories are remembered and passed down and their legacies of service and sacrifice are never forgotten.**
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4k6uqgoot7cr7mqdvvr44hlos7j8oqln2evcr5o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth2bs)
---
The American Valor Conference is where America's heroes gather to share their stories with one another and the next generation of military leaders. Through panels, keynotes, and our nationally televised gala _American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes_ , the conference preserves stories of sacrifice while inspiring tomorrow's leaders. When you give, you're buying a beer, yes -- but you're joining a mission that connects Americans to their heroes in ways both symbolic and unforgettable. **Friend, this simple gesture carries enormous meaning.** A cold beer at the end of the day becomes a toast to freedom, service, and sacrifice. _And your gift makes it possible._ **[Please, Friend, make your most generous gift today to buy a beer or for a veteran who deserves to know they are not forgotten.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0qlbokc3loa9fohfdkvgtaugj9p05gs95a6nqn0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth2bs)** Of course, if you'd like to go further, you can also sponsor a meal for a veteran -- $50 for one meal, $100 for two, $250 for a table.
---
[ **Buy a Beer for a Veteran Today**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2829rc733iaqdusf1j2hr5k1no80vsbn2cof868_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth2bs)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zg23v4c9elolsnrssau8r57401319fut6l6ljf3g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth2bs)
---
Moments like these shape lives, Friend. At last year's conference, a cadet from Texas A&M called the experience of sharing a pint with WWII heroes "_truly inspirational -- something I will never forget._" At nearly every meal, young cadets will sit side-by-side with World War II heroes, listening to stories of Normandy, Iwo Jima, and the Chosin Reservoir - _thanks to you. _ At the evening reception, post-9/11 veterans will raise a glass in fellowship - _thanks to you._ **These simple moments carry a profound message: America remembers, honors, and thanks her veterans - and inspires the next generation to follow in their footsteps.** **[Please, Friend, make your most generous gift of $10, $50, $100, or even $250 to sponsor a meal for veterans before the conference begins.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zovk4e8b32fmj1lmdf0hg5qobo9h3474j3u40iag_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth2bs)**
---
[ **Yes! I 'll Buy a Beer for a Veteran**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpp5pa6709oa0htd4nq2npevm22mbgulfn1ec8a0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth2bs)
---
Your generosity ensures every veteran at the conference feels the gratitude of a grateful nation -- and inspires the next generation to follow in their footsteps. Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center **[P.S. A $10 beer-- a small gesture that sends a timeless message: _America remembers her heroes._](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmmv7cb2kh5pd558070fe7h0mdeqqtr0r5ibtoug_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth2bs)**
---
[ **Buy a Beer for a Veteran Today**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkvrap26a6a0nkebc0td46jjitqd25ocpkggrg98_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Pop Acta Media | First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9m5gl1747o0ms5ch48eer29dfe7jopu5ljse030_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq6d5iepon3dtnmqpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshim0pb1clgm49fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8rqplbij6ag69g3c2goj3gh01ubaf6etorghpn8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge0ob2cth2bs)_

name: Tom Holbert, American Veteran Center
subject: Buy a veteran a beer today
body:
For just $10, you can buy a veteran a beer at this year's American Valor Conference.

| | |
---
Friend, It's just a pint...but it means everything.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaphsi90ttpth6mo8kppc8a4k8g8va2akfnoc4mg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge2o34cth2bs)
---
At this year's 28th annual **American Valor Conference** in November, veterans from World War II, Korea, Vietnam, and the War on Terror will gather in Washington, D.C. to share their stories with the next generation of cadets and midshipmen. During the conference our heroes will gather for a special evening reception. After a day of powerful storytelling, they'll have the chance to relax, reconnect, and raise a glass in camaraderie. **And you can be the one who makes that toast possible.** **[Friend, with a gift of just $10, you can buy a veteran a beer... or give $25, $50, or more to raise a glass with many more heroes.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zap2dtg8dult5mpmqlrfqr32do20k24bdsek3ki8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge2o34cth2bs)**
---
[ **Yes - I'll buy a beer for a veteran today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfm5m11jr8mss41gtdn6o4jd40hmgli8nbp712sg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge2o34cth2bs)
---
The American Veterans Center (AVC) preserves and promotes the legacy of America's veterans -- from the Greatest Generation to today's warriors. Through oral histories, educational initiatives, and hosting the National Memorial Day Parade and our annual American Valor Conference and televised gala, **AVC ensures veterans ' stories are remembered and passed down and their legacies of service and sacrifice are never forgotten.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z479qo1ck7da9tc0m7hoi3528tsrqfbjcsick9n8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge2o34cth2bs)
---
The American Valor Conference is where America's heroes gather to share their stories with one another and the next generation of military leaders. Through panels, keynotes, and our nationally televised gala _American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes_ , the conference preserves stories of sacrifice while inspiring tomorrow's leaders. When you give, you're buying a beer, yes -- but you're joining a mission that connects Americans to their heroes in ways both symbolic and unforgettable. **Friend, this simple gesture carries enormous meaning.** A cold beer at the end of the day becomes a toast to freedom, service, and sacrifice. _And your gift makes it possible._ **[Please, Friend, make your most generous gift today to buy a beer or for a veteran who deserves to know they are not forgotten.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7bul2rk0vm6b224nfjb79848cdpigdtakvi2bpg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge2o34cth2bs)** Of course, if you'd like to go further, you can also sponsor a meal for a veteran -- $50 for one meal, $100 for two, $250 for a table.
---
[ **Buy a Beer for a Veteran Today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8p51re8ghnegut6lca8nah8m63tsis66nlse250_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge2o34cth2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5rej04ctvg0lsrmslbdj6skr9mbdaia4shevct8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge2o34cth2bs)
---
Moments like these shape lives, Friend. At last year's conference, a cadet from Texas A&M called the experience of sharing a pint with WWII heroes "_truly inspirational -- something I will never forget._" At nearly every meal, young cadets will sit side-by-side with World War II heroes, listening to stories of Normandy, Iwo Jima, and the Chosin Reservoir - _thanks to you. _ At the evening reception, post-9/11 veterans will raise a glass in fellowship - _thanks to you._ **These simple moments carry a profound message: America remembers, honors, and thanks her veterans - and inspires the next generation to follow in their footsteps.** **[Please, Friend, make your most generous gift of $10, $50, $100, or even $250 to sponsor a meal for veterans before the conference begins.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjp0bcm5j0vp2t5mt5pq6ahebkr4bbt3ff4n4psg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge2o34cth2bs)**
---
[ **Yes! I 'll Buy a Beer for a Veteran**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfquvomv7497aelvkitv0snje6bg8u07stjutbs8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge2o34cth2bs)
---
Your generosity ensures every veteran at the conference feels the gratitude of a grateful nation -- and inspires the next generation to follow in their footsteps. Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center **[P.S. A $10 beer-- a small gesture that sends a timeless message: _America remembers her heroes._](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z841a71smg5on7u2aivlvdjgec7qjtg92uadag60_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge2o34cth2bs)**
---
[ **Buy a Beer for a Veteran Today**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlfgt5hqumqm5nmq6g0r6naf96p5u2pb70hn0lpg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge2o34cth2bs)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziv8n15s3ivbhkb6pmkmva4d1er9mmchphf5v34g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge2o34cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp35c1im2o73c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuba8tfgl7hq1kukq1c09qitq2gult891ht7iq38_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge2o34cth2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0ipsbu4v4rljekgbmr4r2o2ifg56ji9b55anego_rp22sh2s8i6eor0chge2o34cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

The bi-weekly collection of all things grassroots! No images? For events and opportunities to get involved, visit [wisgop.org/take-action](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhttlhd-didthutlhu-y/). Recently, we've seen county parties host discussions with candidates, march in parades, and organize strategies to boost turnout in their communities. The momentum is picking up, and we hope that you can find ways to get involved and support Republican candidates!Lastly, Tuesday, October 14th, is National Remembrance Day for Charlie Kirk. Republicans in Kenosha County helped to launch the Kenosha County Young Republicans as a brand new chapter of Wisconsin Young Republicans! **Dane County**
The Wisconsin Young Republicans also added a new chapter in Dane County as the Capital City Young Republicans held their launch event in Madison last week. The happy hour included a speech by the Republican Party of Dane County Chairman Mike Herl and helped to expand membership for Wisconsin Young Republicans! **Marquette County **
Marquette County Republicans had a successful 2025 spaghetti fundraiser with great food and even better conversation! **Milwaukee County**
Milwaukee County Republicans held a membership meeting to discuss their new ward captain system to empower members to help mobilize voters within their own neighborhoods. RPMC Director Lisa Bingenheimer has been hard at work preparing for the 2026 elections in Milwaukee County! **Oneida County**
Republicans in Oneida County held a powerful Candlelight Vigil for Charlie Kirk in Tomahawk. The event was a reminder of Charlie's mission and the light that he helped spread to everyone around him. **Price County**
Republicans in Price County took part in the parade during the Ogema Christmas Tree Festival! **St. Croix County**
Republicans in St. Croix County met with Bennett Inman from Surus Wisconsin to help train volunteers as they prepare for the 2026 elections. **Walworth County**
Republicans in Walworth County were busy preparing for 2026 as they held an Election Inspector seminar over the weekend to discuss the process of becoming a poll worker. **Winnebago County**
Winnebago County Republicans were out enjoying this wonderful weather at the annual Greater Fox Valley Young Republicans Golf Outing! **Wood County**
Wood County Republicans attended Pumpkin Fest in Nekoosa with a booth selling Charlie Kirk Freedom shirts and gun raffle tickets! They were also able to recruit some new members! **Buffalo County**
Republicans in Buffalo County hosted an event with guest speaker National Committeewoman Pam Travis! **Crawford County**
Crawford County's recent Monthly Member Meeting featured an engaging Q&A with Christina Estenson, focusing on election inspectors, the Farm Team Program, and member recruitment. The lively discussion fueled actionable strategies and reinforced our grassroots momentum. **Adams County**
The recent Adams County Lincoln Day Dinner was a triumphant event, drawing a capacity crowd with standing room only. The evening showcased an impressive lineup of candidates and radiated vibrant grassroots energy from across the region. **Trempealeau County**
The recent Monthly Member Meeting in Trempealeau County featured special guest Andy Parrish, host of the _Andy is Right_ podcast. Mr. Parrish captivated attendees with insightful reflections on his experience in Minnesota politics, the impact of his podcast, and discussions about local candidates running for office. [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhttlhd-didthutlhu-t/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhttlhd-didthutlhu-i/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhttlhd-didthutlhu-d/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-qhttlhd-didthutlhu-h/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-qhttlhd-didthutlhu-u/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-qhttlhd-didthutlhu-o/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-qhttlhd-l-b)
---|---|---

name: Defenders of Wildlife
subject: What kind of Defender are YOU?
body:
Are you ready to become an elite wildlife defender?
---
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10063/4082282?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=U7jHqDhqVXcqJI2ZMf1z3w==)
|
---
Defender, You've seen some examples of how your voice helps keep wildlife safe - and we're proud to help you protect the wild world you love in a lot of ways! **As one of our newest Wildlife Defenders, we 'd like to learn more about you!** By becoming a Wildlife Defender, you've taken your advocacy to the next level. Our Defenders are elite protectors of imperiled species and their habitats. **Your responses to this survey will help us better connect you with exclusive opportunities to make a powerful difference for wildlife, at the local and national levels.**
---
[**Take the Wildlife Defender survey here!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10063/4082283?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=U7jHqDhqVXcqJI2ZMf1z3w==)
---
You're joining a community of advocates across the country that share your passion for defending imperiled animals and their homes. We hope you'll take a moment to [**share your thoughts**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10063/4082284?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=U7jHqDhqVXcqJI2ZMf1z3w==) and contribute to our movement to protect wildlife! Sincerely,
---
| | Defenders of Wildlife

Whether you're navigating a dark forest on a camping trip, tracking a mule deer on a hunt, or simply enjoying the mysteries of the nocturnal world, DarkForce NVB’s are your reliable companion.

You won’t find higher quality night vision for a better price.

name: Tom Holbert, American Veteran Center
subject: Buy a veteran a beer today
body:
For just $10, you can buy a veteran a beer at this year's American Valor Conference.

| | |
---
Friend, It's just a pint...but it means everything.
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckUGP3CAMhX8NuWWEgUByyKHqaKQedq89Igc8M6gBUiCp9t9XaadSz3uz_D1bz8_f3-wbhjWkxztGmt0RbKl22T_woEYFEy5EpWWPH1ZwMfTAewC7lVw3cs2mjIez0PnZeS1FRzMYzcHo0fDuOdMoPEykpruYRq0m4ScPEtTgzaKkgi7M51bgAMA58PHClZj8MGjjUZkRgCm-bx4b1YvLqVI5sIWDQkr5rHK6uBy7dX62tlUmvzBxY-JWye2FLpjI53YqmLhhpBIcpv51We0dpUblRGIUixymnhOHXk0D9nhfxp7fjcJh8JqkY_JW814cWZc9MXn9-u3dCDNqJvTeoo3kwx6ZvFLEsL6afyeYvD6xeKw_LLqfL-QwbhgeicnrGYHFlHZcrcvpToWSo3-6nBqlxuQVF9uoNru8SKMS__PRldlvv8K6hqoNU_xx-viTTvv8X49Z_A4AAP__r-W0Og)
---
At this year's 28th annual **American Valor Conference** in November, veterans from World War II, Korea, Vietnam, and the War on Terror will gather in Washington, D.C. to share their stories with the next generation of cadets and midshipmen. During the conference our heroes will gather for a special evening reception. After a day of powerful storytelling, they'll have the chance to relax, reconnect, and raise a glass in camaraderie. **And you can be the one who makes that toast possible.** **[Friend, with a gift of just $10, you can buy a veteran a beer... or give $25, $50, or more to raise a glass with many more heroes.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckUGP3CAMhX8NuWWEgUByyKHqaKQedq89Igc8M6gBUiCp9t9XaadSz3uz_D1bz8_f3-wbhjWkxztGmt0RbKl22T_woEYFEy5EpWWPH1ZwMfTAewC7lVw3cs2mjIez0PnZeS1FRzMYzcHo0fDuOdMoPEykpruYRq0m4ScPEtTgzaKkgi7M51bgAMA58PHClZj8MGjjUZkRgCm-bx4b1YvLqVI5sIWDQkr5rHK6uBy7dX62tlUmvzBxY-JWye2FLpjI53YqmLhhpBIcpv51We0dpUblRGIUixymnhOHXk0D9nhfxp7fjcJh8JqkY_JW814cWZc9MXn9-u3dCDNqJvTeoo3kwx6ZvFLEsL6afyeYvD6xeKw_LLqfL-QwbhgeicnrGYHFlHZcrcvpToWSo3-6nBqlxuQVF9uoNru8SKMS__PRldlvv8K6hqoNU_xx-viTTvv8X49Z_A4AAP__r-W0Og)**
---
[ **Yes - I'll buy a beer for a veteran today!**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckUGP3CAMhX8NuWWEgUByyKHqaKQedq89Igc8M6gBUiCp9t9XaadSz3uz_D1bz8_f3-wbhjWkxztGmt0RbKl22T_woEYFEy5EpWWPH1ZwMfTAewC7lVw3cs2mjIez0PnZeS1FRzMYzcHo0fDuOdMoPEykpruYRq0m4ScPEtTgzaKkgi7M51bgAMA58PHClZj8MGjjUZkRgCm-bx4b1YvLqVI5sIWDQkr5rHK6uBy7dX62tlUmvzBxY-JWye2FLpjI53YqmLhhpBIcpv51We0dpUblRGIUixymnhOHXk0D9nhfxp7fjcJh8JqkY_JW814cWZc9MXn9-u3dCDNqJvTeoo3kwx6ZvFLEsL6afyeYvD6xeKw_LLqfL-QwbhgeicnrGYHFlHZcrcvpToWSo3-6nBqlxuQVF9uoNru8SKMS__PRldlvv8K6hqoNU_xx-viTTvv8X49Z_A4AAP__r-W0Og)
---
The American Veterans Center (AVC) preserves and promotes the legacy of America's veterans -- from the Greatest Generation to today's warriors. Through oral histories, educational initiatives, and hosting the National Memorial Day Parade and our annual American Valor Conference and televised gala, **AVC ensures veterans ' stories are remembered and passed down and their legacies of service and sacrifice are never forgotten.**
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckUGP3CAMhX8NuWWEgUByyKHqaKQedq89Igc8M6gBUiCp9t9XaadSz3uz_D1bz8_f3-wbhjWkxztGmt0RbKl22T_woEYFEy5EpWWPH1ZwMfTAewC7lVw3cs2mjIez0PnZeS1FRzMYzcHo0fDuOdMoPEykpruYRq0m4ScPEtTgzaKkgi7M51bgAMA58PHClZj8MGjjUZkRgCm-bx4b1YvLqVI5sIWDQkr5rHK6uBy7dX62tlUmvzBxY-JWye2FLpjI53YqmLhhpBIcpv51We0dpUblRGIUixymnhOHXk0D9nhfxp7fjcJh8JqkY_JW814cWZc9MXn9-u3dCDNqJvTeoo3kwx6ZvFLEsL6afyeYvD6xeKw_LLqfL-QwbhgeicnrGYHFlHZcrcvpToWSo3-6nBqlxuQVF9uoNru8SKMS__PRldlvv8K6hqoNU_xx-viTTvv8X49Z_A4AAP__r-W0Og)
---
The American Valor Conference is where America's heroes gather to share their stories with one another and the next generation of military leaders. Through panels, keynotes, and our nationally televised gala _American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes_ , the conference preserves stories of sacrifice while inspiring tomorrow's leaders. When you give, you're buying a beer, yes -- but you're joining a mission that connects Americans to their heroes in ways both symbolic and unforgettable. **Friend, this simple gesture carries enormous meaning.** A cold beer at the end of the day becomes a toast to freedom, service, and sacrifice. _And your gift makes it possible._ **[Please, Friend, make your most generous gift today to buy a beer or for a veteran who deserves to know they are not forgotten.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckUGP3CAMhX8NuWWEgUByyKHqaKQedq89Igc8M6gBUiCp9t9XaadSz3uz_D1bz8_f3-wbhjWkxztGmt0RbKl22T_woEYFEy5EpWWPH1ZwMfTAewC7lVw3cs2mjIez0PnZeS1FRzMYzcHo0fDuOdMoPEykpruYRq0m4ScPEtTgzaKkgi7M51bgAMA58PHClZj8MGjjUZkRgCm-bx4b1YvLqVI5sIWDQkr5rHK6uBy7dX62tlUmvzBxY-JWye2FLpjI53YqmLhhpBIcpv51We0dpUblRGIUixymnhOHXk0D9nhfxp7fjcJh8JqkY_JW814cWZc9MXn9-u3dCDNqJvTeoo3kwx6ZvFLEsL6afyeYvD6xeKw_LLqfL-QwbhgeicnrGYHFlHZcrcvpToWSo3-6nBqlxuQVF9uoNru8SKMS__PRldlvv8K6hqoNU_xx-viTTvv8X49Z_A4AAP__r-W0Og)** Of course, if you'd like to go further, you can also sponsor a meal for a veteran -- $50 for one meal, $100 for two, $250 for a table.
---
[ **Buy a Beer for a Veteran Today**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckUGP3CAMhX8NuWWEgUByyKHqaKQedq89Igc8M6gBUiCp9t9XaadSz3uz_D1bz8_f3-wbhjWkxztGmt0RbKl22T_woEYFEy5EpWWPH1ZwMfTAewC7lVw3cs2mjIez0PnZeS1FRzMYzcHo0fDuOdMoPEykpruYRq0m4ScPEtTgzaKkgi7M51bgAMA58PHClZj8MGjjUZkRgCm-bx4b1YvLqVI5sIWDQkr5rHK6uBy7dX62tlUmvzBxY-JWye2FLpjI53YqmLhhpBIcpv51We0dpUblRGIUixymnhOHXk0D9nhfxp7fjcJh8JqkY_JW814cWZc9MXn9-u3dCDNqJvTeoo3kwx6ZvFLEsL6afyeYvD6xeKw_LLqfL-QwbhgeicnrGYHFlHZcrcvpToWSo3-6nBqlxuQVF9uoNru8SKMS__PRldlvv8K6hqoNU_xx-viTTvv8X49Z_A4AAP__r-W0Og)
---
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckUGP3CAMhX8NuWWEgUByyKHqaKQedq89Igc8M6gBUiCp9t9XaadSz3uz_D1bz8_f3-wbhjWkxztGmt0RbKl22T_woEYFEy5EpWWPH1ZwMfTAewC7lVw3cs2mjIez0PnZeS1FRzMYzcHo0fDuOdMoPEykpruYRq0m4ScPEtTgzaKkgi7M51bgAMA58PHClZj8MGjjUZkRgCm-bx4b1YvLqVI5sIWDQkr5rHK6uBy7dX62tlUmvzBxY-JWye2FLpjI53YqmLhhpBIcpv51We0dpUblRGIUixymnhOHXk0D9nhfxp7fjcJh8JqkY_JW814cWZc9MXn9-u3dCDNqJvTeoo3kwx6ZvFLEsL6afyeYvD6xeKw_LLqfL-QwbhgeicnrGYHFlHZcrcvpToWSo3-6nBqlxuQVF9uoNru8SKMS__PRldlvv8K6hqoNU_xx-viTTvv8X49Z_A4AAP__r-W0Og)
---
Moments like these shape lives, Friend. At last year's conference, a cadet from Texas A&M called the experience of sharing a pint with WWII heroes "_truly inspirational -- something I will never forget._" At nearly every meal, young cadets will sit side-by-side with World War II heroes, listening to stories of Normandy, Iwo Jima, and the Chosin Reservoir - _thanks to you. _ At the evening reception, post-9/11 veterans will raise a glass in fellowship - _thanks to you._ **These simple moments carry a profound message: America remembers, honors, and thanks her veterans - and inspires the next generation to follow in their footsteps.** **[Please, Friend, make your most generous gift of $10, $50, $100, or even $250 to sponsor a meal for veterans before the conference begins.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckUGP3CAMhX8NuWWEgUByyKHqaKQedq89Igc8M6gBUiCp9t9XaadSz3uz_D1bz8_f3-wbhjWkxztGmt0RbKl22T_woEYFEy5EpWWPH1ZwMfTAewC7lVw3cs2mjIez0PnZeS1FRzMYzcHo0fDuOdMoPEykpruYRq0m4ScPEtTgzaKkgi7M51bgAMA58PHClZj8MGjjUZkRgCm-bx4b1YvLqVI5sIWDQkr5rHK6uBy7dX62tlUmvzBxY-JWye2FLpjI53YqmLhhpBIcpv51We0dpUblRGIUixymnhOHXk0D9nhfxp7fjcJh8JqkY_JW814cWZc9MXn9-u3dCDNqJvTeoo3kwx6ZvFLEsL6afyeYvD6xeKw_LLqfL-QwbhgeicnrGYHFlHZcrcvpToWSo3-6nBqlxuQVF9uoNru8SKMS__PRldlvv8K6hqoNU_xx-viTTvv8X49Z_A4AAP__r-W0Og)**
---
[ **Yes! I 'll Buy a Beer for a Veteran**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckUGP3CAMhX8NuWWEgUByyKHqaKQedq89Igc8M6gBUiCp9t9XaadSz3uz_D1bz8_f3-wbhjWkxztGmt0RbKl22T_woEYFEy5EpWWPH1ZwMfTAewC7lVw3cs2mjIez0PnZeS1FRzMYzcHo0fDuOdMoPEykpruYRq0m4ScPEtTgzaKkgi7M51bgAMA58PHClZj8MGjjUZkRgCm-bx4b1YvLqVI5sIWDQkr5rHK6uBy7dX62tlUmvzBxY-JWye2FLpjI53YqmLhhpBIcpv51We0dpUblRGIUixymnhOHXk0D9nhfxp7fjcJh8JqkY_JW814cWZc9MXn9-u3dCDNqJvTeoo3kwx6ZvFLEsL6afyeYvD6xeKw_LLqfL-QwbhgeicnrGYHFlHZcrcvpToWSo3-6nBqlxuQVF9uoNru8SKMS__PRldlvv8K6hqoNU_xx-viTTvv8X49Z_A4AAP__r-W0Og)
---
Your generosity ensures every veteran at the conference feels the gratitude of a grateful nation -- and inspires the next generation to follow in their footsteps. Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center **[P.S. A $10 beer-- a small gesture that sends a timeless message: _America remembers her heroes._](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckUGP3CAMhX8NuWWEgUByyKHqaKQedq89Igc8M6gBUiCp9t9XaadSz3uz_D1bz8_f3-wbhjWkxztGmt0RbKl22T_woEYFEy5EpWWPH1ZwMfTAewC7lVw3cs2mjIez0PnZeS1FRzMYzcHo0fDuOdMoPEykpruYRq0m4ScPEtTgzaKkgi7M51bgAMA58PHClZj8MGjjUZkRgCm-bx4b1YvLqVI5sIWDQkr5rHK6uBy7dX62tlUmvzBxY-JWye2FLpjI53YqmLhhpBIcpv51We0dpUblRGIUixymnhOHXk0D9nhfxp7fjcJh8JqkY_JW814cWZc9MXn9-u3dCDNqJvTeoo3kwx6ZvFLEsL6afyeYvD6xeKw_LLqfL-QwbhgeicnrGYHFlHZcrcvpToWSo3-6nBqlxuQVF9uoNru8SKMS__PRldlvv8K6hqoNU_xx-viTTvv8X49Z_A4AAP__r-W0Og)**

[ **Buy a Beer for a Veteran Today**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyckUGP3CAMhX8NuWWEgUByyKHqaKQedq89Igc8M6gBUiCp9t9XaadSz3uz_D1bz8_f3-wbhjWkxztGmt0RbKl22T_woEYFEy5EpWWPH1ZwMfTAewC7lVw3cs2mjIez0PnZeS1FRzMYzcHo0fDuOdMoPEykpruYRq0m4ScPEtTgzaKkgi7M51bgAMA58PHClZj8MGjjUZkRgCm-bx4b1YvLqVI5sIWDQkr5rHK6uBy7dX62tlUmvzBxY-JWye2FLpjI53YqmLhhpBIcpv51We0dpUblRGIUixymnhOHXk0D9nhfxp7fjcJh8JqkY_JW814cWZc9MXn9-u3dCDNqJvTeoo3kwx6ZvFLEsL6afyeYvD6xeKw_LLqfL-QwbhgeicnrGYHFlHZcrcvpToWSo3-6nBqlxuQVF9uoNru8SKMS__PRldlvv8K6hqoNU_xx-viTTvv8X49Z_A4AAP__r-W0Og)

During the conference our heroes will gather for a special evening reception. After a day of powerful storytelling, they'll have the chance to relax, reconnect, and raise a glass in camaraderie. And you can be the one who makes that toast possible. The American Veterans Center (AVC) preserves and promotes the legacy of America's veterans -- from the Greatest Generation to today's warriors. Through oral histories, educational initiatives, and hosting the National Memorial Day Parade and our annual American Valor Conference and televised gala, AVC ensures veterans ' stories are remembered and passed down and their legacies of service and sacrifice are never forgotten. The American Valor Conference is where America's heroes gather to share their stories with one another and the next generation of military leaders. Through panels, keynotes, and our nationally televised gala American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes , the conference preserves stories of sacrifice while inspiring tomorrow's leaders. When you give, you're buying a beer, yes -- but you're joining a mission that connects Americans to their heroes in ways both symbolic and unforgettable. Friend, this simple gesture carries enormous meaning. A cold beer at the end of the day becomes a toast to freedom, service, and sacrifice. And your gift makes it possible. Of course, if you'd like to go further, you can also sponsor a meal for a veteran -- $50 for one meal, $100 for two, $250 for a table. Moments like these shape lives, Friend. At last year's conference, a cadet from Texas A&M called the experience of sharing a pint with WWII heroes "truly inspirational -- something I will never forget." At nearly every meal, young cadets will sit side-by-side with World War II heroes, listening to stories of Normandy, Iwo Jima, and the Chosin Reservoir - thanks to you. At the evening reception, post-9/11 veterans will raise a glass in fellowship - thanks to you. These simple moments carry a profound message: America remembers, honors, and thanks her veterans - and inspires the next generation to follow in their footsteps. Your generosity ensures every veteran at the conference feels the gratitude of a grateful nation -- and inspires the next generation to follow in their footsteps. Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201 Pop Acta Media | Conservative Innovation PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: The Flyover
subject: China Trade War, Tennessee Explosion, and a Butterfly Wing Transplant
body:
President Trump threatened on Friday to [slap a major tariffs increase](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdKDxEHAoXGxDl223RBN7HLwyBtmzYfP3T4n0vuA1t7nSubrnz225UUwxP37TxlbCvmQ-a2IRLotbYyYp5PmkIpwz18rM_48FAYdWQ6v14imm13JpvA3MyH3DVpsRtDEAQ7PawY29n3SgcNVw5WAMT6PDK0xkDA6hifZN06C1Buix77wmHI13AB7GCe_qAuyj7KX7u8csK4f02p9cOrdvTbKryFFV_0vhrHA-z7Nz-e7epcL5jVY4a_gOKf-2o_08a4VKDKG2hQq3TEXW2q2ypaZYf5wxpVhHoy7w2Cimz5r8SNHT4lcAAAD__4WceTY) on Chinese products to counter new export controls that China imposed on its strategically valuable rare earth minerals.

| | |

# Saturday, October 11, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1809, explorer Meriwether Lewis, famous for his exploration of the Louisiana Territory and the Pacific Northwest alongside William Clark, [died under mysterious circumstances](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3O3CAQRZ8Gd1gD_pMLijTuNm1KC8N4mQjDCkZLnKePNoryAl99rq6Ozo_H_rAUKT2_2wsNn3lP2GpEZiy7C5QsF-ux2cKYEtaKiL9euwY9SQVSqd1bivc-dt6ciBqHDo1aZlDLAjB1wYznoBZ3wDrO67qO6nCrPw7wevLztOi5I_N5U6CUAhj00Htl9bx4B-BhXvUhRkBPnEv_M1PigGe88xtL7_LVRROYX1UM34TehN5aa32gyrncHy70xoGq9PaWlOQ_IvSWHecDi1RK6O3CQg05YJER22dOWKWNOT0lB5TJsgv4W3KxDuX_El0x_tUoRqrzIkZ4XpbiXyv-Usq30X8CAAD__2ytipM) in the early hours of the morning after stopping for the night at a tavern in Tennessee.

In today's _Podcast Extra_ , we note the passing of 106-year-old Sister Jean, the Loyola-Chicago basketball chaplain who captured people's hearts during her team's 2018 Final Four run and inspired a "Win One for the Nun" chant. You can hear her story[ by clicking here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz7FOwzAQANCvcbZGd2cnbgYPSJCtLAxILJEbXxoj166ca0v5egS_wA886b0fpoOPKebTqz-zk6VMme9bYhGu07zG7KX6wHdfhXPmbWPmr8tEQN0OYYc4BR_TYzJNcAszsW7Yoe0BrQXomtVZtqbfG-yPxnSD72gwqMEbCkuAYZib6H41BEQE0KTbgJ56G2aAAP1AR2WAQ5RS288Ss6y8pEe5cW3ncm6SW0Uum9JPikZF46Nc5doeWdG4B7--fXwTrS9Kj6L0sybTVBcu95hS3HqrDJzOPqY_Sf7Vvzn6CQAA___cOWuW).

If stiff, aching joints are slowing you down, Harvard scientists say a hidden "joint drought" may be to blame--and this simple 5-second daily fix from today's sponsor [Arthrozene](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkc-K2zAQh59GvjmMRpaUHHwoLLltrz2KsWa0VqvIRhab5u1LwkKvhR5_8M03_368h3fKJdeP73STuactVLkfRXqXFuKaK_VGLHdqXWqV4xCR33tAQDtqGLUOTLk8wjTwnERQzCCz9g609wB2WGfx2gNEviAmwsuULFuTnNfJxslyGvL8tGnQWgMYNCfWhM5zBGBwF1zUBMK5b-30c8u1r5LKY_uUdorbbSjz2vt-KPNN4VXhtTeKv06rUOnr48VT5iep8Hp2ZpHF29GdgcbpTHZctEujRHOOnlnzxStz3QtFuUntyrx9tQrHvtVja-Er_z1SDc_J0Sp0xJmVeYsr5abQ9Vfi3CT2JfyzKLzqw6qHNvN-z6Xkw3k1wceNcnnt3P_rUZ8z_gkAAP__S8GqEA) could be the key to moving freely again.

|
---
## U.S., China Trade War Heats Up
President Trump said Friday the United States would impose [a new tariff of 100%](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uxCAQhJ8Gd7aWxT9xQZHG3aVNaXGwnIkwtmBz5N4-upPyBGmmGekbffN5WS8mxJBuH2Ynzf5YE9USiZnyareQDGfjqJrMlBKVQkQ_54qAQyuhlXJ1JsTH2jdOeyIk1ZCW0whymgCGZtOjfZu9mgdzVWARZuVdj4MzCmH00kxN0E-aBCklgELVOWlwnJwFcDDOeBU9kAt85O7rCIk38vFx3Cl39tibqDfmswj1LnARuNRaO5uu9lkKXJ5ogYuEv-D8vZ_tS6plk4P3pX15tuXwXE2mbuM9Nlm7s4YYQxkn0cNtNyG-BvlfL901_gYAAP__5v96YA) on imports from China “over and above any Tariff that they are currently paying,” starting on Nov. 1. The action was in retaliation for new export controls that China imposed this week on its strategically valuable rare earth minerals. Trump also said that the U.S. would impose export controls on “any and all critical software," and threatened to cancel his upcoming meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping because of the dispute. For its part, China slapped new port fees on U.S. ships and started an antitrust investigation into Qualcomm Inc., [the latest in a string of tit-for-tat moves](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFyqzAQRb9GdGJWK5AehYrX0DltSkZGi1EiJEassf33GecX0t-5Z875vEwXH1PMtw-_keOlTJkeRyJmqtO8xuy5-kAPX5lypuMgouc-IWAvFUilpuBjek1dE9xChKQbcsoaUNYC9M3qhmVGVB2YMPRW2-sczGAXbXpj_6lBD0107zcFSikAjboNyqOxYQYIYAa8ig4oRC61_Sox80pLepWTajuXrUluZd4Pof8LHAWOS8w-z9S-_FrKeyFwfCsJHLnet10-o9x8pvtJVSY6qfobSfbp-5BgsUOre2xX3lJTXdgfMaV4GCs6uG0-pl8m_ynU6fAnAAD__6sMe_U) this week.

The Dow Jones index dropped almost 900 points on Friday as the dispute widened. [On Truth Social, Trump posted](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGngS3R5TsZGCpV3tKpUkeLwCWmwmABSZq3r9xX6HqO9Bv-X5f54lJO5fbhVrQj1rngs2ccA9vsl1TcaC7g07WBpWDviPizzRy4OjA4MDYHl_JrljTYiMhRULTMaGDGACi6WH3W4epPwkcpzVl6UCghmlM8RYzIBU121xgwxgAEF8fAHNcmeIAA-syvRAKGNGo7ftdUxoIxv-oD29HXlWa7jLF1It4InwifRruPpVefXN7_fZTQ0OX3WlwOn-2-boRPW-2jEz4xpoQCqZQREkBoaWizYXumnFPXhki4rS79UXT8q8_D8t8AAAD__2qjd3U) that there was no way China “should be allowed to hold the World ‘captive’” with its rare earths policy.
## Tennessee Bomb Plant Explodes
A massive [explosion at a Tennessee bomb factory](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLtu7DAMRL_G7rwQ6YeuCxW32W7TpjQoiVozkB-QiX38feAU-YGUgwEGZ87nbbqRZFnvH7Sw07RNKz-PzKpcpjDLSloo8pOK8rrycTDza5_QYN-AaQCmSJLfU1dHl5iR25od2MGAtcb09ez63vQtjYOnkFKX-pho_JfSaGn0PgHV4s41MABgTIvtJQLhYGMwJpphRF91hqPoVi5fm6w6c8rv7cHlEralzm5W3Y-q_V_htcIr7eeBszpDUQmZK7z-0jc-06HNIlmUyrvh1563Qx7c7JlWbdqAg7eAYAnZs02-C9Qxgu84hmjr4uL-lJzlGGzVmftCkn9I9E_6Hg6_AwAA__-rqYV4) on Friday morning left at least 19 people missing and feared dead, officials said. The explosion was reported around 7:45 a.m. local time at the Accurate Energetic Systems plant, a military explosives manufacturer, about 60 miles southwest of Nashville. [Photos from after the blast are here.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFurDAQRb_GdF7NGAxvCxevodu0KZHB42UiYyPb2V3-PiJS8gNpRhpd6eje836bbpYDx_ub3chUn6ZIzxKoVsrTsnK0NVtHT5srxUilENFrnxQoLREk4uQsh2PqGmc8kaK2IYNDDzgMALpZzT-vse_QDoh6nju9kO2WzutZK9B-6Bs2Jw0BEQFa1V4cWtUPbgFw0F_VLDogxzXly0fiWFfy4UgPypclbU0wa617Ee1_oUahxnjsqdQzEmo8wUKNCD_ns8hz3_le5U5pDyQ3LoXjXVpfKcs5bbP0dqkpH5Jee0iFU5Qc5a8AocYmG7c_OQQu_SA6uG-Ww3ef-ieJD6O-AgAA__8saoUw) At a news conference, Humphreys County Sheriff Chris Davis [gave few specifics](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdKD14gOlcJGG7tKmRHv2cjgyNrI3x93fR6TID6QbaTQzevN5na8UYkj3D9rYypLnxEeNLMJldmtIJIU8H1SEU-Jamfm5zwh4aTW0Ws-eQnzNpvF2YUbuG7Z6HECPI8ClWS0ZANKITMMymuVmLto7o9GQ69Evpgn2bNOgtQbose-8JhxG7wA8DG94UwbYB8ml-8ohycpLfOUHl87lrYl2Fdmr6t8VTgqn4zg6d6snxekrnE6pcOLnHnMNObV_JC05911IuOXE5c4SXFtfVXg7A02xfj9CjKEOozJw3yjE303511EPiz8BAAD__2arftQ) about casualties while families were still being notified. He said the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives, Homeland Security, and the Tennessee Bureau of Investigation were among the agencies that responded to the scene Friday.
## List: Property Tax Bills by State
Property tax bills [vary widely by state](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOtCAUBeCnwQ4DV0fHguJv7OZvtzQI14ENgoE7w_j2G_cVtj0n-XJyvh7LQ_vg4_O_3lHRlpaItQQkwrwY56OmrC1WnQljxFIQ8XMsIODGpeBSLlb7cC59Y9WGCNg1qOQ4CDmOQtwap9b-rg3ICe3NDvdulGbsplXofpKw2bVvvLo0KaSUQnTQtVZqGEZrhLBimGBlvUDrKeX2O_lIDrdwpjfm1qS9CcoRHYV1_xjMDOZaa2viaq6SwXzRDGYxMZjlncHsUuX7yzju0o6pRsyFH_rkPvIjpwMznZz0B8uV4BvzyV-FF9KEraM9NFnZo_oQfBlG1ovnrn34XUJ_uu-t4CcAAP__yeaEJw), with homeowners in New Jersey paying a median of $9,163 per year—the highest in the country—while those in Alabama pay just $786, the lowest, according to 2023 Tax Foundation data. Texas and New Hampshire also rank high due to their lack of income taxes, while states like California and Hawaii keep lower effective tax rates despite steep home prices, thanks to tax caps and alternative revenue sources. Nationwide, property taxes are up 27.4% since 2019, adding strain to household budgets and surprising many who underestimated the cost. [See your state here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOtCAUBeCnwQ4DV0fHguJv7OZvtzQI14ENgoE7w_j2G_cVtj0n-XJyvh7LQ_vg4_O_3lHRlpaItQQkwrwY56OmrC1WnQljxFIQ8XMsIODGpeBSLlb7cC59Y9WGCNg1qOQ4CDmOQtwap9b-rg3ICe3NDvdulGbsplXofpKw2bVvvLo0KaSUQnTQtVZqGEZrhLBimGBlvUDrKeX2O_lIDrdwpjfm1qS9CcoRHYV1_xjMDOZaa2viaq6SwXzRDGYxMZjlncHsUuX7yzju0o6pRsyFH_rkPvIjpwMznZz0B8uV4BvzyV-FF9KEraM9NFnZo_oQfBlG1ovnrn34XUJ_uu-t4CcAAP__yeaEJw).

clean_body: President Trump threatened on Friday to on Chinese products to counter new export controls that China imposed on its strategically valuable rare earth minerals. | | | | | | Saturday, October 11, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1809, explorer Meriwether Lewis, famous for his exploration of the Louisiana Territory and the Pacific Northwest alongside William Clark, in the early hours of the morning after stopping for the night at a tavern in Tennessee. In today's Podcast Extra , we note the passing of 106-year-old Sister Jean, the Loyola-Chicago basketball chaplain who captured people's hearts during her team's 2018 Final Four run and inspired a "Win One for the Nun" chant. You can hear her story. If stiff, aching joints are slowing you down, Harvard scientists say a hidden "joint drought" may be to blame--and this simple 5-second daily fix from today's sponsor could be the key to moving freely again. | U.S., China Trade War Heats Up President Trump said Friday the United States would impose on imports from China “over and above any Tariff that they are currently paying,” starting on Nov. 1. The action was in retaliation for new export controls that China imposed this week on its strategically valuable rare earth minerals. Trump also said that the U.S. would impose export controls on “any and all critical software," and threatened to cancel his upcoming meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping because of the dispute. For its part, China slapped new port fees on U.S. ships and started an antitrust investigation into Qualcomm Inc., this week. The Dow Jones index dropped almost 900 points on Friday as the dispute widened. that there was no way China “should be allowed to hold the World ‘captive’” with its rare earths policy. Tennessee Bomb Plant Explodes A massive on Friday morning left at least 19 people missing and feared dead, officials said. The explosion was reported around 7:45 a.m. local time at the Accurate Energetic Systems plant, a military explosives manufacturer, about 60 miles southwest of Nashville. At a news conference, Humphreys County Sheriff Chris Davis about casualties while families were still being notified. He said the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives, Homeland Security, and the Tennessee Bureau of Investigation were among the agencies that responded to the scene Friday. List: Property Tax Bills by State Property tax bills , with homeowners in New Jersey paying a median of $9,163 per year—the highest in the country—while those in Alabama pay just $786, the lowest, according to 2023 Tax Foundation data. Texas and New Hampshire also rank high due to their lack of income taxes, while states like California and Hawaii keep lower effective tax rates despite steep home prices, thanks to tax caps and alternative revenue sources. Nationwide, property taxes are up 27.4% since 2019, adding strain to household budgets and surprising many who underestimated the cost. . | The following stories are featured exclusively on The Flyover Podcast --a daily show that gives you the most important headlines in under 15 minutes, straight from the heart of the country. Friend, When I raised my hand and swore an oath to defend this nation,_**I meant every word.**_ That oath didn't expire when I left the battlefield. It carried me into business, into church on Sundays, into Congress and now - into this race for Governor. **Michigan is struggling under weak, directionless leadership. The same values I defended overseas are being eroded here at home.** That's why this filing period matters so much. Our report will show the country whether this campaign still has the firepower to finish the mission. **[I'm asking you to stand with me again if you still believe in service, in faith, and in the promise of America.](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkU2LpDAQhn9NvCn58KM9eOhdR5iF7h3owxxDjNVtDSaRStS_vwg7sNe9vvXwVj3U503fDC7oX3fjoLOjpqhxNjscgXyaYfP4DOR8ONA4LbmscsFzIU5OZFNnW5DlWGbQiabmomkrKbO5M7y6KPG0aqobwStrL1V74a28CDOWrawy7M4uwYUQvKxEWwjgkxlF00DTcmmfrOQwYQpU2OAj0G4S7jBSMJM1MRUeUrZ0c0prZOrK5MDkEMFuBMWBnmAqbHBMDl9h9vmXcRDzZ6DcIZODhyN3GCMGn6-GqWFLTsewkQWm-pVCXMEm9C8m63OUgBxT_cdVgzO4fKeWqf7nj_xb5G_sYMLtxP9lrXGrwZdnqv91vb099P3tU9_eH4_333f9cWWypvN2OneqPtEGGXXTeuCyYKwbVvLX2XY6Zem_37R38k8AAAD__2D-oSM)**

Why? Because for far too long, Fake Republicans have been working against the conservative movement, often with the help of Democrats. That 's exactly why I jumped into the race for the United States Senate in Texas. John Cornyn is a Fake Republican who is always looking to give in to Democrat demands and to water down any Republican wins... Remember: Cornyn even told President Trump not to run in 2024! Look, my race is heating up, and I urgently need YOUR help to beat Cornyn and the unhinged Democrats in Texas- just look at the recent poll The Texas Tribune reported on recently: " ... 29% of registered voters having yet to decide who they will vote for ..." We still have nearly 30% of registered Republicans undecided in this race, and Fake Republican Cornyn's flood of false attack ads has kept this race too close to call.
