**Good Morning!** On this day in 1930, decorated U.S. Air Force fighter pilot [Sam Johnson](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O7CAUg5-GdERw8l9Q3Cbd3HbLCMLJ5KwIRMCGmbdfZV5hG8uF9cn212N5aHLkn__1gSq_trB4LMlhzhiXiDbShTHSpV18eyw_l3YW0wICOi4Fl3Kxmtx7aSurjLCTrFDJoRdyFO0wVbuyxoxb1yFOphvN0DWbXlGYrTGthWGFitQNk0JKeUtfCzttppfbOujG6G5irUBLOcQ675jxpdPm3uHCWK_hqJzacz4Ta_4xmBnMpZT6DI4yreEOMJjvRQxmECAYzKK7_cBgTvrg32H3KXhuCRP_wPka_DNiSof2_CLMXh_8DIXD2DdtX0Vlz0LOUeoH1ornocl9muS__Xcp-A0AAP__VZKFlg) was born in San Antonio. Johnson represented much of Collin County in the U.S. House from 1991 until 2019. A veteran of the Korean War and the Vietnam War, Johnson was a prisoner of war for seven years after getting shot down in North Vietnam in 1966. It's [Red River football](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8Gd0RAHDsuKLZx97bd0hqbIaA3Zp7wrEn-fpX8wja3ObpXV-fP1_IFmXJ5_IYdvTwjLwXbQSiCdakYaj6x1nwC1VfB9vcECngszribtkZbuwTI9Fr6LvjVhMl26O04GHs3_Th1yU_RuO02rvc-3IKLcRymOF2DvUewdrTQZf8es8Za-47hYsIU18HGbYTrCrdJ9QZDFq4XSSj4hCPSi0-sl433jnwS-TnU9Zdys3Jza-1y5DdSbt6YCB-o3PzpKTdHZlmBSLk5cdPCuoFsSX-4Ji6PxLUcWuAbNRfN3wSJd9C5aEmoNxbholdu1FUfflomyscwqt48dsj0-ST_Z_L07l8AAAD__155i4w) day, pitting the Texas Longhorns against the Oklahoma Sooners. ## Paxton Files Motion to Close GOP Primaries
Attorney Gen. Ken Paxton and the Texas GOP leadership filed a joint motion in federal court calling for [closed Republican primaries](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdKC1MfgoXFxDl2uvRAteJysZjGwHyNv_Iq_wN6MpRt9o5v9jeiAH3p7_cCVbLh-njc4cqBRKUyKX-KCU-MCQPhud7wODozwpUF0toZZycsjhM-nK2RncICuy0vQg_4A2Q_WyRuECJAEG7NpO934x2jjvkPTcemgrtjdMgpTylr4BN_i5l34x2M7YDUIDOS4xNeVFhS7MPnziQalZ4loF-yplz6L9K9Qo1HieZ-Pjpe8Zd0Co8bZCjTteJW71l1AvIWZydaL9PQdecKv3xCsmplwl6_aTQ-DcG6HhuSKHb1f53UOHVT8BAAD__x0pfao) in Texas.

The Republican Party of Texas (RPT) sued Secretary of State Jane Nelson in September with the same goal. The filing urges Nelson to reverse a Texas Election Code provision as unconstitutional, calling it a “[slap in the face](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1urDAQhZ8GOiPby89SuLgN3d42JRrwwE5ibDQ2sLx9xCp5gjSjKT59Oud8PPoHkCM__4cFTXpNofd4RIcpIfeMlmlHZtrB8enx2HZwFmOvpa6EkkKp3gK5sy9zawZpW5WjUU0t1V2WTZs_jaqr2taDnEqohkbDvR0tNq1uoSq1HO45mUumpFLqOnUhbTsNtZrGBm4DVG1WSrSUAhfpiQlfECd3hh25GMOSO_NMaY3Z7V-mu0x3x3EUbwhSCuzxnNEjgyvmsGe6u9plumN0CBGv95cTP6D4Qi9WeKXgxUQOo_gM5JNYQqLgxdst5rCKjWfysxjDxkmMLkQUjOs2OBrBi5VpASaMORu7HuQcxbrJSjkvQO4dPf1t8N3o7wAAAP__PdCcJQ) to the Republican party and voters” to allow non-Republicans to vote in GOP primaries. Paxton is running in the Republican primary for U.S. Senate, seeking to unseat Sen. John Cornyn in a tightening election.
## New Elementary School Opens in Uvalde
The school district in Uvalde [opened a new elementary school](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpSAYhZ8GOwxwvbgUFNvY3W23NOj_o2RRzA8r17efOJPMC0xzcqqT7zt_X-PLhRj25Y_b0Ja3T-OONUcsBWkkBAonEoXTRbp2rP9PFwHzqIR6cim4lCO4EK-xa8BOAoxs0MpeC_lLdL1pVis8zrMBr40HLVxnph4UOPBae2EmaIK9x6SQUt6hWwHGT1r6uXePyT0N6wRCKInasmLBt8s-XulEaue0NdGupRyZPX4zNTA11Frbf0ju1mgTLUwNd2Vq-GYWTA0-UeE1UVkzX3BHSjmUi68Yj8y_LHk6cOc7Vo4RN9yLo4vneU0pNmThqCHGkHXPOrFsLsRPnPKzE0-rPgIAAP__S3mJ7g) on Friday honoring the victims of the Robb Elementary School shooting in May 2022. The new school, Legacy Elementary, replaces Robb and is slated to begin classes on Oct. 20. Legacy is a two-story campus featuring a [crafted oak tree with two large branches and 19 smaller branches,](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1q7DAUhJ9G7mR0ZK-0LlRcuLjbNCGkNPo5tgWytEiKvX774OQR0gwDA8M38_mYHtoHH5c3vaGqrzlNEY8SsFbMU0aX_Y45-12HfEY8vnYdHJaJM36jwCjA5LQP59Q3ThnmBmhQgRQM7qyXQ7MqYwGGmxZMOy6MNRZQ3gcEaSR2Alnj1VUGDAAuES1zw2wEzFbqzujbQHqGzteU27pixZcuczjTjrm1aWuCWmt9FtL9I3wkfNTGXgvaJV0x4ePHO-HjLzdNT4yFRjwoBtwwVp1PWuyaUqBriin7uNCyplQvs3tb_VYIH0tN-STd6B3p_gMX_QXaNVm55-FD8EVI0rNl0z78QNW_Xbkr_h0AAP__rd6KZg) memorializing the two teachers and 19 students killed in the mass shooting. Friday’s ribbon-cutting ceremony also included 21 seconds of silence in honor of the victims. At the ceremony school board president Laura Perez said, “ _This school is not about forgetting but remembering with dignity, rebuilding with courage, and choosing to believe in the future even when the past still hurts._ "
## Texas-OU Set for Red River Rivalry Game
The 121st annual Red River Rivalry (formerly the Red River Shootout) football match between the Texas Longhorns and Oklahoma Sooners [kicks off at 2:30 p.m. today](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8Gd0RAHDsuKLZx97bd0hqbIaA3Zp7wrEn-fpX8wja3ObpXV-fP1_IFmXJ5_IYdvTwjLwXbQSiCdakYaj6x1nwC1VfB9vcECngszribtkZbuwTI9Fr6LvjVhMl26O04GHs3_Th1yU_RuO02rvc-3IKLcRymOF2DvUewdrTQZf8es8Za-47hYsIU18HGbYTrCrdJ9QZDFq4XSSj4hCPSi0-sl433jnwS-TnU9Zdys3Jza-1y5DdSbt6YCB-o3PzpKTdHZlmBSLk5cdPCuoFsSX-4Ji6PxLUcWuAbNRfN3wSJd9C5aEmoNxbholdu1FUfflomyscwqt48dsj0-ST_Z_L07l8AAAD__155i4w) from the Cotton Bowl in Dallas, which has served as the game’s historic home since 1932. Texas comes into the game with a 3-2 record. After starting the season ranked No. 1, the Longhorns fell out of the AP Top 25 entirely following their loss to unranked Florida last weekend. Star quarterback Arch Manning is [still working to prove himself](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2y3CAQhE-DMm0NrFY_gQInZM-pQ9UAw4oyAhlmpafbu-QrOOlOurq7vl9fyxeGGNL7J24087fPS6KzRmKmshRyJRxUSjgwlivR-TkwOqqLAvVqJbRSLg5DvJaucbMBN8mGZjn0IEfohqlZ5x66pyRvZG98Z003gXWDI3Q4dL4fqQnzXSZBSnlL_wA3edNLbwd8GnxNogNygXN58EpM31h9vPJB5WHz1sR5Zd6reP4QSgulz_N8fCpydnjdAaF05Vyu2_dcuAqlk0X0Qul7WCgtQSgNo1Da5hjpTa3PmQ3G2P75YGEqBu3v1oWK-55D4o0S1xaLXdsNUwrpLZQe-9cgR5gABqF0U2a3nyHGUPtBdPDeMMR_h_n_MB-z-hsAAP__XiiSaA). No. 6 Oklahoma is undefeated so far, having struck gold with transfer quarterback John Mateer, who was was one of the [favorites in the Heisman race](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD3O3CAURVeDOyx44z8KijR0kzal9QyPMRpsLCD2ePfRZAtfc5srHR2dP8_5iSGG_fUbN9L149O801Ui1Up5zuRyOCnncGLM907X3xOjozKDgJ5LwaWcHYZ4z13j9CKckg1pOQ5CTqIbVbPqUUykRi-UffTeLosk36MYOpyEHEFRE_QXJoWU8jtDK5zyyyC9HfGxYK9YJ8iFmnJbV6r0weLjnU7KrU1bE_Va61HY4xcDw8Bc19VSOfbvycDYFCO9iPuU6oIxMjClpnwzMDMDExwD0w0w9aCAgdmwEmW-kH3zim_iHs-UQ6XC00E7XymUDXee0VKTtTuuEGMow8g68dowxP9O9WclTw3_AgAA__8GYokX) before fracturing his hand a month ago. The expectation is that he'll play today, but it'll be a game-time decision. Oddsmakers [favor Texas](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOtCAUBeCnwQ7DRQUpKP7Gbv52S3MHriNZlAmwzvj2G-cVtjnVyXeS83Wbbxhi2B__cSNb30uad3qVSLVSnjP5HA7KORwY87nT6-fA6KnMUsiBg-AAs8cQz7lvvL0Lb6AhC1oJGEWvTbNa7Tzg0BkzamdIenBuwRFVN3ZIUusm2AsDAQBXqFZ4s9wVLE5jd8fBsF6QDzXltq5U6Y1liWc6KLcubU20a63Pwrp_TE5MTuWZci3tiWtKV4HJCXMNLhKT05644uk74po25EfhH47DAJ0cxkG1a91ik61_vkKMoSjNevHYMMTPVv3bQ4eVvwEAAP__Ni57PA) in the contest, but that could depend on whether Mateer is good to go today in what remains one of the greatest rivalries in college sports.

subject: Jared Golden Criticizes Fellow Lawmakers for Shutting Down Government Over “Normal Policy Debate”
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Jared Golden Criticizes Fellow Lawmakers for Shutting Down Government Over “Normal Policy Debate” (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=800ddedb8d&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Libby Palanza on Oct 11, 2025 06:52 am
Maine Democrat Rep. Jared Golden issued a lengthy Substack post on Friday morning urging lawmakers in Washington to end the federal shutdown. In doing so, Rep. Golden pushed back against the narrative that reopening the government is necessarily contingent upon the left and right reaching an agreement over extending an enhanced tax credit. The expanded [...]

A federal judge ruled Thursday to temporarily block President Donald Trump from deploying the National Guard in Chicago, Illinois. As a result of this, the federal government will be prohibited for at least a fourteen day period from sending National Guard troops into Chicago. Although the order is set to expire at midnight on October [...]

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter -- Government Shutdown: 11 Days
body:
|

---
Dear friends and neighbors,

We are now 11 days into this federal government shutdown. Make no mistake about it -- Republicans have the keys to the kingdom. They control the White House and have majorities in the United States Senate and House of Representatives. They decided to shut down this government. Everything we've felt in these last 9 months is because of their calculated and deliberate actions.

This has been their plan from the beginning. Republicans have said they want our patriotic federal workers to be traumatized. And just yesterday, they announced they are planning [another round of firings](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.washingtonpost.com%2fbusiness%2f2025%2f10%2f10%2ftrump-federal-workers-layoffs-government-shutdown%2f%3futm_campaign%3dwp_main%26utm_source%3dbluesky%2cfacebook%2cthreads%2ctwitter%26utm_medium%3dsocial&redir_log=427530293951357). Republicans shut down the government because they don't want people to be able to afford health care. Now, they're firing patriotic civil servants because what? They don't want Americans to have jobs?! This Administration has a particular disdain for the very people who make sure our grandparents get their Social Security, who make sure our veterans get the care they need, who make sure our food and water are safe.

They are asking Democrats to vote to let them continue what they are doing. That is not an option. This month, countless Marylanders have begun to receive notice that their health insurance costs are going up. That's what Republicans have accomplished in these first 9 months -- raising health care costs, along with everything else. What we know is that millions of Americans will lose their health care in the next year, and millions more will see their premiums increase.

For example, a couple in Salisbury, Maryland will pay $1,100 more per month for health care. We can't afford to live like this.

Republicans would rather shut down the government than lower health care costs for Americans. I have voted multiple times to reopen the government and extend the ACA tax credits to prevent massive hikes in health care costs. Republicans have refused.

Next week, more people who serve this country, including our brave military members, will begin missing a paycheck. Yet Republicans in the House have been out of town for weeks, refusing to vote to reopen the government. It's a disgrace.

I will continue to fight, alongside my colleagues, to reopen this government and put a stop to the cruelty Republicans continue to inflict upon Marylanders. And I will continue to work to minimize the impact on those who can least afford it.

**Share Your Story**

We know government shutdowns can be very difficult for Marylanders, particularly for civil servants and their families. We also know how many of you want to see Democrats fight for your health care - which I am committed to doing. As I continue to meet with Marylanders, I also want to hear directly from you about how this shutdown is affecting you, your family, or someone you love. I'm going to keep sharing your stories. Tell us your story [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fforms.gle%2f1Fm2HT3XVwtDgUu18&redir_log=648644667522229).

**Federal Government Shutdown Resources and FAQs**

My office remains open during the shutdown to answer questions and provide guidance on federal matters. You can visit alsobrooks.senate.gov/shutdown or call one of our offices: DC: 202-224-4524
Bowie: 301-860-0414
Rockville: 240-599-7390
Easton: 410-546-4250
Baltimore: 410-962-4436

Over 269,000 federal employees living in Maryland will be impacted by this Republican government shutdown. Our website, [alsobrooks.senate.gov/shutdown](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2falsobrooks.senate.gov%2fshutdown&redir_log=66116639934267) will be updated as we learn more.

**FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS**
_This information will continue to be updated._

WILL FEDERAL WORKERS AND CONTRACTORS BE PAID DURING THE SHUTDOWN?
* Federal employees will not receive paychecks during a government shutdown. However, because of legislation my predecessor Senator Ben Cardin and Maryland's Senior Senator Chris Van Hollen shepherded into law after the 2019 Trump shutdown, federal workers are guaranteed to automatically receive back pay when the government reopens. Unfortunately, this backpay is not guaranteed for federal contract workers. I have worked alongside Senators Van Hollen and Blumenthal to right this wrong and ensure federal contract workers are paid.

WHAT IS A GOVERNMENT SHUTDOWN?
* According to the Congressional Research Service, when federal government agencies and programs lack budget authority after the expiration of either full-year or interim appropriations, they experience a "funding gap."
* Under the Antideficiency Act (31 U.S.C. §§1341 et seq.), they must cease operations, except in certain circumstances when continued activities are authorized by law. When there is a funding gap that affects many federal entities, the situation is often referred to as a government shutdown.
* Due to the lapse in funding, many Federal agencies may have to furlough workers and would have limited capacity to work on cases.
* However, my office remains open and ready to assist you.
* Due to the shutdown, depending on decisions from the Trump Administration, some Federal agencies may not begin working on your case immediately, but our office will do our best to get you the assistance you need in a timely manner.

WILL I STILL RECEIVE MY SOCIAL SECURITY BENEFITS?
* Yes, according to the Social Security Administration, recipients will continue to receive Social Security benefits and SSI checks.

WILL I STILL RECEIVE MY MEDICARE AND/OR MEDICAID BENEFITS?
* Yes, Medicare and Medicaid recipients will still receive benefits.
However, you will not be able to get a new or replacement Medicare card, and benefit verifications will stop.

WILL THE CHILDREN'S HEALTH INSURANCE PROGRAM (CHIP) BE AFFECTED?
* No. According to CMS's FY26 contingency plan, CMS will maintain the staff necessary to make payments for the Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP).

WILL I STILL RECEIVE MY VETERANS' BENEFITS?
* Per VA guidance, the following will not be impacted by the shutdown:
VA Medical Centers, Outpatient Clinics, and Vet Centers will be open as usual and providing all services.
* VA benefits will continue to be processed and delivered, including compensation, pension, education, and housing benefits.
* Burials will continue at VA national cemeteries. Applications for headstones, markers, and burial benefits processing will continue.
* The Board of Veterans' Appeals will continue decisions on Veterans' cases.
* Call Centers: The VA's primary call center (1-800-MyVA411) and the Veterans Crisis Line (Dial 988, Press 1) are open 24/7.

_Per VA guidance, the following services will be impacted:_
* VA will not provide Veteran career counseling or transition assistance program activities.
* Call Centers: The GI Bill Hotline (1-888-GIBILL-1) will be closed and National Cemetery Applicant Assistance (1-800-697-6947) hotline will be closed.
* VA benefits regional offices will be closed.
* VA will cease public affairs and outreach to Veterans, including social media, VetResources emails, and responses to press inquiries.
* VA will not permanently place headstones or maintain the grounds at VA national cemeteries.
* VA will not process applications for pre-need burials at VA cemeteries.
* VA will not print new presidential memorial certificates.
* VA will cease outreach to state, county, tribal, municipal, faith-based, and community-based partners by the VA Central Office.

For more information, please [visit the VA's website here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fdepartment.va.gov%2fcontingency-planning%2f&redir_log=258908356363333).

WILL ACTIVE-DUTY SERVICEMEMBERS BE PAID?
* According to Department of Defense guidance, active duty servicemembers do not receive their paychecks during a shutdown but will continue working as they are deemed "essential."
* Servicemembers will receive back pay, but paycheck deposits will be delayed.
* If you live in base housing, your services will remain intact.
* Schools operated by the Department of Defense Education Activity (DoDEA) will remain open.
* On-base Child Development Centers will close on a case-by-case basis. Please check locally for closures.
* Civilian personnel who are necessary to carry out expected activities will continue to work, but also will not be paid, and some civilian personnel will be furloughed without pay.
* USAA offers [interest-free loans](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.usaa.com%2finet%2fwc%2fent-gov-shutdown-assistance-landing-mkt&redir_log=75513517742480) and Navy Federal Credit Union offers [paycheck assistance](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.navyfederal.org%2fabout%2fpress-releases%2f2024%2fnavy-federal-offers-paycheck-relief-to-members-impacted-by-government-shutdown.html&redir_log=397786780427962) to servicemembers and DoD civilians during a shutdown.

WHAT HAPPENS TO SNAP/WIC BENEFITS?
* USDA will continue to administer the SNAP program.
* WIC operations will continue, though the program is low on funds and participants could experience disruptions if a shutdown lasts longer than a week, according to the National WIC Association.

WILL HEAD START PROGRAMS CLOSE?
* Most Head Start programs are not expected to be impacted by the Federal shutdown.

WHAT HAPPENS TO FEDERAL LOANS DURING A SHUTDOWN?
* The Pell Grant and Federal Direct Student Loan programs are considered mandatory, meaning the programs can still make payments during a shutdown.
However, staff may be furloughed, so assistance may be delayed.

WHAT HAPPENS TO PROGRAMS WITHIN THE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE?
* According to USDA, the Department will continue operations related to: certain farm loan processing items, certain natural resource and conservation programs, core nutrition safety net programs, essential food safety operations (inspections and laboratory work) to protect public health, responding to and preparing for wildland fires, activities supported by user fees (including grading, assessment, inspection, import and export), animal and plant health emergency programs (including new world screwworm, highly pathogenic avian influenza, exotic fruit flies, African swine fever, and rabies), Section 521 Rental Assistance Program outlays of prior obligations, human resource policies and systems, critical IT infrastructure and cybersecurity, emergency operations, and national defense and homeland security readiness.
* According to USDA, the Department will cease operations related to: payment processing, disaster assistance processing, technical assistance, contracts and agreements not related to exempted programs, financial management beyond funds management, regulatory work, travel, trainings, trade negotiations, timber sales, hazardous fuels treatments, special use permits, surveys for high-risk plant pests and diseases for certain swine, cattle, and aquatic animal diseases, long-term studies and research on animal diseases, research and report publications, website updates, data products, and the majority of Risk Management Agency, Natural Resources Conservation Service, Foreign Agricultural Service, Food and Nutrition Service, National Institute of Food and Agriculture, Economic Research Service, National Agricultural Statistical Service, Rural Development, and Staff Office activities.
* For more information about specific agencies, the USDA plan can be [viewed here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.usda.gov%2fsites%2fdefault%2ffiles%2fdocuments%2ffy2026-usda-lapse-plan.pdf&redir_log=453019633994529).

HOW IS THE SMALL BUSINESS ADMINISTRATION (SBA) IMPACTED?
* The U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) will pause most new business loan approvals and program support during a government shutdown -- including 7(a) and 504 loans.
* However, SBA's disaster loan processing is expected to continue.
* The SBA has published its "Plan for Operating in the Event of a Lapse in Appropriations - September 2025." For more information, please [visit the SBA's website here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.sba.gov%2fsba-employee-information-shutdown-furlough&redir_log=244887925198446).

WILL TSA SECURITY LINES BE LONGER AT THE AIRPORT?
* Most TSA airport personnel and FAA air traffic controllers would be required to continue working, without pay, during a shutdown.
* However, airports may experience longer-than-usual security lines, so please plan to arrive early for any travel.

CAN I STILL GET A NEW PASSPORT DURING A SHUTDOWN?
* Yes, passport applications will continue to be processed, but please note, response times may be longer than usual.

CAN I STILL GET A GUIDED TOUR OF THE U.S. CAPITOL OR WHITE HOUSE?
* Unfortunately, due to the federal shutdown, all federal buildings will be closed for the duration of the shutdown. If you have a tour booked of the Capitol, Supreme Court, Library of Congress, or Bureau of Engraving and Printing, your tours will be canceled and not automatically rescheduled unless you request to do so. Please contact my office at [tours@alsobrooks.senate.gov](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.alsobrooks.senate.gov%2fservices%2ftour-requests%2f&redir_log=878974634037406) or at 202-224-4524 with any questions.

**Resources Available from the State of Maryland:** The Moore-Miller Administration announced a series of actions to protect Marylanders during the federal government shutdown. You can find more information on those resources [HERE](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fresponse.maryland.gov%2ffederalpublicservants%2fshutdown&redir_log=110651095961436). These resources include:
* [Unemployment Insurance](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2flabor.maryland.gov%2funemployment-insurance%2f&redir_log=37025617561357)
* [Housing Resources](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fresponse.maryland.gov%2ffederalpublicservants%2fhousing-resources&redir_log=444191075939499)
* [Financial assistance and payment flexibility](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fgovernor.maryland.gov%2fnews%2fpress%2fDocuments%2fCreditUnion_Assistance_Shutdown.pdf&redir_log=874987273197613)
* [Resources for Veterans](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fresponse.maryland.gov%2ffederalpublicservants%2fresources-for-veterans&redir_log=09614517417533)

The resources also include loan programs for federal workers, food and cash assistance, and select legal resources. You can find more information on those resources plus additional assistance opportunities [HERE](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fresponse.maryland.gov%2ffederalpublicservants%2fshutdown&redir_log=110651095961436).

Unemployment:
Federal employees and contractors that have been furloughed because of the federal shutdown may file an unemployment claim. Your claim must be filed in the jurisdiction of your duty station. (Please note: If you receive retroactive pay, you will be required to repay all unemployment benefits. Eligibility determinations are made by each unemployment insurance agency.)

Workers with a duty station in Maryland should contact the Maryland Department of Labor, Licensing and Regulation at (410) 853-1700 or click [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2flabor.maryland.gov%2funemployment-insurance%2f&redir_log=37025617561357). You may find this list of [Frequently Asked Questions](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2flabor.maryland.gov%2funemployment-insurance%2fclaimants%2ffederal-employees%2ffrequently-asked-questions.shtml&redir_log=887999654645787) for federal employees on the Department's website helpful. Federal employees who are excepted and continue to work are not eligible for unemployment. I, along with Senator Van Hollen and Congresswoman Elfreth have introduced legislation to expand eligibility to every federal employee.

[United Way's 211.org](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.211.org%2f&redir_log=551546052297128) can direct you to local resources for assistance with housing and utility expenses, food, healthcare, and other emergency situations.

The Maryland Department of Labor also offers a Federal Worker Emergency Loan Program for federal employees recently terminated from their position. More information can be found [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2flabor.maryland.gov%2ffederalworkers%2fFWEloan%2f&redir_log=68485812082349). The Federal Employee Education and Assistance Fund offers [Shutdown Grants](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ffeea.org%2fshutdown%2f%23toggle-id-2&redir_log=933130865581257) for qualifying full-time federal civilian employees. The application will only become available should a shutdown persist beyond the point that federal employees miss all or part of a paycheck.

Utility Assistance:
* BGE [Assistance Resource Finder](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.bge.com%2fmy-account%2fcustomer-support%2fbill-help&redir_log=846267117825404)
* Pepco: [Assistance Programs (Maryland)](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fthesource.pepcoholdings.com%2fexpanded-support-available-during-federal-government-shutdown-3%2f&redir_log=859716136495703)
* WSSC: [Financial Assistance Programs](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.wsscwater.com%2fassistance&redir_log=380993903065259)
* Washington Gas: [Energy Assistance Programs](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.washingtongas.com%2fget-assistance%2fenergy-assistance&redir_log=355951803248443)
* Potomac Edison: [Energy Assistance Programs](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.firstenergycorp.com%2fcontent%2fdam%2fcustomer%2fbillinserts%2f2023-05%2520MD%2520Energy%2520Assistance%25200523.pdf&redir_log=782621310575711)

Financial Institution Guidance: The Federal Housing Administration has called on lenders to be sensitive to the financial hardships experienced by borrowers because of the shutdown. This includes offering forbearance agreements (agreeing to delay foreclosure), waiving late fees, and other options. Please contact your financial institution for specifics. Many banks, credit unions and mortgage companies are offering services to federal workers that are customers and members facing financial difficulty due to the shutdown. These services can include reversing fees, offering low-interest loans and due date extensions.

* The [Navy Federal Credit Union ](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.navyfederal.org%2fabout%2fgovernment-shutdown.php%3fintcmp%3dhp%257Ccont%257C4%257Cclns%257Cshutdown%257Cgovshutdown%257C12%2f22%2f2018%257C%257C%257C&redir_log=815287163708845)is offering interest-free shutdown loan assistance to members and other federal government employees.
* The [Congressional Federal Credit Union](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.congressionalfcu.org%2floans%2fpersonal-loans%2ffurlough-solutions&redir_log=707528381395518) is offering interest-free Furlough Relief loans for eligible members during the shutdown.
* The [U.S. Employees Credit Union](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.myusecu.org%2fhome&redir_log=558262161358199) is offering interest-free shutdown loans to eligible members.

Some local credit unions are offering assistance during the shutdown. If you belong to a credit union, please contact them to find out if they are offering any assistance.

Federal Student Aid:
* The Federal Employee Education and Assistance Fund offers emergency loans to federal employees. More [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=15570.12623191.5692962.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ffeea.org%2four-programs%2femergency-loans%2f%23hardships&redir_log=526796067056396).

**Stay in the Fight ** We will not give up. I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office, connect with us, or follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER.

Sincerely,

Angela D. Alsobrooks
United States Senator

Call Centers: The GI Bill Hotline (1-888-GIBILL-1) will be closed and National Cemetery Applicant Assistance (1-800-697-6947) hotline will be closed. VA benefits regional offices will be closed. VA will cease public affairs and outreach to Veterans, including social media, VetResources emails, and responses to press inquiries. VA will not permanently place headstones or maintain the grounds at VA national cemeteries. VA will not process applications for pre-need burials at VA cemeteries. VA will not print new presidential memorial certificates. VA will cease outreach to state, county, tribal, municipal, faith-based, and community-based partners by the VA Central Office. For more information, please . WILL ACTIVE-DUTY SERVICEMEMBERS BE PAID? According to Department of Defense guidance, active duty servicemembers do not receive their paychecks during a shutdown but will continue working as they are deemed "essential." Servicemembers will receive back pay, but paycheck deposits will be delayed. If you live in base housing, your services will remain intact. Schools operated by the Department of Defense Education Activity (DoDEA) will remain open. On-base Child Development Centers will close on a case-by-case basis. Please check locally for closures. Civilian personnel who are necessary to carry out expected activities will continue to work, but also will not be paid, and some civilian personnel will be furloughed without pay. USAA offers and Navy Federal Credit Union offers to servicemembers and DoD civilians during a shutdown. WHAT HAPPENS TO SNAP/WIC BENEFITS? USDA will continue to administer the SNAP program. WIC operations will continue, though the program is low on funds and participants could experience disruptions if a shutdown lasts longer than a week, according to the National WIC Association. WILL HEAD START PROGRAMS CLOSE? Most Head Start programs are not expected to be impacted by the Federal shutdown. WHAT HAPPENS TO FEDERAL LOANS DURING A SHUTDOWN? The Pell Grant and Federal Direct Student Loan programs are considered mandatory, meaning the programs can still make payments during a shutdown. However, staff may be furloughed, so assistance may be delayed. WHAT HAPPENS TO PROGRAMS WITHIN THE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE? According to USDA, the Department will continue operations related to: certain farm loan processing items, certain natural resource and conservation programs, core nutrition safety net programs, essential food safety operations (inspections and laboratory work) to protect public health, responding to and preparing for wildland fires, activities supported by user fees (including grading, assessment, inspection, import and export), animal and plant health emergency programs (including new world screwworm, highly pathogenic avian influenza, exotic fruit flies, African swine fever, and rabies), Section 521 Rental Assistance Program outlays of prior obligations, human resource policies and systems, critical IT infrastructure and cybersecurity, emergency operations, and national defense and homeland security readiness. According to USDA, the Department will cease operations related to: payment processing, disaster assistance processing, technical assistance, contracts and agreements not related to exempted programs, financial management beyond funds management, regulatory work, travel, trainings, trade negotiations, timber sales, hazardous fuels treatments, special use permits, surveys for high-risk plant pests and diseases for certain swine, cattle, and aquatic animal diseases, long-term studies and research on animal diseases, research and report publications, website updates, data products, and the majority of Risk Management Agency, Natural Resources Conservation Service, Foreign Agricultural Service, Food and Nutrition Service, National Institute of Food and Agriculture, Economic Research Service, National Agricultural Statistical Service, Rural Development, and Staff Office activities. For more information about specific agencies, the USDA plan can be . HOW IS THE SMALL BUSINESS ADMINISTRATION (SBA) IMPACTED? The U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) will pause most new business loan approvals and program support during a government shutdown -- including 7(a) and 504 loans. However, SBA's disaster loan processing is expected to continue. The SBA has published its "Plan for Operating in the Event of a Lapse in Appropriations - September 2025." For more information, please . WILL TSA SECURITY LINES BE LONGER AT THE AIRPORT? Most TSA airport personnel and FAA air traffic controllers would be required to continue working, without pay, during a shutdown. However, airports may experience longer-than-usual security lines, so please plan to arrive early for any travel. CAN I STILL GET A NEW PASSPORT DURING A SHUTDOWN? Yes, passport applications will continue to be processed, but please note, response times may be longer than usual. CAN I STILL GET A GUIDED TOUR OF THE U.S. CAPITOL OR WHITE HOUSE? Unfortunately, due to the federal shutdown, all federal buildings will be closed for the duration of the shutdown. If you have a tour booked of the Capitol, Supreme Court, Library of Congress, or Bureau of Engraving and Printing, your tours will be canceled and not automatically rescheduled unless you request to do so. Please contact my office at or at 202-224-4524 with any questions. Resources Available from the State of Maryland: The Moore-Miller Administration announced a series of actions to protect Marylanders during the federal government shutdown. You can find more information on those resources . These resources include: The resources also include loan programs for federal workers, food and cash assistance, and select legal resources. You can find more information on those resources plus additional assistance opportunities . Unemployment: Federal employees and contractors that have been furloughed because of the federal shutdown may file an unemployment claim. Your claim must be filed in the jurisdiction of your duty station. (Please note: If you receive retroactive pay, you will be required to repay all unemployment benefits. Eligibility determinations are made by each unemployment insurance agency.) Workers with a duty station in Maryland should contact the Maryland Department of Labor, Licensing and Regulation at (410) 853-1700 or click . You may find this list of for federal employees on the Department's website helpful. Federal employees who are excepted and continue to work are not eligible for unemployment. I, along with Senator Van Hollen and Congresswoman Elfreth have introduced legislation to expand eligibility to every federal employee. can direct you to local resources for assistance with housing and utility expenses, food, healthcare, and other emergency situations. The Maryland Department of Labor also offers a Federal Worker Emergency Loan Program for federal employees recently terminated from their position. More information can be found . The Federal Employee Education and Assistance Fund offers for qualifying full-time federal civilian employees. The application will only become available should a shutdown persist beyond the point that federal employees miss all or part of a paycheck. Utility Assistance: BGE Pepco: WSSC: Washington Gas: Potomac Edison: Financial Institution Guidance: The Federal Housing Administration has called on lenders to be sensitive to the financial hardships experienced by borrowers because of the shutdown. This includes offering forbearance agreements (agreeing to delay foreclosure), waiving late fees, and other options. Please contact your financial institution for specifics. Many banks, credit unions and mortgage companies are offering services to federal workers that are customers and members facing financial difficulty due to the shutdown. These services can include reversing fees, offering low-interest loans and due date extensions. The offering interest-free shutdown loan assistance to members and other federal government employees. The is offering interest-free Furlough Relief loans for eligible members during the shutdown. The is offering interest-free shutdown loans to eligible members. Some local credit unions are offering assistance during the shutdown. If you belong to a credit union, please contact them to find out if they are offering any assistance. Federal Student Aid: The Federal Employee Education and Assistance Fund offers emergency loans to federal employees. More . Stay in the Fight We will not give up. I ask that you continue to fight alongside us. Please continue to reach out to us. You can call the office, connect with us, or follow us on Bluesky, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, YouTube, and X. We are in this TOGETHER. Sincerely, Angela D. Alsobrooks United States Senator

name: Tom Holbert, American Veteran Center
subject: Buy a veteran a beer today
body:

| | |

At this year's 28th annual **American Valor Conference** in November, veterans from World War II, Korea, Vietnam, and the War on Terror will gather in Washington, D.C. to share their stories with the next generation of cadets and midshipmen. During the conference our heroes will gather for a special evening reception. After a day of powerful storytelling, they'll have the chance to relax, reconnect, and raise a glass in camaraderie. **And you can be the one who makes that toast possible.** **[Patriot, with a gift of just $10, you can buy a veteran a beer... or give $25, $50, or more to raise a glass with many more heroes.](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyckbGu2zoMhp9G3hyIkizbg4d7G2Q7XTsKFMUkQm0plWQX5-0Loym6d-X3k_g_8NuH-8C4xvT4ihsv5F2pzu-feHDjggk9c2k54KdTUg09yB7gzKSMBznowkIzK-NNxwuMVsKkQZnuuWgzzXa2drbajkwTDB5GCzCpwEjSdHE5L4IEADCDkhd_t2Cn0c8TGA_khZEcYsvlQjlVLge2eLAvGQNhbZfErVuXZ2uvKvR_Qt2EulWmvfAFE4fcLpQ3oW64cYmEqX871Z44NS4nUpPyeph7yRJ6Mw_Y491PvbyPBochWNYk9K3mvRA7yoGFvn75f1TjNAtl97a5jUPcN6GvvGFc38PfC0Jfn1gC1u8O6ccbEW4vjI8k9PX0d5jSjqujnO5cOBH_yeXUODWhr-hd49qcf5PGZftboytLeP2M6xqrHYWRj7PGad61f3jnsahfAQAA__8YWq2B)**

The American Veterans Center (AVC) preserves and promotes the legacy of America's veterans -- from the Greatest Generation to today's warriors. Through oral histories, educational initiatives, and hosting the National Memorial Day Parade and our annual American Valor Conference and televised gala, **AVC ensures veterans ' stories are remembered and passed down and their legacies of service and sacrifice are never forgotten.**
---
[](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyckbGu2zoMhp9G3hyIkizbg4d7G2Q7XTsKFMUkQm0plWQX5-0Loym6d-X3k_g_8NuH-8C4xvT4ihsv5F2pzu-feHDjggk9c2k54KdTUg09yB7gzKSMBznowkIzK-NNxwuMVsKkQZnuuWgzzXa2drbajkwTDB5GCzCpwEjSdHE5L4IEADCDkhd_t2Cn0c8TGA_khZEcYsvlQjlVLge2eLAvGQNhbZfErVuXZ2uvKvR_Qt2EulWmvfAFE4fcLpQ3oW64cYmEqX871Z44NS4nUpPyeph7yRJ6Mw_Y491PvbyPBochWNYk9K3mvRA7yoGFvn75f1TjNAtl97a5jUPcN6GvvGFc38PfC0Jfn1gC1u8O6ccbEW4vjI8k9PX0d5jSjqujnO5cOBH_yeXUODWhr-hd49qcf5PGZftboytLeP2M6xqrHYWRj7PGad61f3jnsahfAQAA__8YWq2B)

The American Valor Conference is where America's heroes gather to share their stories with one another and the next generation of military leaders. Through panels, keynotes, and our nationally televised gala _American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes_ , the conference preserves stories of sacrifice while inspiring tomorrow's leaders. When you give, you're buying a beer, yes -- but you're joining a mission that connects Americans to their heroes in ways both symbolic and unforgettable. **Patriot, this simple gesture carries enormous meaning.** A cold beer at the end of the day becomes a toast to freedom, service, and sacrifice. _And your gift makes it possible._ **[Please, Patriot, make your most generous gift today to buy a beer or for a veteran who deserves to know they are not forgotten.](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyckbGu2zoMhp9G3hyIkizbg4d7G2Q7XTsKFMUkQm0plWQX5-0Loym6d-X3k_g_8NuH-8C4xvT4ihsv5F2pzu-feHDjggk9c2k54KdTUg09yB7gzKSMBznowkIzK-NNxwuMVsKkQZnuuWgzzXa2drbajkwTDB5GCzCpwEjSdHE5L4IEADCDkhd_t2Cn0c8TGA_khZEcYsvlQjlVLge2eLAvGQNhbZfErVuXZ2uvKvR_Qt2EulWmvfAFE4fcLpQ3oW64cYmEqX871Z44NS4nUpPyeph7yRJ6Mw_Y491PvbyPBochWNYk9K3mvRA7yoGFvn75f1TjNAtl97a5jUPcN6GvvGFc38PfC0Jfn1gC1u8O6ccbEW4vjI8k9PX0d5jSjqujnO5cOBH_yeXUODWhr-hd49qcf5PGZftboytLeP2M6xqrHYWRj7PGad61f3jnsahfAQAA__8YWq2B)** Of course, if you'd like to go further, you can also sponsor a meal for a veteran -- $50 for one meal, $100 for two, $250 for a table.
---
[ **Buy a Beer for a Veteran Today**](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyckbGu2zoMhp9G3hyIkizbg4d7G2Q7XTsKFMUkQm0plWQX5-0Loym6d-X3k_g_8NuH-8C4xvT4ihsv5F2pzu-feHDjggk9c2k54KdTUg09yB7gzKSMBznowkIzK-NNxwuMVsKkQZnuuWgzzXa2drbajkwTDB5GCzCpwEjSdHE5L4IEADCDkhd_t2Cn0c8TGA_khZEcYsvlQjlVLge2eLAvGQNhbZfErVuXZ2uvKvR_Qt2EulWmvfAFE4fcLpQ3oW64cYmEqX871Z44NS4nUpPyeph7yRJ6Mw_Y491PvbyPBochWNYk9K3mvRA7yoGFvn75f1TjNAtl97a5jUPcN6GvvGFc38PfC0Jfn1gC1u8O6ccbEW4vjI8k9PX0d5jSjqujnO5cOBH_yeXUODWhr-hd49qcf5PGZftboytLeP2M6xqrHYWRj7PGad61f3jnsahfAQAA__8YWq2B)

Moments like these shape lives, Patriot. At last year's conference, a cadet from Texas A&M called the experience of sharing a pint with WWII heroes "_truly inspirational -- something I will never forget._" At nearly every meal, young cadets will sit side-by-side with World War II heroes, listening to stories of Normandy, Iwo Jima, and the Chosin Reservoir - _thanks to you. _ At the evening reception, post-9/11 veterans will raise a glass in fellowship - _thanks to you._ **These simple moments carry a profound message: America remembers, honors, and thanks her veterans - and inspires the next generation to follow in their footsteps.** **[Please, Patriot, make your most generous gift of $10, $50, $100, or even $250 to sponsor a meal for veterans before the conference begins.](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyckbGu2zoMhp9G3hyIkizbg4d7G2Q7XTsKFMUkQm0plWQX5-0Loym6d-X3k_g_8NuH-8C4xvT4ihsv5F2pzu-feHDjggk9c2k54KdTUg09yB7gzKSMBznowkIzK-NNxwuMVsKkQZnuuWgzzXa2drbajkwTDB5GCzCpwEjSdHE5L4IEADCDkhd_t2Cn0c8TGA_khZEcYsvlQjlVLge2eLAvGQNhbZfErVuXZ2uvKvR_Qt2EulWmvfAFE4fcLpQ3oW64cYmEqX871Z44NS4nUpPyeph7yRJ6Mw_Y491PvbyPBochWNYk9K3mvRA7yoGFvn75f1TjNAtl97a5jUPcN6GvvGFc38PfC0Jfn1gC1u8O6ccbEW4vjI8k9PX0d5jSjqujnO5cOBH_yeXUODWhr-hd49qcf5PGZftboytLeP2M6xqrHYWRj7PGad61f3jnsahfAQAA__8YWq2B)**

| | Fellow Conservative, I don't say this lightly, but it's God's honest truth... Right now, the Democrats are the party of anger and rage. They hate President Trump, plain and simple. **And make no mistake, that will translate at the ballot box.** _Yes, President Trump and Republicans are delivering victory after victory ..._ _Yes, we are winning on truly every key issue with voters ..._ _Yes, we are more popular than the Democrats ..._ **But at the end of the day, if the anger and hatred among the Left translates to voter enthusiasm and turnout**** _(_**_**_and it already is!_**_**_)_****, then nothing else will matter.** Sadly, this **"enthusiasm gap** " among our voters and the Democrats is the uphill battle we're facing for the midterms. And it's not looking good, Fellow Conservative. Special election after special election, Republicans are getting TROUNCED this year in voter turnout! name: Storm clouds
subject: The deep breath before the plunge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
MAGA has 3 Democratic judges on the PA Supreme Court in their crosshairs. According to the GOP, “In November, when we knock off all three, it’ll be a pretty big deal.” Let’s stop them in their tracks.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kg9KbhBOHUOzeVWdrRn7--xzwjLllu7q8XLfai3-rmrrh7WmpnU30-zbUbt2eAiCDBDn98to9xynjqX0VSMg9GNYlJJ5JVPfWPfi3-5G0Ig9R0EkGuAfbTV9a9hPGkhYOqh5G2SUH2qWMaDlRng-Lot0Xh6rApGiCbeqZ8gSay98whoY-wis2o6glYUkqNVSxGUU0TVDWvUp0_OhhV6cOTUMPyU9KZqykFXLoj5x5pE=&c=W4YzIHoftoDihHP69Dd8pwFr6Wg8db2FmwU9HxJ8fwYfUJS5i4h3Hw==&ch=t3wdJTTLtCbeBs_yRsE53a-8kaKgOuIDLzDG9-Q37XLX2BTLKegclg==)
---
| Peter,
Courts across the nation are restraining Trump's worst authoritarian impulses. Judges have ruled against Trump's deployment of the National Guard and the U.S. military against American citizens and "blue" cities. Judges have ruled that even Trump's tariffs are illegal.
Because of this, judges have become top targets for MAGA as they look to tear down every guardrail and check on Trump's power.
Many have been targeted with violence, including a judge in South Carolina who just saw her home burned to the ground after she stopped Trump's DOJ from illegally accessing voter data.
MAGA has judges and judicial races in their crosshairs--and nowhere is this more ominous and more urgent than in Pennsylvania, where voters will decide this November whether to retain 3 Democratic judges on the state's highest court.
---
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kg9KbhBOHUOzeVWdrRn7--xzwjLllu7q8XLfai3-rmrrh7WmpnU30-zbUbt2eAiCDBDn98to9xynjqX0VSMg9GNYlJJ5JVPfWPfi3-5G0Ig9R0EkGuAfbTV9a9hPGkhYOqh5G2SUH2qWMaDlRng-Lot0Xh6rApGiCbeqZ8gSay98whoY-wis2o6glYUkqNVSxGUU0TVDWvUp0_OhhV6cOWEoK2RCQSJ6iBkRIBMVNUU=&c=W4YzIHoftoDihHP69Dd8pwFr6Wg8db2FmwU9HxJ8fwYfUJS5i4h3Hw==&ch=t3wdJTTLtCbeBs_yRsE53a-8kaKgOuIDLzDG9-Q37XLX2BTLKegclg==)
---
Storm clouds are forming overhead as the dark forces that helped deliver Trump the presidency for a second time in 2024 are gathering once again to take out 3 Democratic judges on the PA Supreme Court in a single stroke.
And with only three weeks left, time is running out to save these judges and stop MAGA from dismantling PA's last line of defense against Trump's unprecedented power grab.
Only you can stop this. This team, and everyone in this fight, are the frontline of resistance to MAGA taking control of America's most important swing state ahead of the Midterm and 2028 presidential election.
[We need you now more than ever--we cannot afford to pause our ground game at any time in these last days as MAGA is going all-in here to win on November 4. Can you send in much-needed reinforcements to keep our voter contact team going 24/7 in these final weeks?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kg9KbhBOHUOzeVWdrRn7--xzwjLllu7q8XLfai3-rmrrh7WmpnU30-zbUbt2eAiCd3hVDSu5gBX2ppQKT8t7KGU9qH33zLh8QE3QZHcVFIM__-IixnJlbGcwEydpiWYbP1Kvm4O0Bsg-DOEJW8lXbJ3jPzeBjDUP8WlAPLUEVECPVm_bDgGpx-qj_fDAfPVbeDERlINZ1hr_LS0euATrBNn--1Xzs3GUDp2V7XyKxb-DRe5L69Ikww==&c=W4YzIHoftoDihHP69Dd8pwFr6Wg8db2FmwU9HxJ8fwYfUJS5i4h3Hw==&ch=t3wdJTTLtCbeBs_yRsE53a-8kaKgOuIDLzDG9-Q37XLX2BTLKegclg==)

clean_body: MAGA has 3 Democratic judges on the PA Supreme Court in their crosshairs. According to the GOP, “In November, when we knock off all three, it’ll be a pretty big deal.” Let’s stop them in their tracks. | | | | | == | Peter, Courts across the nation are restraining Trump's worst authoritarian impulses. Judges have ruled against Trump's deployment of the National Guard and the U.S. military against American citizens and "blue" cities. Judges have ruled that even Trump's tariffs are illegal. Because of this, judges have become top targets for MAGA as they look to tear down every guardrail and check on Trump's power. Many have been targeted with violence, including a judge in South Carolina who just saw her home burned to the ground after she stopped Trump's DOJ from illegally accessing voter data. MAGA has judges and judicial races in their crosshairs--and nowhere is this more ominous and more urgent than in Pennsylvania, where voters will decide this November whether to retain 3 Democratic judges on the state's highest court. | | | | | == Storm clouds are forming overhead as the dark forces that helped deliver Trump the presidency for a second time in 2024 are gathering once again to take out 3 Democratic judges on the PA Supreme Court in a single stroke. And with only three weeks left, time is running out to save these judges and stop MAGA from dismantling PA's last line of defense against Trump's unprecedented power grab. Only you can stop this. This team, and everyone in this fight, are the frontline of resistance to MAGA taking control of America's most important swing state ahead of the Midterm and 2028 presidential election. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Your support will power this incredible victory on November 4. Dear Friend,
My final trial is closing in.
**An Obama-aligned Attorney General is forcing me into a rigged _state_ trial where President Trump legally can’t save me with a _federal_ pardon.**
In an earlier letter to you, I said that I’ve been left with no pardon, no lifeline, and _no cavalry coming over the hill._
But boy, was I wrong!
Over 1 MILLION Americans signed the “ _People’s Pardon of Rudy W. Giuliani._ ” THANK YOU!
And now, a new report from _The Arizona Republic_ shows the Attorney General is losing ground in her witch hunt against me:
| **Decision time nears: Attorney General Mayes outlines options...**
“...she did not rule out walking away from the high-profile prosecution”
---
**There _was_ a cavalry coming over the hill. It was YOU – the American people.**
But the battle isn’t won yet... Until I am proclaimed a **_FREE_ _MAN_** , until ALL charges are dropped, and until I’m no longer facing _20 YEARS_ IN PRISON, _I will not stop fighting_!
With “decision time” for the Attorney General fast approaching – and a real chance this wrongful prosecution could be dropped – I’m asking YOU to add your name to the public letter to “**FREE RUDY.** ”

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Tariffs – why we will hear a lot more about them
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/tarrifs?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**Remember the tariff debates that dominated Washington just a few months ago? For a while it was the only thing anyone seemed to talk about. **

First tariffs were raised by eyewatering amounts. Then they weren’t. **Eventually, after all sorts of back and forth, we saw tariffs imposed at the highest rates in decades.**
---
|
---
_The US now has the highest tariffs since 1940's._
| Free trade advocates warned of economic catastrophe, while protectionists claimed tariff revenue would fix the deficit. When immediate disaster didn’t strike, the issue seemed to fade – until now.

**Two local stories that caught my eye this week suggest that we are going to hear a lot more about tariffs.**

Agriculture is Mississippi’s largest industry, and soybeans the largest crop. Only a few days ago, U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced $10-15 billion in federal support for soybean farmers, including those in the Mississippi Delta. **Why is the federal government having to support soybean farmers in one of the most fertile places in America? **

Exports have collapsed. China, which once bought over half our soybean crop, now purchases from Brazil due to steep retaliatory tariffs on U.S. soybeans, triggered by U.S. tariffs on Chinese goods.

**In other words, federal funds are now bailing out farmers hurt by federal tariffs.**

A second story that got my attention this week was about grocery prices. **53% of Americans say grocery costs are a major concern, with prices spiking last month at the fastest rate in three years.** I couldn’t help also notice another news item about how coffee prices have jumped 20% in the past year, partly because of a 50% U.S. tariff on Brazilian coffee imports.

It is said that we often tend to overestimate the impact of new technology in the short term and underestimate the impact in the long term. I wonder if the same might be said of tariffs.

**The sky did not fall in when tariffs went up, but the lag effects of the historic hike are only just beginning to be felt by ordinary Americans. **

There may yet be something in what the free traders keep trying to tell us. Defenders of free trade have been reluctant to speak up. I suspect that may be about to change.

**Last month at River Hills, Lord Daniel Hannan certainly made a powerful case for free trade.** Watch it here if you missed it.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ef0183d038&e=5703353baa)
---
_Daniel Hannan makes the case for freedom at River Hills, Jackson._
| By the time of the midterm elections, I suspect millions of Americans will be feeling the effects of tariffs. Tariffs? We are going to hear a lot more about them than some people expect.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=bfd7b46084&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warmest regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

name: Rebecca Hardy
subject: Look how far we’ve come!
body:
| |
---
Freedom wins when we stand together | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY3OTY3OTM3MzE3MDQ2MjI2LFwiclwiOjE2Nzk2Nzk3MjY4NTUxNDMzMn0iLCJzIjoiZTA4ZjA2ZDg1NWY3YzE1NSJ9)

| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY3OTY3OTM3MzI1NDM0ODM1LFwiclwiOjE2Nzk2Nzk3MjY4NTUxNDMzMn0iLCJzIjoiM2Q5ODlhYzNlZmExNjA2MSJ9)
---
|
---
Peter, Ten years ago, a small group of Texas moms stood up to medical tyranny in the halls of our Capitol. We were outnumbered, underestimated, and told our efforts would never make a difference. **_But we fought anyway._** And now, in 2025, Texans for Vaccine Choice is celebrating one of the most victorious years in our movement’s history. Together, we’ve transformed the fight for informed consent and medical liberty—not just here in Texas, but across the nation. With the help of thousands of Texans like you, we secured **key legislative wins** during this year’s legislative sessions:
* **HB 1586:** Families can now download and print exemption forms at home.
* **HB 4076:** Patients can’t be denied organ transplants based on vaccination status.
* **HB 3441:** Vaccine manufacturers can be held liable for harm caused when advertising in Texas.
* **HB 4535:** Requires written informed consent before COVID-19 vaccines are administered.
* **SB 269:** Doctors must report serious vaccine and drug adverse events.
* **SJR 34:** Proposes a constitutional amendment protecting parental medical rights.
* **HB 25:** Makes Ivermectin available without a prescription.

And perhaps just as importantly, _not a single medical tyranny bill was passed this year, maintaining our perfect record of defeating all bad bills since our inception_. **That’s what persistence looks like.** But these victories didn’t happen on their own. They were fueled by Texans who believed that medical freedom is worth fighting for and by those who backed that belief with their support. Today, I’m asking you to take the next step by joining TFVC as a monthly defender of medical liberty. Your gift of **[$25 or more each month](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY3OTY3OTM3MzMxNzI2MjkzLFwiclwiOjE2Nzk2Nzk3MjY4NTUxNDMzMn0iLCJzIjoiM2NiOTg1Mzg4ODA2ZDdjOSJ9)** powers our fight year-round, and as a thank-you, we’ll send you an official **TFVC “Come and Make Me” hat** so you can proudly wear your support.[](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/ty/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTY3OTY3OTM3MzM4MDE3NzUwLFwiclwiOjE2Nzk2Nzk3MjY4NTUxNDMzMn0iLCJzIjoiMjgxNmYxN2NkNGNiOGQyZCJ9)

Montanans are ready to vote for something again. Russ is proving that one conversation at a time.

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | **From the Lincoln to the Madison, Russ Is Going Everywhere!**
---
| | | | | |
Russell Cleveland has officially logged over 24,000 miles, attended 30+ events, and had countless conversations with Montanans across District 1. From coffee shops and county fairs to kitchen tables and school gyms.
He’s been on the road, listening to your stories, hearing your frustrations, and finding common ground. Because for Russ, this campaign isn’t just about _politics_. It’s about _people._
And you can feel it: Montanans are fired up to vote for a candidate, not just against one.
Now’s the time to pull together, neighbor with neighbor, and choose one of our own.
A veteran. A father. A small business owner who believes we can fix what’s broken and build something better, together.
This is more than another election year. It’s a movement for Montana.

subject: New: Trump Peacemaker! Did Spanberger learn how to lie like that in the CIA?

| Team,
I have no problem, putting friendship over politics, but I understand some folks can't do that. If you saved my life on the battlefield, I wouldn't care if you were pink or blue, male or female, Democrat, Republican, independent, or whatever you call yourself. We are all people and we are Americans.
To our detractors, I want you to know: whether you voted for me or not, I still love you. I don't love America last policies that erode the founding principles of our country and the efforts to harm innocent American citizens. My mission as your representative is to support decisions/ efforts that help all Americans regardless of party, race, religion, or creed, to live, work, and raise their families in peace.
While we continue to work through the Democrat/ Schumer shutdown, I want you to know:

* Our office is open and we are continuing to help folks.
* I have requested the government withhold my pay during the shutdown.
* We are continuing to travel the district visiting military folks, rural hospitals, businesses, farmers, and more.
* We are helping Winsome Sears, John Reid, Jason Miyares, and our House of Delegate folks get out the vote.

---
| Blessed are the Peacemakers
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
| Though I have no trust for Hamas terrorists in Gaza who want to wipe Israel off the map and because I have seen the evil they did to innocent people on Oct 7, 2023, it does appear we have a chance for peace in the Middle East. Thank God for president Trump. Trump should get the highest most respected award for making peace!

| Winsome Sears Won the Debate
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
I was in Norfolk to show support for Winsome Sears and our Republican ticket. Winsome Sears answered the questions and pushed Spanberger to be honest. Most notably, Abigail would not disavow Jay Jones who sent text messages fantasizing about killing the republican speaker and his children. Abigail kept rolling her eyes, tossing her hair, looked frustrated, kept lying, she would not answer the questions, and she wouldn't look at Winsome Sears. Winsome Sears definitely dominated the debate. But that won't matter if you don't help us get out the vote.

| Vote Jason Miyares - Jay Jones didn't just "make a mistake"
---
| |
---
| Jay Jones didn't just "make a mistake" - he talked about murder and wished death on the children of his political opponents.
Even Democrat Abigail Spanberger condemned him. And now, the Virginia Police Benevolent Association - the same group that endorsed me and Spanberger - and the Virginia Fraternal Order of Police are calling on Jay Jones to "decline to take office".
They said it best: "Leaders cannot serve effectively when their own conduct has undermined their credibility."
I'm Attorney General Jason Miyares - for four years I have worked to protect everyone, regardless of if they were a democrat or republican, liked me or hated me. The job of Attorney General is to keep everyone safe.

clean_body: | | | | == | == | Team, I have no problem, putting friendship over politics, but I understand some folks can't do that. If you saved my life on the battlefield, I wouldn't care if you were pink or blue, male or female, Democrat, Republican, independent, or whatever you call yourself. We are all people and we are Americans. To our detractors, I want you to know: whether you voted for me or not, I still love you. I don't love America last policies that erode the founding principles of our country and the efforts to harm innocent American citizens. My mission as your representative is to support decisions/ efforts that help all Americans regardless of party, race, religion, or creed, to live, work, and raise their families in peace. While we continue to work through the Democrat/ Schumer shutdown, I want you to know: Our office is open and we are continuing to help folks. I have requested the government withhold my pay during the shutdown. We are continuing to travel the district visiting military folks, rural hospitals, businesses, farmers, and more. We are helping Winsome Sears, John Reid, Jason Miyares, and our House of Delegate folks get out the vote. | Blessed are the Peacemakers | | | | | | Though I have no trust for Hamas terrorists in Gaza who want to wipe Israel off the map and because I have seen the evil they did to innocent people on Oct 7, 2023, it does appear we have a chance for peace in the Middle East. Thank God for president Trump. Trump should get the highest most respected award for making peace! | Winsome Sears Won the Debate | | | | I was in Norfolk to show support for Winsome Sears and our Republican ticket. Winsome Sears answered the questions and pushed Spanberger to be honest. Most notably, Abigail would not disavow Jay Jones who sent text messages fantasizing about killing the republican speaker and his children. Abigail kept rolling her eyes, tossing her hair, looked frustrated, kept lying, she would not answer the questions, and she wouldn't look at Winsome Sears. Winsome Sears definitely dominated the debate. But that won't matter if you don't help us get out the vote. | www.spanbergerlies.com | | == | Did Spanberger learn to lie in the CIA? For a better future for all Virginian's, please ask your friends to vote Republican. We have 24 days left in the election. To see some of Spanberger's hypocrisy == | For the facts go to spanbergervotes.com | | == | Spanberger says she is a moderate because most do not know her voting record. She is left of AOC and the squad on all the key issues that impact Virginia like spending, regulation, and energy. The media is covering up for her. Go to == to see the truth in detail on how she voted in Congress. She is left of California and New York on several issues. Please share this far and wide and make sure you and your friends vote Winsome Sears and the Republican ticket. | Vote Jason Miyares - Jay Jones didn't just "make a mistake" | | | Jay Jones didn't just "make a mistake" - he talked about murder and wished death on the children of his political opponents. Even Democrat Abigail Spanberger condemned him. And now, the Virginia Police Benevolent Association - the same group that endorsed me and Spanberger - and the Virginia Fraternal Order of Police are calling on Jay Jones to "decline to take office". They said it best: "Leaders cannot serve effectively when their own conduct has undermined their credibility." I'm Attorney General Jason Miyares - for four years I have worked to protect everyone, regardless of if they were a democrat or republican, liked me or hated me. The job of Attorney General is to keep everyone safe. Anyone who has advocated killing their political opponents and wanting to see their kids die to advance their political agenda, like Jay Jones did, has disqualified themselves from serving in public office. I'm humbly asking for your support for another four years as your Attorney General to keep you, your family, and our communities safe. Watch this video to see what local media is saying about Jay Jones disqualifying comments and actions. == | Democrats Choose Politics Over We The People | | | Democrats who voted for the clean CR 13 times including as recently as last March, are now voting no and putting politics over we the people. Obviously, moderate Democrats are afraid of the far left extremist Democrats like AOC. These three Democrat US Senators are voting with us: Senator Cortez-Mastro Senator Fetterman Senator King We need 5 more democrat senators to re-open the government. | 24 Days To Go, Please Vote Early Republican | | | Common Sense Over Nonsense | Please ask friends to vote Republican and vote early. Your vote is very important and couldn't be more simple. It's common sense over nonsense. State-wide: Winsome Earle-Sears, Governor John Reid, Lieutenant Governor Jason Miyares, Attorney General All 100 House of Delegate Seats in Virginia Are Up -In VA 05 Lee Ware Buddy Fowler Wendell Walker Tom Garrett David Owen Eric Zehr Eric Phillips Tommy Wright Tim Griffin Maddison Whittle For a better future for all Virginian's, I urge you to vote early, today and then spend each day after getting more and more family members and friends to vote. We could also use your help volunteering at the polls, making phone calls, putting ups signs. and more. Together, we can secure a brighter future for our district and our nation. Please Vote Ann Parker Campbell School Board | Vote Ann Parker for ==. Ann is also endorsed by my friend Attorney General Jason Miyares. I met Ann Parker in 2021 when she visited my office with members of Concerned Women for America. Ann is an advocate for conservative values, and increased opportunities for the students in Campbell County Schools and across the Commonwealth. Re-Elect Ann Parker, she will continue to fight for Virginia and our children. Thank you Ann Parker and Lynn Tucker for your Christian faith and all you do to help us get solid reliable Republican conservatives elected! | Please Vote David Christian Buckingham School Board | | | My friend and fellow Christian, David Christian is a lifelong Buckingham County resident and a former School Board member. He took our schools from bottom 5% to full accreditation, cut waste & raised teacher pay. He'll fight for: • Parents' voice in schools • Discipline & safe classrooms • Focus on academics, not politics • Competitive teacher pay Proven business owner & Pharmacy Director, David is ready to bring common sense back to School Board District 1. VOTE DAVID! | Thank You Goochland Tea Party and Others for Helping the Entire Republican Ticket | | | Thank you to the wonderful people at the Goochland Tea Party and others for helping get out the vote. Stop by every Saturday weather permitting from 10am to 3pm across from the Food Lion on 30 Broad Street Rd Manakin Sabot, VA to get a sign, candidate info, Trump and Turning Point gear, and more. Please tell a friend. | A Few More Interviews With Links | == Democrats spend money on woke policies over hiring police. The D.C. Mayor complained they need money for 300 more officers. Instead of paying for ridiculous divisive Woke policies, D.C. could have paid for 650 new officers. People were getting robbed, raped, and killed so Trump had to make D.C. safe! == | == | == | | == | John Fredericks == | | == | WSET Lynchburg == | | == | 29 News Charlottesville == | | == | Charlie Kirk Floor Speech == | | == | OAN Chanel Rion == | | | | | Vote For Law and order Over Chaos | | | Thank you for your continued support. Together, we will take our country back. Please ask friends to vote Republican early. Take care, please tell a friend, and I look forward to seeing you around the district! == == == == | For God and Country, | Congressman John McGuire VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner -Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. The way I look at it, we aren't just deciding Virginia's future this November.
_We're setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond._ By embracing a politics that puts Virginians first — not a president, not a party; by drawing on the powerful conversations I've had with thousands of Virginians; and by laying out a common-sense agenda, starting with a plan to make all of our lives more affordable.
Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come.
That's why far-right Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars against me. It's why Donald Trump keeps attacking me. _And it's why meeting our fundraising goals is so important._
But as I learned working cases at CIA and crafting laws at the U.S. Capitol, you're only as good as the team around you.
[_**Peter, can I count on you to contribute a small amount before midnight to help us win the biggest election of 2025? With the polls tightening, your $25 is urgently needed to turn out the voters who'll flip Virginia blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117072073/575263978/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzU1YmU1YTgtYTBhNi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4jWGiF6oYbzrhciW6eji2HMZvCMOIYLQ65hPRjaaTK8=)

clean_body: More than 400,000 votes have now been cast in our race for Governor. Will you pitch in to help us win the biggest election of 2025? = Hi, Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. You're one of my top supporters, so I wanted to be the first to tell you: As of this morning, more than 400,000 votes have now been cast in our race for Governor. = If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately: = = = = = = The way I look at it, we aren't just deciding Virginia's future this November. We're setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond. By embracing a politics that puts Virginians first — not a president, not a party; by drawing on the powerful conversations I've had with thousands of Virginians; and by laying out a common-sense agenda, starting with a plan to make all of our lives more affordable. Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come. That's why far-right Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars against me. It's why Donald Trump keeps attacking me. And it's why meeting our fundraising goals is so important. But as I learned working cases at CIA and crafting laws at the U.S. Capitol, you're only as good as the team around you. = = = = = = = I'm honored by the trust you've placed in me, and I hope that you'll continue to follow our campaign from here until November 4th. name: Congressman Richard Neal
subject: Republicans Would Rather Shut Down the Government than Preserve Health Care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
We are now one week into the federal government shutdown. While some in Washington treat these standoffs as routine, the consequences for working families, seniors, and small businesses are anything but.
Each day this shutdown continues, Americans experience unnecessary uncertainty. Veterans await benefits. Federal employees go without pay. Health care providers face disruptions to key programs that help deliver care to those most in need. Communities across Massachusetts and the nation are feeling the strain.
This situation was entirely avoidable. Congress has an obligation to fund the government and meet its commitments to the American people. Yet a small faction has chosen confrontation over compromise — threatening the stability of our economy and the continuity of basic services in the process. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Richard%20Neal%20Profile%20Photo.png]
As a senior member of the House Committee on Ways and Means, I have long believed that responsible governance is the foundation of economic growth and public confidence. As Ranking Member of the House Committee on Ways and Means, I have long believed that responsible governance is the foundation of economic growth and public confidence. Democrats in Congress are working to end this shutdown, preserve health care coverage, and save millions of Americans from massive increases in health care premiums. We will continue protecting programs like Medicare and Social Security, and ensuring families have access to essential health care and support.
The people of Massachusetts expect and deserve a government that functions, one that keeps its promises and honors its responsibilities. That is the work I remain committed to each and every day.
In Service,
Congressman Richard Neal

name: JD Vance
subject: Here’s why Democrats shut down the government:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
It has to do with illegals.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bjHx/?__vbtrk=MzI1OTI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI1OTI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Friend, I’m appalled at the Democrat shutdown.

The truth is, they only shut down the government for one reason: they want to reinstate benefits for illegals.

These people would rather give your hard-earned money to criminals than help govern our country for our citizens.

Look, I put service first in everything I do. Both as a marine and as Vice President, I swore an oath to protect the United States and its citizens, not illegals.

_It would do Democrats good to re-read their oaths of office. _

**The truth is, no matter what the Left does, I know you’ll still stand with President Trump, myself, and the MAGA movement. **

Now, I need you to show it.

****[Can you answer a few questions for me? It will really help our America First Agenda and STOPPING the Democrats who want to shut down our government](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bjHx/?__vbtrk=MzI1OTI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI1OTI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)****

******[RESPOND TO JD VANCE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bjHx/?__vbtrk=MzI1OTI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI1OTI5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)******

I’m really looking forward to seeing what you have to say. Your support truly means the world to me.

Let’s keep making America great,

JD Vance
Vice President of the United States

name: BPR Daily AM

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: 1-point LEAD in the New York Governor's race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
This poll changes everything...
This poll changes everything...
| Friend,
---
Ever since the Democrats’ government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign’s fundraising.
---
With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts.
In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that _YOU_ are our ONLY priority, which is why I’ve had my own salary withheld during the Democrats’ senseless shutdown.
**_But today, I have to at least break my silence because I just received information that will _UPEND_ the 2026 elections. _**
**A BRAND NEW POLL in New York just dropped, showing that once voters are aware of our positions, I would _BEAT_ Democrat governor Kathy Hochul by _1 POINT_!**
Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum.
There’s no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She’s even being labeled the **MOST VULNERABLE** Democrat governor in the country.
_And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory._
_So long as we reach every last voter, so long as our message isn’t drowned out by the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys, and so long as I have YOU in my corner, we can SAVE New York!_
_...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done._
