clean_body: This poll changes everything... This poll changes everything... | Friend, Ever since the Democrats’ government shutdown began on October 1, I placed a pause on our campaign’s fundraising. With the Radical Left holding our government hostage to try and benefit illegal immigrants all at the expense of hardworking Americans like you, honestly, the last thing I wanted to do was bother my supporters with political emails and texts. In fact, I believe now more than ever, the American people need to see that YOU are our ONLY priority, which is why I’ve had my own salary withheld during the Democrats’ senseless shutdown. But today, I have to at least break my silence because I just received information that will UPEND the 2026 elections. A BRAND NEW POLL in New York just dropped, showing that once voters are aware of our positions, I would BEAT Democrat governor Kathy Hochul by 1 POINT! Hochul and the Democrats were desperately hoping that I would continue to pause my messaging during the shutdown so that they could bury this news and prevent us from seizing the momentum. There’s no two ways about it; this poll is devastating for Hochul. She’s even being labeled the MOST VULNERABLE Democrat governor in the country. And this new poll shows us our clear path to victory. So long as we reach every last voter, so long as our message isn’t drowned out by the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys, and so long as I have YOU in my corner, we can SAVE New York! ...But all this depends on having the resources necessary to get the job done. That is why I’ve made the calls to secure a 5oo% MATCH for the next 24 hours to ensure we capitalize on this moment. Now that our path to save New York is clearer than ever, now that we have all the momentum, will you stand with me in our fight to FIRE Hochul? | Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

Trump can try to close his fist, but complete control will always slip through his fingers. The American people are free. Liberty is our birthright. It is in our DNA. And nothing Donald Trump does is going to change that.
#
Peter — the news is tough.
Trump is abusing our Military, shredding the Constitution, destroying the rule of law, and attacking every pillar of our democracy.
Sometimes it feels like we’re only a few steps from the brink.
But remember: Trump can try to close his fist, but complete control will always slip through his fingers. The American people are free. Liberty is our birthright. It is in our DNA. And nothing Donald Trump does is going to change that.
They want you to feel isolated and alone. You are not.
We are with you, alongside millions of other freedom-loving Americans.
Our ancestors fought for generations to keep this country free. When we joined the Military, we swore an oath — not to a party, a person, or an office, but to the United States of America and our Constitution. We will not let the flame of democracy go out in our lifetime.

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117081863/575296553/795475316?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmU3ZDg2Ni1hNmE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-RQXeItfyUNO6TdiZJ7K2GiXAO9aB9Cp45AmewbJoE=)
If you’re not from here you may not know this, Peter, but Illinois is one of the nation’s leaders in producing the soybeans that feed the world. There are over 43,000 soybean farmers in Illinois. Just this year, it was named our state bean. Now, as you might know, Donald Trump’s tariffs have severely hurt our farmers, driving business elsewhere. Just recently, our #1 trade partner for soybeans turned to Argentina instead of us. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117081864/575296554/-1000559761?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmU3ZDg2Ni1hNmE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-RQXeItfyUNO6TdiZJ7K2GiXAO9aB9Cp45AmewbJoE=&emci=5e24fb64-11a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=36e7d866-a6a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=18052858) But amazingly, while the government has been shut down and farmers are going bankrupt, **Republicans have sent _$20 billion_ to Argentina, where their president just used part of the money to host a rock’n’roll concert.** **There’s nothing “America First” about this. It’s wasteful, cruel use of our taxpayer dollars to play an international game of footsie with a president Trump likes.** We have to demand that our tax dollars go to our citizens, especially those being directly harmed by Republicans’ reckless cuts to crucial programs. I’m raising Hell about this, and I hope you’ll join me: [**Add your name to demand that our tax dollars go to programs that benefit us – like _affordable healthcare and agricultural support_ – not far-right, foreign allies.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117081865/575296555/-1000559761?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmU3ZDg2Ni1hNmE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-RQXeItfyUNO6TdiZJ7K2GiXAO9aB9Cp45AmewbJoE=&emci=5e24fb64-11a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=36e7d866-a6a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=18052858) | [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117081866/575296556/-1000559761?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmU3ZDg2Ni1hNmE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-RQXeItfyUNO6TdiZJ7K2GiXAO9aB9Cp45AmewbJoE=&emci=5e24fb64-11a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=36e7d866-a6a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=18052858)

-Eric

clean_body: | = If you’re not from here you may not know this, Peter, but Illinois is one of the nation’s leaders in producing the soybeans that feed the world. There are over 43,000 soybean farmers in Illinois. Just this year, it was named our state bean. Now, as you might know, Donald Trump’s tariffs have severely hurt our farmers, driving business elsewhere. Just recently, our #1 trade partner for soybeans turned to Argentina instead of us. But amazingly, while the government has been shut down and farmers are going bankrupt, Republicans have sent $20 billion to Argentina, where their president just used part of the money to host a rock’n’roll concert. There’s nothing “America First” about this. It’s wasteful, cruel use of our taxpayer dollars to play an international game of footsie with a president Trump likes. We have to demand that our tax dollars go to our citizens, especially those being directly harmed by Republicans’ reckless cuts to crucial programs. I’m raising Hell about this, and I hope you’ll join me: | Proud to do the work of the American people , not just my friends. -Eric | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States

subject: The latest tariffs

body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2830%2E582294%2EjUf2ep)
Donald Trump’s latest round of tariffs is another tax on working families, small businesses, and manufacturers who are already struggling to make ends meet.
**The impact here in New Hampshire is real — and it’s growing.**
Chris understands that reckless trade wars don’t build strong economies. That’s why Chris has a record of promoting investment in local businesses, supporting American manufacturing, and standing up for workers across the Granite State.
**[If you’re ready to see Chris continue that record of leadership in the Senate, will you chip in today?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251011_1_tariffs.Vpe3Bt&refcode=em20251011-1&t=2&akid=2830%2E582294%2EjUf2ep)**
National Republicans and corporate special interests want to buy this seat because they don’t want a fighter like Chris in the Senate.
They’re ready to pour millions into the Granite State, so we can’t afford to fall behind now. We need to build a grassroots campaign strong enough to push back.
**[Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help Chris stand up for small businesses and fight back against Trump’s reckless tariffs?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251011_1_tariffs.Vpe3Bt&refcode=em20251011-1&t=3&akid=2830%2E582294%2EjUf2ep)**

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Legally required to report what we've raised ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Here's the truth:

In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a well-timed donation to help me pass the Election Rigging Response Act. Please give me a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
Here's the truth:
One week from today, we have our final, official fundraising deadline of this campaign. When it ends, we're legally required to report how much we've raised.
This is the biggest election in the country and everyone will be watching: the press, the Trump administration and Republican states considering re-drawing their maps.
They're looking to see how much grassroots enthusiasm there is in opposing the Republican power grab happening everywhere.
If we report a big number, they'll know Americans are deeply opposed to their efforts to rig the next election. Plus, every donation will help us win our race here in California.
So this is a big deal. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges, the free press and those they don't like in the media.
Time is running out:
[**If stopping Trump's power grab is important to you, please contribute to help pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California. Our average donation is around $30. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is that lots and lots of people are donating before this deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em251011&refcode2=2658_4767699_hXQo3f&akid=2658%2E4767699%2EhXQo3f)

**** Hey Peter, Trump isn’t just playing politics, he’s weaponizing the federal government. The MAGA shutdown isn’t a “pause.” It’s a power grab, laying off federal workers and gutting services that protect our communities. Millions are hurt — including MAGA voters. **Local democracy is our firewall.** School boards, city councils, county and state governments keep our kids educated, seniors cared for, and families safe when Washington fails. The chaos isn’t accidental. Trump is in charge and he’s relishing this planned chaos designed to consolidate power and hurt Americans. That’s why local leaders matter more than ever. **Local Democracy Project is backing candidates and initiatives that fight MAGA at the local level, defend services, and strengthen our communities from the ground up.** _We need your help to elect leaders who protect the people, not the politics._ **** **[Peter, chip in today. clean_body: | | | And according to Speaker Johnson, “people are having fun with this!” Hey Peter, Trump isn’t just playing politics, he’s weaponizing the federal government. The MAGA shutdown isn’t a “pause.” It’s a power grab, laying off federal workers and gutting services that protect our communities. Millions are hurt — including MAGA voters. Local democracy is our firewall. School boards, city councils, county and state governments keep our kids educated, seniors cared for, and families safe when Washington fails. The chaos isn’t accidental. Trump is in charge and he’s relishing this planned chaos designed to consolidate power and hurt Americans. That’s why local leaders matter more than ever. Local Democracy Project is backing candidates and initiatives that fight MAGA at the local level, defend services, and strengthen our communities from the ground up. We need your help to elect leaders who protect the people, not the politics. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support. -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . | | **👆** _Sign the petition with one click!_**👆 ** Governor DeSantis, CFO Blaise Ingoglia, and Florida’s waste watchdog, FAFO, just held a massive press conference to expose the wasteful spending happening across our state. And friend, the list of nonsense is wild:
* $70,000 for **hot yoga classes** for Orlando city staff
* Almost half a million bucks just to **count trees** in Orlando
* $600,000 for a **“Welcome to Pensacola”** sign
* $189,000 for a Gainesville **“equity director”**
* $150,000 for **drag shows** in Pensacola

That’s only scratching the surface — statewide, we’re talking over a billion dollars. So when politicians tell you we “can’t afford” property tax relief? name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump just publicly demanded I be indicted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team — This is Adam Schiff.

I wanted to bring you up to speed about one of Trump’s latest demands that I be punished for impeaching him and serving on the January 6th Committee.

Trump publicly pressured his former personal attorney and now-Attorney General, Pam Bondi, to punish his political enemies, including me.

He said that I was “guilty as hell,” that the Department of Justice “can’t delay any longer,” and that “JUSTICE MUST BE SERVED, NOW!!!”

[I need you to stand with me right now. Trump is ramping up his public threats to abuse the justice system to punish me for my work to hold him accountable. Split a donation between me and the Voter Protection Project today:](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94665?t=6&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94667?t=7&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94668?t=8&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94669?t=9&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94670?t=10&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94671?t=11&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94665?t=12&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY)
This public pressure campaign to punish his enemies does not happen in a vacuum.

First, Donald Trump fired a U.S. Attorney in Virginia. And Trump was explicit about why he was firing him.

It was because this U.S. Attorney resisted efforts by Trump and his Department of Justice to charge New York Attorney General Letitia James with the crimes that Trump already said she was “guilty” of, but for which there was no evidence. The implication is clear: if prosecutors don’t go after me and the president’s other enemies with meritless cases, they too will be fired.

This is the biggest attack on the rule of law and independent justice since Watergate.

After Nixon’s abuses of the Justice Department during Watergate, a wall was erected between the White House and Department of Justice to try and prevent a president from surreptitiously ordering the prosecution of his enemies.

Now the wall is obliterated — and all of the corruption and weaponization is out in the open.
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94665?t=13&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY)
Trump won’t stop his attacks on me, and this will only get more dangerous. That’s why I need your support right now:

[Can you rush $10 or more to me and the Voter Protection Project right now to help me fight back against these lies, misinformation and attacks that are designed to intimidate me into silence?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94665?t=14&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94667?t=15&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94668?t=16&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94669?t=17&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94670?t=18&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/94671?t=19&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY)
Thanks for always having my back,

Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=20&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21467%2E878179%2Ep9_wEY)

name: Storm clouds
subject: The deep breath before the plunge
body:
MAGA has 3 Democratic judges on the PA Supreme Court in their crosshairs. According to the GOP, “In November, when we knock off all three, it’ll be a pretty big deal.” Let’s stop them in their tracks.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014HLRjtTAV9WKZqcuaMD0O17PYBi15cHPzK9BQjrKo93CirxZR-NpTOQf3OAJ3-86r9J-jbqTfr7678wSs6nzXMwLrPx4mRZDs_cL1nsqx1eLBGlfhall-S8r3gX4TOIBOp-XkY7e48aBd0D_g-0uhIUTueK1uW7hXPDEMT48zysF8FKtydOIji_AwGFaEF9R1RbQOoMXhmiZDdAsX1YlUotKU-lGZG7jC8xwbAJAVvs=&c=iolsfNc04FHgEb2tH6X8mGgQG4AX34pRit1iZMcnhbiZCQiIaxNfKA==&ch=p_5wLsn5RWl-tv1vc2DwboXeqBLG8BunVYnju_zZz2FpG1dEPYPbGQ==)
---
| Friend,
Courts across the nation are restraining Trump's worst authoritarian impulses. Judges have ruled against Trump's deployment of the National Guard and the U.S. military against American citizens and "blue" cities. Judges have ruled that even Trump's tariffs are illegal.
Because of this, judges have become top targets for MAGA as they look to tear down every guardrail and check on Trump's power.
Many have been targeted with violence, including a judge in South Carolina who just saw her home burned to the ground after she stopped Trump's DOJ from illegally accessing voter data.
MAGA has judges and judicial races in their crosshairs--and nowhere is this more ominous and more urgent than in Pennsylvania, where voters will decide this November whether to retain 3 Democratic judges on the state's highest court.
---
| [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014HLRjtTAV9WKZqcuaMD0O17PYBi15cHPzK9BQjrKo93CirxZR-NpTOQf3OAJ3-86r9J-jbqTfr7678wSs6nzXMwLrPx4mRZDs_cL1nsqx1eLBGlfhall-S8r3gX4TOIBOp-XkY7e48aBd0D_g-0uhIUTueK1uW7hXPDEMT48zysF8FKtydOIji_AwGFaEF9R1RbQOoMXhmiZDdAsX1YlUotKU-lGZG7jNA4aOx3rsSM=&c=iolsfNc04FHgEb2tH6X8mGgQG4AX34pRit1iZMcnhbiZCQiIaxNfKA==&ch=p_5wLsn5RWl-tv1vc2DwboXeqBLG8BunVYnju_zZz2FpG1dEPYPbGQ==)
---
| Storm clouds are forming overhead as the dark forces that helped deliver Trump the presidency for a second time in 2024 are gathering once again to take out 3 Democratic judges on the PA Supreme Court in a single stroke.
And with only three weeks left, time is running out to save these judges and stop MAGA from dismantling PA's last line of defense against Trump's unprecedented power grab.
Only you can stop this. This team, and everyone in this fight, are the frontline of resistance to MAGA taking control of America's most important swing state ahead of the Midterm and 2028 presidential election.
[We need you now more than ever--we cannot afford to pause our ground game at any time in these last days as MAGA is going all-in here to win on November 4. Can you send in much-needed reinforcements to keep our voter contact team going 24/7 in these final weeks?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014HLRjtTAV9WKZqcuaMD0O17PYBi15cHPzK9BQjrKo93CirxZR-NpTOQf3OAJ3-86r9J-jbqTfr7678wSs6nzXMwLrPx4mRZDs_cL1nsqx1eLBGlfhall-S8r3gX4TOIBOp-XkY7e48aBd0D_g-0uhIUTueK1uW7hXPDEMT48zysF8FKtydOIji_AwGFaEF9R1RbQOoMXhmiZDdAsX1YlUotKU-lGZG7jIEsw8uTcsGw=&c=iolsfNc04FHgEb2tH6X8mGgQG4AX34pRit1iZMcnhbiZCQiIaxNfKA==&ch=p_5wLsn5RWl-tv1vc2DwboXeqBLG8BunVYnju_zZz2FpG1dEPYPbGQ==)

clean_body: MAGA has 3 Democratic judges on the PA Supreme Court in their crosshairs. According to the GOP, “In November, when we knock off all three, it’ll be a pretty big deal.” Let’s stop them in their tracks. | | | | | == | Friend, Courts across the nation are restraining Trump's worst authoritarian impulses. Judges have ruled against Trump's deployment of the National Guard and the U.S. military against American citizens and "blue" cities. Judges have ruled that even Trump's tariffs are illegal. Because of this, judges have become top targets for MAGA as they look to tear down every guardrail and check on Trump's power. Many have been targeted with violence, including a judge in South Carolina who just saw her home burned to the ground after she stopped Trump's DOJ from illegally accessing voter data. MAGA has judges and judicial races in their crosshairs--and nowhere is this more ominous and more urgent than in Pennsylvania, where voters will decide this November whether to retain 3 Democratic judges on the state's highest court. | == | Storm clouds are forming overhead as the dark forces that helped deliver Trump the presidency for a second time in 2024 are gathering once again to take out 3 Democratic judges on the PA Supreme Court in a single stroke. And with only three weeks left, time is running out to save these judges and stop MAGA from dismantling PA's last line of defense against Trump's unprecedented power grab. Only you can stop this. This team, and everyone in this fight, are the frontline of resistance to MAGA taking control of America's most important swing state ahead of the Midterm and 2028 presidential election. == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == We can't let Yass buy this court, or democracy itself could fall. ---
* Flip the house next year
* Impeach President Trump
* Reverse the Trump agenda

Last year, over 6.3 million Californians voted for me in the senate race —the most ever for a Republican in our state’s history. Now, my _**You Gotta Believe PAC**_ is fighting to turn out those over 6.3 million Garvey voters to vote NO on Prop 50 and protect our independent redistricting commission. George Soros, the DNC, and the Liberal unions are bankrolling Gavin Newsom's Proposition 50 power grab to let Democrats redraw Californias congressional maps without a census and steal 5-7 GOP house seats. This is the most critical race in 2025, and it could end President Trumps agenda in Congress. The Democrats are flooding this race with over $100 million from Soros, the DNC, and the liberal unions to rig California’s maps and export their radical policies in California nationwide—open borders, high taxes, and woke nonsense. If Prop 50 passes on November 4th, Democrats will: Flip the house next year Impeach President Trump Reverse the Trump agenda Last year, over 6.3 million Californians voted for me in the senate race —the most ever for a Republican in our state’s history. Now, my You Gotta Believe PAC** is fighting to turn out those over 6.3 million Garvey voters to vote NO on Prop 50 and protect our independent redistricting commission. | Hey everybody, it’s Mark Kelly.Mark Kelly
And Ruben Gallego.Ruben Gallego |
| Last week, in the Capitol, we had an unexpected conversation with Mike Johnson about reopening the government and swearing in Adelita Grijalva.Mark Kelly
Johnson didn’t want to have that conversation.Ruben Gallego |
| He didn’t want to talk about millions of people seeing their health insurance premiums doubling.Mark Kelly
He didn’t want to talk about how he refuses to swear in our friend, Adelita Grijalva, after she won her election to the House.Ruben Gallego |
| And, of course, he tried to put the blame back on us — instead of on himself and Trump, where it should be. Mark Kelly
That’s what we’ve come to expect right now, from a bunch of folks who’d rather shut down the government than help out the American people.Ruben Gallego |
| It doesn't have to be this way, but that’s where we’re at... and it’s a real shame. Mark Kelly
But we’re not going to let up. Not a chance.Ruben Gallego |
| And if you have our back, we've got a humble request: [Can you please use this link and chip in $5 to Ruben?](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct25.OOqsxV&refcode=em21011-1-f&t=1&akid=4016%2E734936%2EAAdGg2)Mark Kelly
It’d mean the world to have your support.Ruben Gallego |
| Even just a few bucks ads up fast when a ton of people chip in together.Mark Kelly
But we know not everyone can donate.Ruben Gallego |
| That’s why it’s so important that you do, if you can. Mark Kelly

* * *
Thanks for your help — really. It means a lot.
– Mark Kelly & Ruben Gallego –

name: Senator Maggie W. Hassan
subject: About my son, Ben
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
This is Maggie Hassan. I’m outraged.

I’ll tell you why: RFK Jr. continues to push radical conspiracy theories, dangerous anti-vaccine rhetoric, and attacks on folks with disabilities.

I got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that folks like my son, Ben — who was born with cerebral palsy — would have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117088493/575312423/1734447991?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.11_Ben-New_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGFmMjViNC1hYmE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r98hT9ERf1hwBCPsUPPCI75MbQZ0tPtZ_-DD-Mi4Kys=) Now, with extremists like Donald Trump and RFK Jr. attacking key rights and protections for people with disabilities, that mission is more important than ever. They’re attempting to undo the progress we’ve made — slashing Medicaid and planning cuts to Social Security, disability grant programs, and affordable housing access.

I’m not afraid of RFK Jr. I’ll continue going head-to-head with him in the Senate, but I need your support:

**This is James Uthmeier.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117088823/575313574/-2108063729?refcode=em_JJR_FR_JJRvsUth_101125&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTBkMWNlYWQtYWNhNi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ixYd6dj4LtNrld65ZYmhcr7zssK8kLySX-rXRRWohDk=) Peter, while Florida families struggle with the highest insurance rates in the nation, Uthmeier protects the corporations that charge them. While FPL plans a historic $10 billion rate hike, he looks the other way. When he was accused of money laundering and wire fraud over misused Medicaid settlement funds, Uthmeier denied responsibility. When a federal judge ordered him to follow the law, he ignored it and was held in contempt of court. And that's just the tip of the iceberg. Uthmeier only answers to Trump and DeSantis, not Florida families — consistently choosing party politics and political stunts over the real problems working people face every day. | **[CHIP IN TO DEFEAT JAMES UTHMEIER →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117088824/575313575/-2108063729?refcode=em_JJR_FR_JJRvsUth_101125&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTBkMWNlYWQtYWNhNi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ixYd6dj4LtNrld65ZYmhcr7zssK8kLySX-rXRRWohDk=) **

Jose Javier Rodriguez is a fighter. He stands up for working people against corrupt special interests and isn't afraid to take on the powerful to deliver results for Florida families.
He is ready to build a Florida where we root out corruption, not embrace it. Serve working people, not special interests. And lead with strength, courage, and real backbone.
Jose couldn't be more different than Uthmeier — but only one will lead Florida's top law enforcement office after next year's election.

clean_body: Which one do you want? | This is James Uthmeier. = Peter, while Florida families struggle with the highest insurance rates in the nation, Uthmeier protects the corporations that charge them. While FPL plans a historic $10 billion rate hike, he looks the other way. When he was accused of money laundering and wire fraud over misused Medicaid settlement funds, Uthmeier denied responsibility. When a federal judge ordered him to follow the law, he ignored it and was held in contempt of court. And that's just the tip of the iceberg. Uthmeier only answers to Trump and DeSantis, not Florida families — consistently choosing party politics and political stunts over the real problems working people face every day. | = This is Jose Javier Rodriguez. = Jose Javier Rodriguez is a fighter. He stands up for working people against corrupt special interests and isn't afraid to take on the powerful to deliver results for Florida families. He is ready to build a Florida where we root out corruption, not embrace it. Serve working people, not special interests. And lead with strength, courage, and real backbone. Jose couldn't be more different than Uthmeier — but only one will lead Florida's top law enforcement office after next year's election. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks for your support, Team Rodriguez | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. Howard Avenue #106-813 Tampa, FL 33606

[****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHs7iGep3vX1mO61FC5l6ShuLHIwHpwcEWLg7hup-uSszqW3MoOeHGIzoHCZ5FND1AwiLkv50Gw5Hq2KU94crgTXjUfIS-fkDvnpYNL_KTmQjQ0u4OdEyu1985Unyqr3dMfDquV9atOsD5wa32M3vPyhX23KWxen2-Mk3F31-xAbhNDJ8O8X69eP8GzuJPyg790sRzxlp0uxdM0cEaE5-mrlF59tUWTsxVONtqyYolT-s2P6AE5qkmR4YT0iikPtIM0xHTNdIBztEG4jPb7w6zkucS7u36s2wwOKN0Endi1KHegFx2sZQ5Ve6Za03psG-D8e4PR7hz9IwmJeJQ76V3TQ/4kn/9pJ9gxuPTsGMip5iSAazgg/h3/h001.CFnbcORRTiljUe-mdRoaefYG1ElyuMIWZXOwmFFXcCI) Donald Trump just admitted it on TV: _“We took the freedom of speech away.”_ That’s not a slip, it’s a confession. He openly bragged about suppressing the First Amendment, twisting the law, and silencing dissent. Then he defended it by saying flag-burning “agitates and irritates crowds.” _That’s illegal, unconstitutional, dystopian and dangerous._ Let’s be clear: freedom of speech isn’t supposed to be comfortable. It’s supposed to be protected. And any president who proudly claims to have taken it away is unfit to serve and a danger to our democracy. **That’s why we’re launching a nationwide billboard campaign calling for Trump’s impeachment - to remind Americans that the Constitution doesn’t belong to him. clean_body: | | | He’s saying the quiet part OUT LOUD. Donald Trump just admitted it on TV: “We took the freedom of speech away.” That’s not a slip, it’s a confession. He openly bragged about suppressing the First Amendment, twisting the law, and silencing dissent. Then he defended it by saying flag-burning “agitates and irritates crowds.” That’s illegal, unconstitutional, dystopian and dangerous. Let’s be clear: freedom of speech isn’t supposed to be comfortable. It’s supposed to be protected. And any president who proudly claims to have taken it away is unfit to serve and a danger to our democracy. That’s why we’re launching a nationwide billboard campaign calling for Trump’s impeachment - to remind Americans that the Constitution doesn’t belong to him. It belongs to** us. dollar you give helps us plaster Trump’s own words across the country, so no one can ignore what he’s done or what’s at stake. ** ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. **Kim Klacik has never been afraid to challenge the status quo.**
**[GET YOUR TICKET](https://substack.com/redirect/7aac984d-83c4-4d8c-87c3-5cc97cdbaed5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7aac984d-83c4-4d8c-87c3-5cc97cdbaed5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As the founder of **Red Renaissance PAC** and a nationally recognized advocate for revitalizing America's urban communities, Kim has built a platform focused on restoring opportunity, dignity, and local leadership where it's needed most. Her work bridges the gap between politics and people -- focusing on _solutions_ instead of soundbites.
Through Red Renaissance PAC, Kim is empowering a new generation of civic and political leaders to think differently about economic renewal, family stability, and the value of personal responsibility. Her bold, authentic approach has earned her a loyal following across the country and positioned her as one of the most influential voices shaping a new conversation around what effective community leadership looks like.
> "We can rebuild our communities from within -- through faith, family, and opportunity," Kim often says. "It starts with reminding people that they matter and that their voice matters."
We're honored to welcome **Kim Klacik** as a featured speaker at the **Seed & Roots Summit 2025 -- Faith. Family. And the Future of Work in America.**
🗓 **Saturday, October 25, 2025**
📍 **Philadelphia, PA | Independence Visitor Center**
⏰ **9:00 AM - 5:00 PM (Doors open at 8:30 AM)**
* * *
**Why this matters:**
At a time when division too often overshadows dialogue, Kim is showing what it means to lead with conviction, clarity, and compassion -- reminding us that real change begins at the local level.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7aac984d-83c4-4d8c-87c3-5cc97cdbaed5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

name: Graham Platner
subject: Nothing pisses me off more than getting a fundraising email from Democrats talking about how they’re fighting fascism.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=101125_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=101125_1]
Peter,
Nothing pisses me off more than getting a fundraising text from Democrats talking about how they’re fighting fascism... Because it’s such B.S. We’re not idiots. Everyone knows most of them aren’t doing jack right now to fight back.
People are being kidnapped into unmarked vans by masked police. There is a genocide happening in Palestine. Literal billionaires have taken over our government. And all Democratic leadership can do is send us another fundraising text?
My name is Graham Platner, and I’m the Marine Corps veteran and Democrat running for U.S. Senate against Susan Collins here in Maine. I’m not going to speak in platitudes or shy away from what I believe. There is a war going on in this country, and the oligarchy and the fascists are winning right now.
Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Republican senator in the country. We have an opportunity to replace her with a working-class Democrat – one who won’t take money from corporations or AIPAC.
But I’m not a wealthy guy, and we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win. If I’m going to be able to defeat Susan Collins and flip this Senate seat blue, I need folks like you to chip in now to my campaign.
Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC to help me defeat Susan Collins, flip Maine blue, and take back the Senate with a Democrat who will actually fight to defend our democracy like Democrats oughta be? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-platner?refcode=101125_1]

clean_body: [] Peter, Nothing pisses me off more than getting a fundraising text from Democrats talking about how they’re fighting fascism... Because it’s such B.S. We’re not idiots. Everyone knows most of them aren’t doing jack right now to fight back. People are being kidnapped into unmarked vans by masked police. There is a genocide happening in Palestine. Literal billionaires have taken over our government. And all Democratic leadership can do is send us another fundraising text? My name is Graham Platner, and I’m the Marine Corps veteran and Democrat running for U.S. Senate against Susan Collins here in Maine. I’m not going to speak in platitudes or shy away from what I believe. There is a war going on in this country, and the oligarchy and the fascists are winning right now. Susan Collins is the most vulnerable Republican senator in the country. We have an opportunity to replace her with a working-class Democrat – one who won’t take money from corporations or AIPAC. But I’m not a wealthy guy, and we’re still short of our $50,000 goal and what we need to win. If I’m going to be able to defeat Susan Collins and flip this Senate seat blue, I need folks like you to chip in now to my campaign. name: Defend Our Courts
subject: A Paul Revere moment is only way Democrats survive this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Since May this Summer we have been ringing the alarm bells and shouting to anyone who will listen: Democrats are headed for catastrophe in the most critical race of 2025 that no one knows about
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kMqSliZ940Ui3yOsbFCJRvRVed8bapUMpm_iO32zbpYEC-FZwD8gBifkGB-nSUHeY_e5wUormMO72bPR6OWlnnwxKastKIxhFGwXos_BP1hwKMRAVe-hB674tSbWXOVFaWfa7IboUPnlNgmzMh8XanrQQG55We9CFfTz_yuOxtqD9YFehzVUEg0JGtkHtzdMah9PcdwgxHjkH2ApnFnBZ4ZqSgYKuLQ4mekQbbyShsw=&c=Fa8kOatR9zXtoBGVH_w1Edktw5z6SKmEiUpy0yA4f7T1aynIufT0-g==&ch=7qxkdesRv3TeeGfDQFx9tfnuLRIu0Cm9yTn4mDoHXpMacz5Dwmfosg==)
---
| Peter,
Since May this Summer we have been ringing the alarm bells and shouting to anyone who will listen: Democrats are headed for catastrophe in the most critical race of 2025 that no one knows about--the upcoming Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election.
If MAGA takes this critical court, we will lose in Pennsylvania for the next decade and beyond. 19 electoral college votes, gone for good.
Now over the past few days, slowly but surely, the Democratic movement has begun to wake up.
---

After months of going it on our own this news is a massive reprieve for Democrats in Pennsylvania but we can't let it be too little late. If the race were held today Democrats would still lose, but we have 25 days to change that and to do it we need to wake up every Democrat in the country about this race.
In 2021, Senators John Ossoff and Raphael Warnock were able to garner that level of attention, and the entire movement came together to push them over the line for their historic victory.
Coming back and winning this race will require nothing short of the overwhelming support we saw in Georgia. Unfortunately most Democrats still don't know what is at stake here in Pennsylvania.
We are in desperate need of a Paul Revere moment if we hope to save Pennsylvania. Tell it to all who will listen: MAGA is about to seize Pennsylvania and to save it we must rush to the aid of Democrats there.
If you are able to [donate](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kMqSliZ940Ui3yOsbFCJRvRVed8bapUMpm_iO32zbpYEC-FZwD8gBifkGB-nSUHeY_e5wUormMO72bPR6OWlnnwxKastKIxhFGwXos_BP1hwKMRAVe-hB674tSbWXOVFaWfa7IboUPnlNgmzMh8XanrQQG55We9CFfTz_yuOxtqD9YFehzVUEg0JGtkHtzdMah9PcdwgxHjkH2ApnFnBZ5IXg4TSvYRYnx5WVLWgXKY=&c=Fa8kOatR9zXtoBGVH_w1Edktw5z6SKmEiUpy0yA4f7T1aynIufT0-g==&ch=7qxkdesRv3TeeGfDQFx9tfnuLRIu0Cm9yTn4mDoHXpMacz5Dwmfosg==) and at a minimum please tell at least one friend or family member about this race. Even better: post on your socials about the race, text the family group chat, tell your local Congressman, do anything in your power to get the word out.
If the word gets out - we win.

body:
But I promise you *this* email is different.
But I promise you *this* email is different.
| | [ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b2dedfc2ac954be4a301a1519e210eab&_e=qvlKcHwYgvsii9xDxYdQbswU7d5un2SiKNxnwqIB14qnkk74tB9tcQo5xov3ZpIPLXKkqF7dKv5HmcjznpmqMNXvyZBT1ty2UTn3P4nSIurQHl8o_Gzcu3EACDeHywwLMrBGYACwPJY49IXtzkiDT2dPC8oRQbPKyK-gMFPlweHAQ7RqJuZy5tgs5NQ-saibr66ig6_PS4hj7PuiXKdhms7pE8ZBXW-7kUBisO0XLV4mxwQLMlRHB21gx5e8BfREJwX8NnerN9-TsMEgiVm_2ptC4IPYqrCh_hbBTF_hLF_XVx3eVrXLAIGYQYSGvGJfFvMyQvg8IzHw5-ZQiAzCZAf3dDRC1q5JmPwdM2BWVzr5Lzu4YprJSNuzg_uOFLEaDA7Ck9xtnJr1xjh-2PHLwQyKdvuDrYloyvv_z5U9fORPS-_38HdqzljmOQFrWk95iZakoMgeZj0ZulTDRiFvITMxg2xbrjbOahHFfZAqM7Cwdw2savUS3-IVz3wv8Qdgy21fZxctB8h85SbCpPbyPU6LSpj4UYb0wa1mwuFPdu9tj0S1uBOLAVptfIkjJS76X7AfuzcR8RG_zUKNBzcDaQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend – You’re probably getting lots of emails asking for donations from politicians.
---
_But this email is a bit different._
Most of those other emails start off by asking YOU to donate and then guilt you into reaching for your wallet.
I refuse to play that game. Instead, I’m starting by telling you what _I’ve_ done.
**I personally put $2.5 MILLION toward saving our House Majority last cycle – __not__ for my own re-election or to defend myself from Soros prosecutors who were SUING me.**
_That was money to help conservative candidates WIN their toss-up battleground races!_
_Just like President Trump, I firmly believe elected officials need to put skin in the game._
_**If I’m going to ask you to give, then I better do it too!**_
Honest to God, if you cannot give right now, please don’t. You can just stop reading here.
[**_But if you can give, we’re going to need all of the help in the country we can get, because we’ve got an emergency on our hands._**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b2dedfc2ac954be4a301a1519e210eab&_e=qvlKcHwYgvsii9xDxYdQbswU7d5un2SiKNxnwqIB14qnkk74tB9tcQo5xov3ZpIPLXKkqF7dKv5HmcjznpmqMNXvyZBT1ty2UTn3P4nSIurQHl8o_Gzcu3EACDeHywwLMrBGYACwPJY49IXtzkiDT2dPC8oRQbPKyK-gMFPlweHAQ7RqJuZy5tgs5NQ-saibVQzq4QcTFcN7Q5awEti0tCup6VvXBTwmgOlt7APlgF234agixc-Vh7ny0incB3e6zXFNlLKzyKRQPQOtsPdPHPjMLSWfWPwp3I3uyo1zLEDRCjokGvBZNrhiO4XUcwKbCpFvoGP1CHRBOxM-ggJuEn586EtMTp3aGJaJfXkN5caOugIDVf4tvf2V_3aNwQgFndoM93230O6Z9pCuJytDNkksRdz6SnvlvToQR3-IVE3CvjwcrrNo88GI8H4lcfZhbvweoAnMU4OqAPrtsXCeCS32xVjeiHZrbajEPazzMTG_YHbkAMtu1xd-fUEVbYfC54pecx-iUEs5TvxVDKFQIwfDGV3v5EvfbirygJlm9u7dshhOIXIUlgcQ7jN2exaKbkzSaAptxJJ9DznI9Lr9wg%3D%3D)
**After losing back-to-back special elections, we’re ONLY 1 SEAT over the _bare_ _minimum_ _threshold_ to declare a Majority in the House!**
_And now even Obama is coming for our Achilles’ Heel – launching his _own_ $2.5 MILLION campaign to flip the House._
_**I’ll be honest with you: after we shifted funds away from my own campaign, we don’t have the funds necessary to stop Obama.**_
But with YOUR help right now, we can fight back and win.
We’re going to prove that here in America, elections are still decided by We the People.
[**So please, make a contribution, and together, let’s save the People’s House now that our majority is hanging by a thread.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=b2dedfc2ac954be4a301a1519e210eab&_e=qvlKcHwYgvsii9xDxYdQbswU7d5un2SiKNxnwqIB14qnkk74tB9tcQo5xov3ZpIPLXKkqF7dKv5HmcjznpmqMNXvyZBT1ty2UTn3P4nSIurQHl8o_Gzcu3EACDeHywwLMrBGYACwPJY49IXtzkiDT2dPC8oRQbPKyK-gMFPlweHAQ7RqJuZy5tgs5NQ-saibFDUKMK9oeZDezGh5i8v4sP0rnbYZoWztmpidMLdn6GuMy8vMnhk5irDbpZDhCh4pDJvJIimiXUMSJV3Izf86AdOPGCx_YLzERHKluf-o3tI6rN2K60M98R9Kn4xYiFfzO7TYPfSIr0E1jptG3g9fmw8PBICKirJPcQL6bTuIoA8NdVe3xvgamahHCzaBie04BND-PH2CBVPBeMTsb-Cgfe3_IHwk1gTojMNatbdOKXVhz6OMAS-rGEWiTtgk9cO1Kdq6lnIJeHUrHmyulM5CxEJMhVj_6tc0xCKGvqpMnWY8j7bA0pxWnCeRCu7tEgr2t7u5YbUdFmlFqFYL9Zy-E9hcyEbUnIidM8pMpOU_PTj0L49AIbj4ecu4Ir4B-9DC1phKDO9oKh4lo6pPBALmVQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: But I promise you this email is different. But I promise you this email is different. | | Friend – You’re probably getting lots of emails asking for donations from politicians. But this email is a bit different. Most of those other emails start off by asking YOU to donate and then guilt you into reaching for your wallet. I refuse to play that game. Instead, I’m starting by telling you what I’ve done. I personally put $2.5 MILLION toward saving our House Majority last cycle – not for my own re-election or to defend myself from Soros prosecutors who were SUING me. That was money to help conservative candidates WIN their toss-up battleground races! Just like President Trump, I firmly believe elected officials need to put skin in the game. If I’m going to ask you to give, then I better do it too! Honest to God, if you cannot give right now, please don’t. You can just stop reading here. After losing back-to-back special elections, we’re ONLY 1 SEAT over the bare minimum threshold to declare a Majority in the House! And now even Obama is coming for our Achilles’ Heel – launching his own $2.5 MILLION campaign to flip the House. I’ll be honest with you: after we shifted funds away from my own campaign, we don’t have the funds necessary to stop Obama. But with YOUR help right now, we can fight back and win. We’re going to prove that here in America, elections are still decided by We the People. Thank you, Jim Jordan P.S. Any amount you can give will truly make a difference. | Paid for by Team Jordan a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed between Jim Jordan for Congress, Buckeye Liberty Fund, and American Liberty Foundation PAC. PO Box 909, Marysville, OH 43040

---
This isn't just a wristband, Friend. It's a symbol. Of conviction.
Of courage.
Of the movement Charlie built. **When you wear it, you're telling the world you stand for America. For faith. For family. For freedom. And for the vision Charlie ignited.** Your donation fuels the next generation of leaders who will defend these values and never surrender. **Give today and we'll put this powerful symbol in your hands as our thank-you.**

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1012&refcode=email-20251011_v&akid=9496%2E5885482%2EQSkP5g ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

This week, as hundreds of National Guard troops from Texas assembled in
Illinois, Trump threatened jail for the Chicago mayor and the Illinois
governor.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?source=email-20251011&t=1062&akid=9496%2E5885482%2EQSkP5g ]Headline: Trump threatens jail for Chicago mayor, Illinois gov. amid
ICE, National Guard tension

This is not a drill. He is using military force to terrorize communities,
silence dissent, and now JAIL local leaders who dare to speak out. If
there’s one thing history’s taught us, it’s that silence in moments like
this is surrender. That’s why, on October 18, we’re working with allies to
organize the largest day of action in our movement’s history: No Kings
Day.

Our goal? To show Trump that these blatant attempts to scare us into
silence will NOT work. Together we will make No Kings Day impossible to
ignore, from front pages to the White House.

As if the ICE raids unfolding in Chicago weren’t terrifying enough,
hundreds of National Guard troops have just arrived in Illinois. As
promised, Trump is using our neighborhoods as “training grounds” for the
military.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?source=email-20251011&t=1061&akid=9496%2E5885482%2EQSkP5g ]Headline: Hundreds of US National Guard troops arrive in Chicago

He’s threatening the rights of states, the freedom of our cities, and the
representatives WE elect. The message is clear: “obey – or else.” We
REFUSE to let this become the new normal.

No Kings Day is our answer – our warning to Trump and his backers that
Americans will not tolerate authoritarianism, military intimidation, or
the criminalization of political opposition.

We have just **7 days** to make history. Our Revolution is organizing
events in big cities and small towns across the country – from massive
rallies to peaceful marches. But we cannot do this alone.

Can you chip in $12, $28 – whatever you can – right now to help us
mobilize thousands? Together we must train volunteers, turn out more
people, and ensure safety at the protests so we can show Trump that our
cities belong to the people.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1055&amount=22&refcode=email-20251011nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9496%2E5885482%2EQSkP5g ]The stakes have never been higher But if we come together, we can make No
Kings Day the largest single-day protest challenging Trump’s attacks on
our democracy. Will you rush a donation to help?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Out-of-state liberals are opening their wallets 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Dear Friend, Our Democrat opponent just announced he raised $240,000 last quarter — and if you look at where that money’s coming from, it’s not from southern Minnesota. It’s liberal donors in New York and California who want to buy this seat and silence conservative voices like ours. They know I am standing up for farmers, families, and fiscal sanity, and that’s precisely why they’re targeting this seat. We can’t afford to get drowned out by a flood of out-of-state cash. Every dollar you chip in today helps Brad be prepared to keep this seat red.
---
| | [Chip in $25 →](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)

| | [Chip in $50 →](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)

| This campaign has always been fueled by grassroots supporters who live here. Not by out of state liberals trying to impose their values on us. Let’s show them that southern Minnesota can’t be bought. Thank you for standing with me, — Brad Finstad P.S. Democrats are watching this race closely. Let’s send a message that our seat isn’t for sale — give now to help us fight the out-of-state liberal machine.

It’s liberal donors in New York and California who want to buy this seat and silence conservative voices like ours. They know I am standing up for farmers, families, and fiscal sanity, and that’s precisely why they’re targeting this seat. We can’t afford to get drowned out by a flood of out-of-state cash. Every dollar you chip in today helps Brad be prepared to keep this seat red. | | | | | | | | | This campaign has always been fueled by grassroots supporters who live here. Not by out of state liberals trying to impose their values on us. Let’s show them that southern Minnesota can’t be bought. Thank you for standing with me, — Brad Finstad P.S. Democrats are watching this race closely. body:
Fear spreads fast, but so does solidarity.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..irMCzgk8cf6oylKqd0NxhykaLglRK7tKSDZecfWBDoM?) for more

# [The Faces of Those Scared Kids Will Stay With Me Forever](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=175873026&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1ODczMDI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjAxOTU0MTgsImV4cCI6MTc2Mjc4NzQxOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MawelqTtaugrWEuxMV_gj9ZSWHnSH6cIbdmMTecdXns)
### Fear spreads fast, but so does solidarity.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Oct 11
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=175873026&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1ODczMDI2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MDE5NTQxOCwiZXhwIjoxNzYyNzg3NDE4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.T5WRoXZdQbtawF9YYJc30uCk1J_Ox5Hfm-PgytTQQq0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=175873026&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc1ODczMDI2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjAxOTU0MTgsImV4cCI6MTc2Mjc4NzQxOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MawelqTtaugrWEuxMV_gj9ZSWHnSH6cIbdmMTecdXns&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

---

_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and pay our new Community Manager a living wage. Paid subscribers make it all possible--just $8/month if you're down to support](https://substack.com/redirect/547ef8ff-1df7-4c12-9033-12b016a31404?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): **_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/547ef8ff-1df7-4c12-9033-12b016a31404?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Yesterday, I got an alert that my son's school was on lockdown because ICE agents were reportedly nearby. I rushed over--like any parent would--not because I was scared for my own kid (he was sick and home yesterday), but because I wanted to be physically present. I wanted families who were in danger to know someone had their back. I wanted to be useful.
When I got there, nothing was happening at that school. But one of my elected officials told me they needed someone at a different school--the one where I serve on the council. I volunteered and drove over. When I arrived, the kids were still out on the playground, eating lunch and enjoying their afternoon. Just as I parked, the school administrators made the call to end recess early --to get the kids inside, keep them safe. There were multiple reports of ICE agents driving around, harassing people. They didn't want the kids to see or get caught up in that.
As I walked up, what stuck with me most were the faces of the older kids--fifth, sixth, seventh graders--who knew something was wrong. You could see it. They didn't feel safe. And honestly, those faces are going to haunt me for a long time. Because one of the few places a kid should _always_ feel safe is at school.
That's part of why school shootings tear at this country's moral fabric--we've refused to do what it takes to keep kids safe in the one place they _have_ to be. Where they're supposed to learn, build connection, and grow into the brilliant human beings they're capable of becoming. That foundation starts in schools, just as much as at home.
And these kids? Some of them were so scared that when I walked up--a large white guy in a vest driving an SUV--they thought I might be with ICE. That's the level of fear we're talking about. Luckily, the teachers knew me and were able to reassure them. But that shouldn't even be a thing.
Like I've written before, these are some of the worst emotions, the worst fears, the hardest moments--ones that show the worst of what humanity is capable of. But they also show the best.
Because the best part was: I wasn't the only one who showed up.
* * *
_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and pay our new Community Manager a living wage. Paid subscribers make it all possible--just $8/month if you're down to support](https://substack.com/redirect/547ef8ff-1df7-4c12-9033-12b016a31404?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): **_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/547ef8ff-1df7-4c12-9033-12b016a31404?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Another guy from the neighborhood I'd never met--who doesn't even have kids at the school--came and stood with me for about 30 minutes. I can't say for sure, but I think we might have scared off an ICE vehicle that was circling. You never know.
And part of the problem right now in Chicago is the rumors, the false reports, the chaos. And that chaos is being driven from the top--from the White House to Homeland Security to ICE--and it's filtering all the way down. It's infecting every part of the city, creating this anxiety for just about everybody.
I stayed out there for two and a half, maybe three hours. By pickup time, I had to go. But what started with just me and that one guy turned into a group of 20, maybe 25 people. Folks who heard what was happening--some worried about their kids, some just community members. But all of them willing to stand outside, put their bodies on the line to make sure those families and kids felt safe, just in case ICE came back.
And yeah, maybe you're reading this thinking, "ICE can't go to public schools." And technically, you're right.
But they _are_. Or they're trying. And if they thought they could get away with it, they would absolutely go inside.
I know that because there's a video going around--maybe you've seen it--of a woman being dragged out of her car in a school pickup line by ICE. It's one of the scarier things I've watched this week. And that woman? She was a legal resident. Didn't matter to them. That's how they treated her. Because ICE is targeting people indiscriminately, based on skin color.
That is not justice. That's racial profiling. And it's fucking disgusting.
So as I've reflected this week on how to be useful, I think I've found my lane. I'm going to do whatever I can to secure these schools and support the others in my neighorhood that are being targeted.
I'm talking to elected officials about hosting a large Know Your Rights event, so families are informed and empowered. We're talking about printing out cards people can carry and hand out--something tangible, something simple so they know their rights. We're working on systems to rapidly communicate ICE activity, and rally support where it's needed most.
We're figuring out how to ease the fear--how to make sure parents don't feel like they have to drop their kids off three blocks away, or that they can't even go to the grocery store. We're talking about food drop-offs, check-ins, just showing up.
This is what I mean when I talk about a million acts of resistance.
Because this story isn't about me. I was just one guy who showed up. The beauty is: I wasn't alone. The community showed up.
And from what I've heard, it wasn't just this school. It happened at others, too. Rumors of ICE circling led to parents and neighbors showing up in force--to stand guard, to make it known that these families aren't alone. That we see them. That we'll do everything we can to protect them.
Because legal status? That's a piece of paper. And frankly, I don't give a damn about the paper.
I want secure borders. I want violent criminals out. But I also want a real path to citizenship for the people already here--people who are _part_ of our communities, who work hard, who deserve to live without fear of harassment from their own government.
And the kids? Many of them don't know any other home than this one. They sure as hell don't deserve the trauma and fear being inflicted on them by Trump and ICE.
It's a scary moment in this country. And I don't know exactly where we go from here. I honestly think it's going to get worse before we see the sun again.
But we _will_ see it again.
We're going to turn the page on this dark chapter in American history. We're going to make damn sure it never happens again. And we're going to hold the people responsible for this mess accountable--for what they've done to this country, these families, these kids.
And Chicago--the city I love--will not back down.
We will organize peacefully. We will protect our neighbors. And our spirits will _not_ be broken by the size of the task ahead.
So go find your small act of resistance today.
And hey--it's Saturday. It's okay if that act includes watching your favorite college football team win. I know I'll be doing that. Recharging.
Make sure you do that too. We need you out there.
And hopefully, I'll see some of you at the No King's Rally on October 18th.
I hear it's gonna be a big one.
Give 'em hell.

name: Team Ilhan
subject: Add your vote: Should Congress be BANNED from trading stocks?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Right now, members of Congress are allowed to trade stocks despite having access to insider information
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1882%2E791427%2Eul16EL)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-oct25-stock-trading/?source=em251011-1-90&akid=1882%2E791427%2Eul16EL)
Friend: We want to know what you think.
Right now, members of Congress are allowed to trade stocks despite having access to insider information — something that is illegal for every other American.
So we have a simple question for you: Should there be a ban on stock trading for members of Congress? Vote here:
**[YES](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-oct25-stock-trading/?source=em251011-1-90&akid=1882%2E791427%2Eul16EL)**
**[NO](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-oct25-stock-trading/?source=em251011-1-90&akid=1882%2E791427%2Eul16EL)**
**[I'M NOT SURE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-oct25-stock-trading/?source=em251011-1-90&akid=1882%2E791427%2Eul16EL)**
Just think about it. Congress deals with the most pressing issues of our time, making policy decisions that can shift the stock market and change the economic situation of this country.
Consider this government shutdown — Republicans knew that their planned budget cuts would shut down hundreds of rural hospitals while driving up the price of health insurance, lining the pockets of private insurance companies.
There’s nothing stopping them from quietly taking all of their investments out of hospital networks, investing that money into private insurance companies, and making a fortune when the stock market reacts to their budget cuts.
This is one of the biggest ways in which the oligarchs in charge in Washington get rich off the backs of the American people. It’s corrupt, dishonest, and erodes trust in the entire system.
So we want to show that a vast majority of Americans agree that it’s time to ban stock trading in Congress.
**[Tell us what you think! Head to Ilhan Omar’s poll and make your voice heard.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-oct25-stock-trading/?source=em251011-1-90&akid=1882%2E791427%2Eul16EL)**
**[MAKE YOUR VOTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-oct25-stock-trading/?source=em251011-1-90&akid=1882%2E791427%2Eul16EL)**
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1882%2E791427%2Eul16EL)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1882_791427_ul16EL&akid=1882%2E791427%2Eul16EL)**.

name: Dan Freeman (via Democrats.org)
subject: A message from the DNC’s Litigation Director -
body:
---
Hi Derek, It’s Dan Freeman, the Litigation Director at the DNC. I’m a former Department of Justice attorney, and a few months ago, I joined the DNC to help protect your right to vote. Here’s my story: I spent almost 15 years at DOJ as a voting rights lawyer. I was a civil servant, and I loved enforcing the Voting Rights Act on behalf of the American people. I helped stop voter purges in Alabama and gerrymandering in Texas. But everything changed when President Trump returned to the White House. They forced out brilliant lawyers. Directed us to drop crucial cases. And now, DOJ is standing by as the Republican Party attacks a law that prevents trading massive campaign donations for political favors. So here at the DNC, we’re stepping up where DOJ is refusing to act. We’re going to use legal action to enforce voting rights laws when states around the country violate them, and we’ll intervene and defend your right to vote when the Republican Party tries to make it harder for you to cast a ballot that will be counted. **That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation to help fund the DNC’s legal work today.** By donating $7 today you’ll help us make investments in legal work that will have an impact for years to come. You’ll also help us send a message to the Republican Party that any attempt to pick and choose their voters won’t go unanswered. [Chip in today to help fund the DNC’s legal work and fight for every vote to be counted. Too much is at stake to lose this battle →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?refcode=em_20251011_4792_fr&amount=7&refcode2=4839_22930333_t8FHZC&akid=4839%2E22930333%2Et8FHZC) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251011_4792_fr&refcode2=4839_22930333_t8FHZC&akid=4839%2E22930333%2Et8FHZC)**

name: AOTL
subject: 10 seats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Fighting on all these fronts requires enormous resources — and we can’t afford to pull back anywhere.
|
---

Peter.
As you read this, our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), is [**involved in court cases in five states that could decide the makeup of 10 congressional districts in the 2026 midterms. These cases are ongoing, and those of us in the fair maps movement need to be ready to respond to any court-ordered changes.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117095533/575333096/2109033857?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_Backstop_email_20251011-AOTL-Tier1-Backstop_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251011-AOTL-Tier1-Backstop_&utm_campaign=Backstop&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3Yjc1MWYzLWIyYTYtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4v4zGWtPpv0UtIT8f_M8V1XaEYx2sZOKNxbjUOx-JTc=)
When courts make changes, we need to be ready to respond and provide voters the information they need to make their voice heard. It’s not hyperbole to say that our work over the next few weeks could determine a lot about the lay of the land heading into the midterm elections.
The courts are an underappreciated tool for fighting back to preserve our democracy. That’s why All On The Line’s affiliates are filling this gap and stepping up to fight this battle in the courts, and why All On The Line closely monitors those cases to provide updates and be poised to respond.
**We know that our justice system is the final backstop of our democracy — a powerful complement to the grassroots work we’re proud to lead. We have to be able to get the word out when our courts protect voters, and respond to any changes that may happen from litigation. We can’t afford to let up at a moment when so much is at stake.**
[**You have the power to support our pro-democracy organizing today. Help us continue to pursue fairness in our democratic system — no matter what craven politicians in state legislatures and Washington do next.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117095536/575333097/2109033857?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_Backstop_email_20251011-AOTL-Tier1-Backstop_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251011-AOTL-Tier1-Backstop_&utm_campaign=Backstop&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA3Yjc1MWYzLWIyYTYtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4v4zGWtPpv0UtIT8f_M8V1XaEYx2sZOKNxbjUOx-JTc=)

In Texas, the NRF and its affiliates are fighting in court against the mid-decade gerrymander that discriminates against Black and Brown Texans and was drawn at the direction of Donald Trump.
In Missouri, NRF-supported plaintiffs filed a legal challenge against the state’s new, mid-decade congressional gerrymander the moment the governor signed it into law.
And in Louisiana, Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act is at stake in a critical Supreme Court case that could determine the fate of a congressional seat, not to mention the legal cornerstone of the fair maps movement.
**Meanwhile, states across the nation are under pressure from Washington to force through their own mid-decade redraws. Fighting back against this pressure and being ready to respond to new court decisions with grassroots power requires enormous resources, and we can’t afford to come up short anywhere.**

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: eleven days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
Peter, I want to give you a peek behind the curtain.

---
| | Peter, rather than address the healthcare crisis they created, House Republicans are on vacation in the midst of a government shutdown they caused. They’re hiding because they know their positions are indefensible. Republicans are willing to jack up the cost of healthcare for 20 MILLION hardworking Americans, all so their billionaire allies get a tax break. It’s despicable. I have one message for them: Do your job. Democrats are ready to work and we will NOT back down. We are committed to reopening the government and lowering healthcare costs for hardworking Americans. Keep the faith, Hakeem

clean_body: Peter, I want to give you a peek behind the curtain. | | Peter, rather than address the healthcare crisis they created, House Republicans are on vacation in the midst of a government shutdown they caused. They’re hiding because they know their positions are indefensible. Republicans are willing to jack up the cost of healthcare for 20 MILLION hardworking Americans, all so their billionaire allies get a tax break. It’s despicable. I have one message for them: Do your job. Democrats are ready to work and we will NOT back down. We are committed to reopening the government and lowering healthcare costs for hardworking Americans. Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. Jeffries for Congress PO BOX 65322 Washington, DC 20035 United States | mailto:info@hakeemjeffries.com | | | Paid for by Jeffries for Congress

subject: Culture is resistance – and it’s winning

body:
| | | Peter Before we get into it — here’s the move: **[Pledge to watch Bad Bunny at the Super Bowl.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIewuyjyAfuswR9y9SJ-tpLYA0xGgZdiHHL1A69ccW0DoAuB5Z_7akvHxD8S6wPckEABH_-Ng4SuA-xSvqzDwS4usgqRqKOkpku8KmxX2XBSW0AAaev2uxKdW6AOXwbfvcoXoTnv1Bm61czBbxAlN_G8BHbGgnFxiAgTcTGC1-7mBb5yqPHPebtgkpVSsWGl1jAPJuTnfl4ieCMjSLNkR4TCuOEO-cliSVbBiDtmqEccG276N6YGB6XmXIrZV3j-rIJDKO-5cZLb2FpxEj2WJ_E6IgZ7mNvJkba_wY5DZVfvaOdJVA5tzG2c8ENOkQEXuy-0tFSTvH0PDkjsppCegxS/4kn/W405xi4hRpmJqXEMZOxyow/h0/h001.PtZaSZ3bzfzq1JSUgn-pdJFCadXuIeuorQ4NdMpXl20)** If we hit 10,000 signatures, we’ll host community Super Bowl watch parties across the country — celebrating Boricua pride, culture, and our collective resistance. **[Pledge to watch](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIewuyjyAfuswR9y9SJ-tpLYA0xGgZdiHHL1A69ccW0DoAuB5Z_7akvHxD8S6wPckEABH_-Ng4SuA-xSvqzDwS4usgqRqKOkpku8KmxX2XBSW0AAaev2uxKdW6AOXwbfvcoXoTnv1Bm61czBbxAlN_GxF3fNBLzcy1IlqWz6-RA-fjReO_QNjmhz9dEAjbs1C_RNwbvK3ihKeyYYk1JQFikC3n5lUtGqGy7kJ7B8-q7E2nyd84PWeOSff5PE14xf8aNUKhHLT6By4vxLVNkgKjEwrkkqIsTk3VFPdtNUCSUlx_yap-PJVwIT_uoLRmUXx4rs9q7qZRFIzN-INokTTOu/4kn/W405xi4hRpmJqXEMZOxyow/h1/h001.tMba4yoVOB3gfWgI2OndnZNntJzF27lxOXonCrMFUFg)** Here’s why: _Billboard_ just announced that Bad Bunny will be honored as the Top Latin Artist of the 21st Century at the 2025 Billboard Latin Music Awards — a title earned through record-breaking music, movement, and pride. And at the same time? Team MAGA is melting down because the NFL chose him to headline the Super Bowl Halftime Show. Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem said the NFL “won’t be able to rest.” Mike Johnson called it “terrible.” President Trump said, “I don’t know who he is.” Let’s be honest — it’s not about the music. It’s about a powerful, proud, Puerto Rican refusing to perform for their politics. Last week on _Saturday Night Live_ , Bad Bunny spoke in Spanish:
> "To all Latinos and Latinas around the world and here in the United States, to all the people who have worked to open doors — more than just my achievement, it's everyone's achievement, proving that no one can ever erase our mark and our contribution to this country."
Those words hit home. Just a few days earlier, on September 20, my Puerto Rican family lost our matriarch — my Abuela Zenaida, who was 97 years old. I think about her strength, how hard she worked to build a life for our family. I think about what family and community mean to Latinos everywhere — and how often we are denied our full humanity in this country. So when Bad Bunny took that stage, I felt pride. Because our stories, our love, and our power deserve to be seen. When Bad Bunny speaks Spanish on _SNL_ , that’s liberation. When he turns down U.S. tour dates under Trump’s deportation agenda, that’s resistance. When he headlines the biggest show on Earth, that’s _our joy — and they can’t stand it._ Now MAGA world is planning their own “alternative" halftime show. So we're drowning out their hate by coming together to support Boricua culture, community, and joy. Will you join us? **[Pledge to watch Bad Bunny at the Super Bowl.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIewuyjyAfuswR9y9SJ-tpLYA0xGgZdiHHL1A69ccW0DoAuB5Z_7akvHxD8S6wPckEABH_-Ng4SuA-xSvqzDwS4usgqRqKOkpku8KmxX2XBSW0AAaev2uxKdW6AOXwbfvcoXoTnv1Bm61czBbxAlN_Gv2WOF5QrFF0WJRT3v599j5cLoQQqeV0ahzty7pv2g7dJdePUXPfKXVLWLFA3w1Sj0M7xIfz4PlpI5LLGvdiHWngTxJBe0FT-TNo3jWj_ktKT7Y7CWAkOQ0AxzNKffSVwrAIXcG6-P5m0ujTy-N_Uj9D8mombxZUpl7vis3Lu4lm04TvDdtmj_15eWPMaCODE/4kn/W405xi4hRpmJqXEMZOxyow/h2/h001.p1LLWJCRBUwJknRqrPG8Hb8N-_G5Cwk_Cf2He4PD1EE) ** [Pledge to watch](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIewuyjyAfuswR9y9SJ-tpLYA0xGgZdiHHL1A69ccW0DoAuB5Z_7akvHxD8S6wPckEABH_-Ng4SuA-xSvqzDwS4usgqRqKOkpku8KmxX2XBSW0AAaev2uxKdW6AOXwbfvcoXoTnv1Bm61czBbxAlN_G8oL0DkSdacl0KvlRa3PH2E5CcUYAxkD-4Zg5ZpwN8a-721wdR-r8SR4Sqd7bmVPqlxGnHAKwtY4i59ZDv2BAxhrPTtzoYok-96RN8Y5duqqUn0u1rVGeZJpRnvl0aXGN3tsGf3MbBAobPyLv68cE8gv6XBqltKDHrioDwMdzVOtyQi676Mu_boGMcRzPTcAi/4kn/W405xi4hRpmJqXEMZOxyow/h3/h001.9x7OObCNdpVOvhbplfw73fdiWPkHct9nSa-Xc_9f8xU) Because when we show up in joy, we show our power. They can’t cancel that. En solidaridad, Nelini Stamp

clean_body: | | | Peter Before we get into it — here’s the move: If we hit 10,000 signatures, we’ll host community Super Bowl watch parties across the country — celebrating Boricua pride, culture, and our collective resistance. Here’s why: Billboard just announced that Bad Bunny will be honored as the Top Latin Artist of the 21st Century at the 2025 Billboard Latin Music Awards — a title earned through record-breaking music, movement, and pride. And at the same time? Team MAGA is melting down because the NFL chose him to headline the Super Bowl Halftime Show. Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem said the NFL “won’t be able to rest.” Mike Johnson called it “terrible.” President Trump said, “I don’t know who he is.” Let’s be honest — it’s not about the music. It’s about a powerful, proud, Puerto Rican refusing to perform for their politics. Last week on Saturday Night Live , Bad Bunny spoke in Spanish: "To all Latinos and Latinas around the world and here in the United States, to all the people who have worked to open doors — more than just my achievement, it's everyone's achievement, proving that no one can ever erase our mark and our contribution to this country." Those words hit home. Just a few days earlier, on September 20, my Puerto Rican family lost our matriarch — my Abuela Zenaida, who was 97 years old. I think about her strength, how hard she worked to build a life for our family. I think about what family and community mean to Latinos everywhere — and how often we are denied our full humanity in this country. So when Bad Bunny took that stage, I felt pride. Because our stories, our love, and our power deserve to be seen. When Bad Bunny speaks Spanish on SNL , that’s liberation. When he turns down U.S. tour dates under Trump’s deportation agenda, that’s resistance. When he headlines the biggest show on Earth, that’s our joy — and they can’t stand it. Now MAGA world is planning their own “alternative" halftime show. So we're drowning out their hate by coming together to support Boricua culture, community, and joy. Will you join us? Because when we show up in joy, we show our power. They can’t cancel that. En solidaridad, Nelini Stamp Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via .
