#
Peter —
Texas’ U.S. Senate seat is in play.
Another Republican in addition to Ken Paxton entered the race to challenge John Cornyn this week.
Politico is calling their primary “a multi-stage train wreck in the most expensive state on the map in the midterms.”
We need to take advantage of this moment and build a strong foundation now.
[**Can you contribute $5 to build on James’ momentum and help us flip Texas’ U.S. Senate seat? We can't afford to slow down.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251011-1-ak&t=1&akid=105%2E1347274%2EzMsJDt)

name: Team Haaland
subject: New Mexico is standing with Deb
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
BREAKING: Deb Haaland just broke New Mexico records to qualify for the 2026 ballot.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4960%2E400544%2EDXb43v)
We just made history.
In less than 24 hours, our campaign secured **2,505 nominating signatures** — the fastest any campaign has ever qualified for the ballot in New Mexico history.
**That means Deb is officially on the 2026 primary ballot,** and our campaign has more momentum than ever before. While we broke records overnight, it was the culmination of months of hard work and support — we couldn’t have done it without you!
Deb has spent this year traveling to all 33 counties, meeting and talking with New Mexicans in every corner of the state. She’s showing up to fight alongside workers demanding fair wages, support families impacted by addiction, and stand with doctors working to keep care accessible in our communities.
Everywhere she goes, Deb meets New Mexicans who are working hard but still struggling to get by. Healthcare is too expensive and hard to access, wages are stuck while costs rise, communities are dealing with crime, and public schools are struggling.
Together, we’re building a movement to change that and create the future New Mexico deserves. **And we can’t do it without you.**
New Mexico is a big state, and running a winning campaign here requires serious resources. The toughest stretch of this campaign is just beginning, and national Republicans will spend millions to stop Deb and her bold vision for New Mexico.
We can't let that happen, and we’re counting on your grassroots support to make sure it doesn’t. Deb doesn’t come from wealth — this campaign is powered by support from everyday folks.
**[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to keep building our momentum all the way to victory in November 2026?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251011_1_history.6Fy8et&amount=5&refcode=em20251011-4960&t=2&akid=4960%2E400544%2EDXb43v)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251011_1_history.6Fy8et&amount=5&refcode=em20251011-4960&t=21&akid=4960%2E400544%2EDXb43v)**
Let’s continue to make history together.
Thank you for your support,
Team Haaland
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251011-1&t=22&refcode2=4960_400544_DXb43v&akid=4960%2E400544%2EDXb43v)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=23&akid=4960%2E400544%2EDXb43v)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=24&akid=4960%2E400544%2EDXb43v)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

body:
Republicans lied about health care. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117097227/575337615/823540626?refcode=ea.4426ea7b-b5a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.4426ea7b-b5a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDI2ZWE3Yi1iNWE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lhKmzwKTqPuaKZhZR7d9Jv5SiD-nif9rTimQjm-XFEo=&emci=90b8d393-e7a5-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=4426ea7b-b5a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17205535)
Imagine this, Peter: You trip on the stairs and land badly on an ankle. You think it’s a sprain — but it’s just not healing. You know you should go to the doctor. You know an X-ray is in the cards. _But you don’t have health care coverage. You’d have to pay out of pocket. And if you do that, you might not be able to pay the rent._ Peter, one accident, one trip to the doctor — it should never break the bank. That’s why leaders like Roy Cooper have fought so hard for so long to expand access to the affordable health care coverage that people deserve, including by getting a bipartisan deal on Medicaid Expansion for more than 675,000 North Carolinians. Now, millions of Americans will lose coverage under the GOP’s plan. **Look, Republicans in Washington swore up and down that they wouldn’t mess with our health care._They lied._ And we’re the ones who’ll bear the burden.** **[We have to stand up and fight for our RIGHT to health care, Peter. We’re looking for 1,000 signatures today to tell Republicans to take their hands off our health care. Add your name beside Roy’s >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117097230/575337619/53927420?refcode=ea.4426ea7b-b5a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.4426ea7b-b5a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDI2ZWE3Yi1iNWE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lhKmzwKTqPuaKZhZR7d9Jv5SiD-nif9rTimQjm-XFEo=&emci=90b8d393-e7a5-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=4426ea7b-b5a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17205535)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117097233/575337622/53927420?refcode=ea.4426ea7b-b5a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.4426ea7b-b5a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDI2ZWE3Yi1iNWE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lhKmzwKTqPuaKZhZR7d9Jv5SiD-nif9rTimQjm-XFEo=&emci=90b8d393-e7a5-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=4426ea7b-b5a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17205535)

clean_body: Republicans lied about health care. | Imagine this, Peter: You trip on the stairs and land badly on an ankle. You think it’s a sprain — but it’s just not healing. You know you should go to the doctor. You know an X-ray is in the cards. But you don’t have health care coverage. You’d have to pay out of pocket. And if you do that, you might not be able to pay the rent. Peter, one accident, one trip to the doctor — it should never break the bank. That’s why leaders like Roy Cooper have fought so hard for so long to expand access to the affordable health care coverage that people deserve, including by getting a bipartisan deal on Medicaid Expansion for more than 675,000 North Carolinians. Now, millions of Americans will lose coverage under the GOP’s plan. Look, Republicans in Washington swore up and down that they wouldn’t mess with our health care.They lied. And we’re the ones who’ll bear the burden. | Thanks for taking action, Team Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Sign my petition: American cities are NOT military zones
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9064%2E5257348%2EoisPHn)
Derek, let’s get one thing straight:
American cities are _not_ military zones.
They are not at war with our country or each other. They are not the enemy within.
They are not military backdrops for presidential photo ops.
The military is there to defend us against foreign threats, and the National Guard can step up during natural disasters like forest fires or hurricanes.
Not this sh*t.
**And yet Trump is calling for our military to use our cities as “training grounds.” He claims he’s trying to keep us safe, but we all know he’s just trying to get a photo op and play tough guy. That’s why I’m asking:**
**[Will you add your name alongside mine in the fight against Trump's misuse of our military? This abuse of power is clear, illegal, and unconstitutional — we can’t let him get away with it.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202510-military.Qngjm2&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20251011_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=9064%2E5257348%2EoisPHn)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202510-military.Qngjm2&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20251011_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=5&akid=9064%2E5257348%2EoisPHn)
---
Donald Trump made his true motives for the deployment of our military in Los Angeles plain. Instead of improving safety, he is focused on spectacle; instead of protecting Americans, he is punishing cities and states he believes are against him.
Trump’s abuse of power is clear, illegal, and unconstitutional.
Enough is enough, Derek. **[Sign my petition to fight back against Trump’s misuse of our military now.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1024?c0=engagement-202510-military.Qngjm2&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20251011_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=6&akid=9064%2E5257348%2EoisPHn) **
I can’t thank you enough for standing with me in the face of these threats to our democracy and our safety.
With gratitude and urgency,
Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20251011_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=9064%2E5257348%2EoisPHn)

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: The Trump administration is weaponizing the government to defeat me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team,
It’s Mikie Sherrill. With just a few weeks left until Election Day for New Jersey’s governor race, I asked my friends at GIFFORDS to send you an important update:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sherrill-2025.jXoHhP&refcode=em251011-1-b&t=1&akid=10951%2E3935704%2ErnPEPk)
**CBS News is reporting that the Trump administration improperly released my personal records from my time in the Navy. It’s a shameful attempt to smear my record.**
This is a wildly unprecedented — and blatantly illegal — weaponization of the federal government. All part of an effort to ensure that the president’s preferred candidate wins an election.
These military records detail my early life, and go so far as to include my Social Security number and insurance records. There are supposed to be several layers of checks set up to prevent something like this.
This isn’t just about me. Any member of the United States military that the Trump administration sees as an enemy can have their personal data exposed.
And it’s incredibly dangerous.
[**Donald Trump and MAGA extremists have shown that they will stop at nothing to defeat me. So I’m asking: please rush a split donation to my campaign and GIFFORDS PAC and help me fight back against the attempts to smear my name >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sherrill-2025.jXoHhP&refcode=em251011-1-b&t=2&akid=10951%2E3935704%2ErnPEPk)

| | | **The Insurrection Act talk isn’t abstract. It’s a roadmap to militarize our communities.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6JT2e6-gM7kf7A7fsl5ASH2TKhNBzrZcJ05Yf-z-TQGPYFa86PDa3okckoX2CuyjYNiAkP2sPFKfBKTGHofJhpSmlpKVTkrGGSuJBUoYx6DM7W9E79d3rwx9Nq0ZLid8MjKtA89KxwqTmCB6IdNc9BONqk-3BL-OaCyjaIONF6HvoihVvjMWst_5nmdyWpov2JO3jwmO-jN9XvZgIjnHdPxVgEJwK5IgSjPVdiqU2fwPywWVcp7N6ecdUmVojb5dK6omonZlS_M5NJJ3e_EWR7EOKmIKnT03VKQ2VmcK_bFgL4encE0vOYeyRXtvtM5FY_hH496AYi7Cf3wHTAnm80k/4kn/t2329UwNT1CtTHN2p91_rw/h0/h001.Xg9YUK8QEDUdVDXYR8IVfdC8QffAf4QsiMcdhNzr8_Q)**[Donate now to fight back against Trump lackey Ian Lovejoy. Let’s stop this here in Virginia.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviOe6wF9anNgAGC4E18pFY-ZUp-We6F-KqFtlEoPAIuHQdO4bKoasiPL2qZ_8_3s-AYckEfLQOTH6pqF0Fo8C4UO0ay5uLOaFffGdnEdQPqQg8OhSXExPwERUzT7EeFvssbOv36sULoZYFiUB2YYMZPNtFwmtyvjHpsWo70_cEneU6NAQUo-T8Af37Q_Nki-HfVCO2LZz80BiWR7An-Y5VK5oZxggD3eoDNUxLwhRFJ39bnTfmH4txIydpddiEqcaS8aSrk-naO_dqqEGbtMBU2AcKhlNkwB9YrYNg-KuHcice5lkwd-HtqGKcPsJCXYqvENTSfVDxa2muf01sUnXHSs/4kn/t2329UwNT1CtTHN2p91_rw/h1/h001.fdRRXl2TQrZUTgAuW3bMZo_XJSuhgrAb0A-bXqHyyl0)**
* * *
**** Friend — Axios just reported that Donald Trump is openly considering using the Insurrection Act to force National Guard deployments into states and cities — even where governors and courts say no. He’s already sent troops to the West Coast and Chicago. Judges have temporarily stepped in, but he’s threatening to overrule them next. **Don’t sit idly by –**** _he is putting every one of us in grave danger._** This is what authoritarian drift looks like: send federal forces into our neighborhoods, sideline state leaders, and steamroll the courts. As a mom, a social worker, and a longtime public servant, I know exactly who gets hurt first when politics turns into punishment — **_working families, immigrants, and communities of color._** My opponent? He’s running as a pro-Trump rubber stamp: Cheering the agenda, echoing the rhetoric, and never breaking with the party when it counts. clean_body: | | | The Insurrection Act talk isn’t abstract. It’s a roadmap to militarize our communities. Friend — Axios just reported that Donald Trump is openly considering using the Insurrection Act to force National Guard deployments into states and cities — even where governors and courts say no. He’s already sent troops to the West Coast and Chicago. Judges have temporarily stepped in, but he’s threatening to overrule them next. Don’t sit idly by –** he is putting every one of us in grave danger. This is what authoritarian drift looks like: send federal forces into our neighborhoods, sideline state leaders, and steamroll the courts. As a mom, a social worker, and a longtime public servant, I know exactly who gets hurt first when politics turns into punishment — working families, immigrants, and communities of color. My opponent? He’s running as a pro-Trump rubber stamp: Cheering the agenda, echoing the rhetoric, and never breaking with the party when it counts. Peter, President Trump’s fascist actions continue to escalate, first sending the National Guard to LA and DC, and now to Portland and Chicago. And he won’t stop there — every city run by Democrats are in his crosshairs, including New York City. This is illegal, unconstitutional, and downright un-American. To no one’s surprise, we’ve heard nothing but crickets from congressional Republicans — including all seven of New York’s members of the House — about Trump’s authoritarian power grab. Instead, Republicans are focused on accusing Democrats like me who accurately characterize Trump’s actions as fascist, authoritarian or dictatorial of being the cause for the rising political violence across the country. I forcefully condemn any kind of political violence, but false assertions like those designed to silence me will not work. clean_body: | Peter, President Trump’s fascist actions continue to escalate, first sending the National Guard to LA and DC, and now to Portland and Chicago. And he won’t stop there — every city run by Democrats are in his crosshairs, including New York City. This is illegal, unconstitutional, and downright un-American. To no one’s surprise, we’ve heard nothing but crickets from congressional Republicans — including all seven of New York’s members of the House — about Trump’s authoritarian power grab. Instead, Republicans are focused on accusing Democrats like me who accurately characterize Trump’s actions as fascist, authoritarian or dictatorial of being the cause for the rising political violence across the country. I forcefully condemn any kind of political violence, but false assertions like those designed to silence me will not work. I will continue to aggressively call out Trump’s routine efforts to become a dictator and I won’t mince words in doing so. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

You already know the threat of food shortages, blackouts and supply chain failures is more real than ever. That's why **demand is surging** and thousands have already claimed their **2 Months of FREE Survival Food** with this Exclusive Limited-Time deal. Did you miss out? [**[Hurry – click here to see if this deal is still available]**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=7l656eu0rqrxhm41sxxyay4wbgs29aoufzpcw6yg1qi2g8qgluzk4qs5bzprz77vsn8gienqi00z5oz0pk07zf6bbx2vz8p08qb892tssu6la16iqwms6tvk6y3go4rfpejo28itmohk0uaz2n1rt3dckjn6e62otbinktzohboli8znkpbdvmckz36oq57kfmuzq2250h4ulxum385qw610kt2itnjot12j4pdvo0c64p224g0v8f5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3z4pw&__onlt=h) These food kits are flying off the shelves, selling out time and time again. People are waking up to the truth: you can't count on the system anymore. We gave our warehouse manager, Matt, one mission: **"Produce as many kits as humanly possible!"** And wow... did he ever deliver. The result? **A tidal wave of inventory just crashed into our warehouse – more kits than we have space for.** Now we're on the hook for major storage costs... and we need your help. **This is your chance to take advantage of our mistake.** We're slashing prices and practically *giving away* these premium survival food kits just to move them fast. When you claim yours today, you're not only securing peace of mind for your family, **you're helping an American-owned company stay afloat through a supply chain nightmare.** And yes – **you'll also get a 2 additional FREE BONUSES** as our thank you! [**Click Here To Get Your 2 Months of FREE Survival Food When You Get Our 3-Month Survival Food Kit (Only While Supplies Last!)**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=7l656eu0rqrxhm41sxxyay4wbgs29aoufzpcw6yg1qi2g8qgluzk4qs5bzprz77vsn8gienqi00z5oz0pk07zf6bbx2vz8p08qb892tssu6la16iqwms6tvk6y3go4rfpejo28itmohk0uaz2n1rt3dckjn6e62otbinktzohboli8znkpbdvmckz36oq57kfmuzq2250h4ulxum385qw610kt2itnjot12j4pdvo0c64p224g0v8f5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3z4pw&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=7l656eu0rqrxhm41sxxyay4wbgs29aoufzpcw6yg1qi2g8qgluzk4qs5bzprz77vsn8gienqi00z5oz0pk07zf6bbx2vz8p08qb892tssu6la16iqwms6tvk6y3go4rfpejo28itmohk0uaz2n1rt3dckjn6e62otbinktzohboli8znkpbdvmckz36oq57kfmuzq2250h4ulxum385qw610kt2itnjot12j4pdvo0c64p224g0v8f5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3z4pw&__onlt=h) This is more than just food. It's **freedom in a box.** These 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are loaded with hearty, satisfying meals that are built to last 25 years. [**Click Here To Get Your 2 Months of FREE Survival Food When You Get Our 3-Month Survival Food Kit (Only While Supplies Last!)**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=7l656eu0rqrxhm41sxxyay4wbgs29aoufzpcw6yg1qi2g8qgluzk4qs5bzprz77vsn8gienqi00z5oz0pk07zf6bbx2vz8p08qb892tssu6la16iqwms6tvk6y3go4rfpejo28itmohk0uaz2n1rt3dckjn6e62otbinktzohboli8znkpbdvmckz36oq57kfmuzq2250h4ulxum385qw610kt2itnjot12j4pdvo0c64p224g0v8f5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3z4pw&__onlt=h) That's right – **no junk fillers, no sketchy ingredients** – just real food, crafted for real emergencies. **Get 5 Months of Food, Security & Peace of Mind – All In One Kit** Hand-packed in a small American facility by people who actually care, these meals are designed to keep you nourished, calm, and strong when everything else falls apart. And thanks to the recent upgrades, **these kits contain more food than ever.** It's a massive value – and right now, it's the lowest price you'll ever see. Don't wait for a crisis to wish you had prepared. Right now, this overstock deal gives you the chance to save big, feed your family in an emergency, and protect what matters most. But this inventory won't last long. [**Click Here To Get Your 2 Months of FREE Survival Food When You Get Our 3-Month Survival Food Kit (Only While Supplies Last!)**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=7l656eu0rqrxhm41sxxyay4wbgs29aoufzpcw6yg1qi2g8qgluzk4qs5bzprz77vsn8gienqi00z5oz0pk07zf6bbx2vz8p08qb892tssu6la16iqwms6tvk6y3go4rfpejo28itmohk0uaz2n1rt3dckjn6e62otbinktzohboli8znkpbdvmckz36oq57kfmuzq2250h4ulxum385qw610kt2itnjot12j4pdvo0c64p224g0v8f5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3z4pw&__onlt=h) Stay Safe. Stay Prepared.

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Real People. Real Emergencies. Real Gratitude.** [](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=7l656eu0rqrxhm41sxxyay4wbgs29aoufzpcw6yg1qi2g8qgluzk4qs5bzprz77vsn8gienqi00z5oz0pk07zf6bbx2vz8p08qb892tssu6la16iqwms6tvk6y3go4rfpejo28itmohk0uaz2n1rt3dckjn6e62otbinktzohboli8znkpbdvmckz36oq57kfmuzq2250h4ulxum385qw610kt2itnjot12j4pdvo0c64p224g0v8f5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3z4pw&__onlt=h) **_Rory H._**_
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_ [**Click Here To Get Your 2 Months of FREE Survival Food When You Get Our 3-Month Survival Food Kit (Only While Supplies Last!)**](http://trk.2025battleground.com/?xtl=7l656eu0rqrxhm41sxxyay4wbgs29aoufzpcw6yg1qi2g8qgluzk4qs5bzprz77vsn8gienqi00z5oz0pk07zf6bbx2vz8p08qb892tssu6la16iqwms6tvk6y3go4rfpejo28itmohk0uaz2n1rt3dckjn6e62otbinktzohboli8znkpbdvmckz36oq57kfmuzq2250h4ulxum385qw610kt2itnjot12j4pdvo0c64p224g0v8f5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3z4pw&__onlt=h)

**But Speaker Mike Johnson is refusing to swear her in.**

Why? Because the second Adelita takes her oath, she becomes the 218th signature to force the release of the Epstein files. Johnson doesn’t want that to happen, so he’s blocking her and silencing more than 800,000 Arizonans in the process.

name: Tim Walz

body:
We can’t keep waiting around — we’ve gotta do something.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117098808/575341513/191921471?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2MwNGQ3MS1iOWE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lNCZFDyaK3NWEj1N5HepYOghA2hrE49-frOH4SgGuXM=)
---
Peter,
We can’t keep waiting around — we’ve gotta do something.
Every single kid that’s dead from gun violence is a policy failure. I’m tired of Republican politicians refusing to do ANYTHING to tackle this crisis.
I’m calling on Republicans to hold a public vote on banning assault weapons and high-capacity magazines, because that’s what the majority of Minnesotans want. But instead of taking action, GOP leaders are dragging their feet — and delaying action that would save lives.
Republicans know that people overwhelmingly support these common-sense reforms. That’s why they’d rather talk about anything other than guns.
Minnesotans deserve better than delay tactics and obstruction. Families across our state are demanding action, and they should be able to see where their legislators stand on this issue.
We can’t let the conversation around gun violence go away while Republicans stall. If they refuse to listen to their constituents and take a public vote, they can expect to see me at town halls in their districts — talking to folks affected by the plague of gun violence and standing shoulder to shoulder with Minnesotans calling for change.
[**Will you stand with me today by chipping in $25, $50, or whatever works for you to show that Minnesotans are ready for action and won’t accept anything less?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117098809/575341514/654264339?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2MwNGQ3MS1iOWE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lNCZFDyaK3NWEj1N5HepYOghA2hrE49-frOH4SgGuXM=)

If they refuse to listen to their constituents and take a public vote, they can expect to see me at town halls in their districts — talking to folks affected by the plague of gun violence and standing shoulder to shoulder with Minnesotans calling for change. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I'm grateful, Tim Walz ********=****** = Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose. We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more. = = This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions or gifts to Tim Walz for Governor are not tax deductible. The maximum contribution for 2025-2026 is $4,000 per individual or $8,000 per couple. We cannot accept contributions from corporations or LLCs. We are required to collect and report the employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per year. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor Tim Walz for Governor P.O. body:
Peter, Today is #ComingOutDay. Whether you’re out, thinking about coming out, or not ready right now, I want you to know that your journey is valid. | | | [](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/5Of8sfwpaOS8WztMq7q4Td9Lmm4sR85OwDS9JWgzVVRD0VeZj1WR0cumf_fG3k1NWasQPY6zDJb2i5rV2D514h8tVJdOWTtF6jvZnwrGp85RQIf1ciA8f8cW0HtzjIPMyyVp1CQWcYT_w2EGofKb8tynooDtbD3Tus6Of8fB3oReYc1oEq0L2zi38FB60cRjsnCn4rY8E93Jrv2UAS-rbJm1f95ZDtuJ3csKftaDtLHrSIqVdZvP6RU0pRzypYAzB9IMeV0eaLhXr64a7Wgf-zcMJXybnp_TePeCgTYOWnyN6kaeKAVl83e93vIRCr7b4Euz8tVAl4_tbspFf8YSP5m4Iy2NQrHENkl2kzQRnkcdV68xEOfooNrYEm45k80w6KuKip9EHgb1ZDUSpwWJ2alcZw06D3rtLr4N7_C4ZIajD_OLEMHE1SWGGbKZ9pd_h2nsBSM6YIy4UZ4uCWvsTYXIeWBTWeFK-K-t-TTqsUwXfKTnmRf0Alr5ZOUNYx22hLYhZtaJxWz78fwxD9IxXd17u1jgH8SvFUVLuxeFywQoI5x2PHyAmI9OvfvN8kEjql1FOhfiZmmrGhrggu_GFhzlkrv3kJijME_6Vc_MnFUAZlodku1aDMrU-BeVB4q3gpvta6v-ibSBdsoYMAtS21RGeHE6MaricxC8WrS_xOBWutd3w8b6j3gzjIJCxTXb4dopCeqBQod_ip-47RRsHtor1sO7tk0vwUPB9YPGcm_DIwEb7pwg_NHWCUiBcs0NfpsoZV6KNKJGeAlJu-qVwpAWvZnV_cUlmPx1j4ND3Jmawi4lvIaXdv3bONQlupPhuNXsDPeW-Cf5hranpReD45uK_rMP8rYhueunsj_g0_Mw3bgfV2NFTdQRPGQZz6AiPHJVhpntYI28Wrpo79WfEkm4DK7NjxRVZdwRTB2DDu9Kqwb5B6eiI6Ci/VvWB2UzfEoriXcs5CtU1dqW64qyvsQtQ/13) Peter, today is #ComingOutDay. Whether you’re out, thinking about coming out, or not ready right now, I want you to know that your journey is valid. We’re living in a world where LGBTQ+ people are too often dehumanized, attacked, or erased. Not everyone has the safety or support they need to come out right now, and that’s okay. Your timing, your truth, and your experience are still yours to honor. This week, the Supreme Court will likely strike down **[Colorado’s ban on conversion therapy](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/HvZAmYI3T_yQP3nBA9NSwYljs29KtGdVpTK4cvz2QBBhWMx_YqgmIEo2d3D-cv7HiTuInZxBIWQZF3Ig5dyb7kdd-E2YzMYi_CnrPyqa069bYuWFBLUx_LrkJfeY54bBWsdVM-ar1nFxOjD6Rr9jPx-PZ4gd96FnYJeEt-T4T9_FHve8LdPJfHkbFYpQyLo-L2LCNoENLLbMeuUQL8J7WohJzi5GE2_pvX7U71G51LMcg1YIbh5rgTl9ycbFhBAm1e-wV6BxAh59HUcMFbirzyN1A6FEtFFFDAvWCLOeUxkK1PbI8iirvZtZUQmd5S5G7S-jNpJUcYxhs0oC49M-8trFm3Fi04qM8DNzJxYOCO65QsjDPMUnrhihyDKhS6lkcI7PtbhGMA-1vbwnYErkUH6_LmbaXy-rQylnJQzr2MovhR1Afdd76rtqeiJGUtlSfQZWTkQrruBJnBJtraUWEX-qaurW0BqXT5Fh31YDrs6jKXdtIULYIJ_DbQjwaUQSLvnyPEa0joaNWe1OLgkd/JWJEfTbFV42VshFNTmKFQ1PpkVKCSWv_/13),** which I worked on long before I was elected to office. This is a stark reminder that our rights and dignity are still on the line and that we need leaders in all levels of government who will keep up the fight for equality and inclusion. This issue, and all LGBTQ+ rights, have always been a personal and important issue to me. I want to keep being the fighter that Coloradans need in office. If you're ready to help me keep up the fight, [**chip in to my campaign today.**](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/iuAfmFK47jL9dZrxXrtFOSYyHB3TiGqo4f2zlVnY2bhs9FEhgy-KI46NaPN6X-V-h_p5-h3YVAggbyuNEewLYeab5hPMEE7IMoTs0Nmq5deAgM7QUuXO5UjUIexUxNWQ0KQFc8sFO0rQIC9oi0zb7jVLQ94j5gBSH2IMVsANRH75QL-Lxh1TJP-lro8thgUBFRG-deHWDr_-dCynLmUfAGHVdGHVplBHR5P6i7OQjVft5WReSSf5NZwKLbf0msuQz8d8F6OS1160BiN8-jH1rt0x27ofsd7CAXJ6KncKHTosGD4Lzcriu0bHt1o8s18x930aiBSEar3cg3mTSZo6McaYJgyLruGYSR4BK0HZrOVDWsFr73Ytkw6iecVXShZhblzoAtmNT3_eS5FnkKn2za0TvEL438kJ3Ky_3jgJIw4iMysBBVbISpjJFpGYmgMHsjNbBb9b0T91Tm8HYtUkrVUPQ326HKu-DJdADLBM-QsDydFlhUqBAE-ltKiFTYCES8VVnJlB8nNCma4_di3gc_yCn6jjPkNFRZR_KJkaps6bpecoE7zvRn4p4eewWYpZMf9AKYo2_j-mnH3fzkTyRxWwuwW6nGdDghK6vqts0RbauVNCnXYyODdmreOLq9dMIB9Jt2BSYFyfUpKko5qLG64f0tDgqifvk-rOClL9UUrkM_P3-rOLdPbN_UitB2uzCxIIdwYocxj5voi1LDwcFY3Js4E787qrFr_B3dQ2i4zVjrYzXitwfhwhlaOSxcW9-YgR9ewjnUp6uhX46GufTZh-c0JBEneE7NLpiNOAhWvTOQT77uYaOrUmXrey9dJl58Gp-wsUonR5pghiY437rIfUolLpekY00VmEp9rEKeN4A-ynlhtmK4GpRcF4MYgcaKGJmT9h8eWAUkIM7JGpZPaHUlCsN4aQqM24ODRp0xA1mF_uotihG5WS/NjqSs9cigEbXgUwYeu5tHLODfDJH1HG9/13) [](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/sNjXFVAn572G5wjU2AFNPBnWoUG3JtqMtTQBlTl2WsT-zhRYew44V3QDm-mPyrwBajy737IA9jjuh1jF2T-xoxwohF9p5Fyv-gX6sBDLDRFxFAru5936oRIEz0qaiqAvb09Q9mlfSHCDrcxlmobaij3tGQ7fA6Kx2nEm2ELFKnOCRXh_B3JooKr45I7ShFwjKOoVaYjwzfFJMq8mMB9UI8dRsi6UMZ3xCAVbtMfT-bhmQe_RH1Gs8tBCZfQq56Y9cTgh_JnpfG48rHiBH9RDywvP3icXlHyj0Ad9owBJw9kFyjXb4GWbjIMn5-AIei_fPwI5Aleb2ABuV8SSrBIha34p_1nE3jlcBKs1qreGZ9g-lYhegzj5evLbQFDztXHD6PfWm2tNfajPjcrVO6pkHjbkLiG_ePLc_oFkH4DZIHcUx3Dl3efz9nBIBs7TB72lbk5cI5M3RIzieEs2Mkzxag0C8x5dY5j7_PE5swRjHvVmXd1dyexWUhAr6tDQ11zZOn5ncqkMuIeql92TlI8Z0GNq03RqH5ke64yXu_U8xdmjBsJUUCJAphFDReqFQ2I1eW3o9BVYBrRhmoNYlB5zYKNU4u3ECdeSG4oavu_nrcT_CAeHa4hfI8bQhsWeitcvfcoIY47hl4E84DfZ_TwgEIW1RT9oRekHlUpB0ld3b2Os5hql1XUABXZaswD5csGzctuM0zgHGeZ-icpsPbmsPSYiTSlHpjIEN3msf4l4bByzeqXs5opVOQtwwt9tlnH_CVKhY2hOHZmkpPMl2LjUXLJO5BRZRNjMhRkUsoLbeS3g5lz-pb8P-m9rEIZ3X8yEsRTZidHghTNsHVlHRjtYFw5N8p4L5Nfm0TqkwuTRv3SH9EKxrKiVRDkh6sUfPV1Q8jNIXLlM-8A5PCyocKrXZVOGA8skeK715SX-cGPY2yG19pA5DMpJSFem/v-8vEMOKQfesak9RFoNt83miQjQWsTUt/13) For me, being visible and living authentically has always been about more than just my own story — **it’s also about fighting for a world where everyone can feel safe and accepted as they are.** So today, and every day, I’m fighting for a world where you never have to be afraid of being yourself. With love and solidarity, Brianna _P.S.**Wherever you are in your journey, please know this: you are loved, you are valued, and you are never alone.**_
* * *
Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. clean_body: Peter, Today is #ComingOutDay. Whether you’re out, thinking about coming out, or not ready right now, I want you to know that your journey is valid. | | | Peter, today is #ComingOutDay. Whether you’re out, thinking about coming out, or not ready right now, I want you to know that your journey is valid. We’re living in a world where LGBTQ+ people are too often dehumanized, attacked, or erased. Not everyone has the safety or support they need to come out right now, and that’s okay. Your timing, your truth, and your experience are still yours to honor. This week, the Supreme Court will likely strike down , which I worked on long before I was elected to office. This is a stark reminder that our rights and dignity are still on the line and that we need leaders in all levels of government who will keep up the fight for equality and inclusion. This issue, and all LGBTQ+ rights, have always been a personal and important issue to me. I want to keep being the fighter that Coloradans need in office. If you're ready to help me keep up the fight, For me, being visible and living authentically has always been about more than just my own story — it’s also about fighting for a world where everyone can feel safe and accepted as they are. So today, and every day, I’m fighting for a world where you never have to be afraid of being yourself. With love and solidarity, Brianna P.S.Wherever you are in your journey, please know this: you are loved, you are valued, and you are never alone. Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. **** Follow Brianna Online: ** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

subject: A Paul Revere moment is only way Democrats survive this
body:
Since May this Summer we have been ringing the alarm bells and shouting to anyone who will listen: Democrats are headed for catastrophe in the most critical race of 2025 that no one knows about.
| | |
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eJnN5EnKrcQd0Oum-GIPCwSVZRjlg_PKmxN5E11P5emUzNhYj6GIs2JpVdsC4iflInhZPLS-ZpmR27UdDa28VMkrdeEHA4ai4wvCFfKZX7JOJ7Wts8jFTMQszBxhzGJMDDwwkwKT678YoP96hqFTf6bhKvsmDatOCDDjTbcVjU7CzDt4xd2_egV0IhkIZPMLwYj7ukJj5ZrJedTOgolx-MLt8xmCLNWchmZFoRMgX9Q=&c=5V2afRKPSjFH6po7pE4AOltjkOhHM8pfLPqbGjcHWWRxOM9Ku4dZdg==&ch=R8WirCYV7o6jLPf4nw0ZLOTlB8W8P1SNH641mOgFQMoaMkk5pYAnzg==)

| Friend,
Since May this Summer we have been ringing the alarm bells and shouting to anyone who will listen: Democrats are headed for catastrophe in the most critical race of 2025 that no one knows about--the upcoming Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election.
If MAGA takes this critical court, we will lose in Pennsylvania for the next decade and beyond. 19 electoral college votes, gone for good.
Now over the past few days, slowly but surely, the Democratic movement has begun to wake up.
---
| [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eJnN5EnKrcQd0Oum-GIPCwSVZRjlg_PKmxN5E11P5emUzNhYj6GIs2JpVdsC4iflInhZPLS-ZpmR27UdDa28VMkrdeEHA4ai4wvCFfKZX7JOJ7Wts8jFTMQszBxhzGJMDDwwkwKT678YoP96hqFTf6bhKvsmDatOCDDjTbcVjU7CzDt4xd2_egV0IhkIZPMLwYj7ukJj5ZrJedTOgolx-MLt8xmCLNWcu0JMOL53dfE=&c=5V2afRKPSjFH6po7pE4AOltjkOhHM8pfLPqbGjcHWWRxOM9Ku4dZdg==&ch=R8WirCYV7o6jLPf4nw0ZLOTlB8W8P1SNH641mOgFQMoaMkk5pYAnzg==)
---
| After months of going it on our own this news is a massive reprieve for Democrats in Pennsylvania but we can't let it be too little late. If the race were held today Democrats would still lose, but we have 24 days to change that and to do it we need to wake up every Democrat in the country about this race.
In 2021 Senators John Ossoff and Raphael Warnock were able to garner that level of attention, and the entire movement came together to push them over the line for their historic victory.
Coming back and winning this race will require nothing short of the overwhelming support we saw in Georgia. Unfortunately most Democrats still don't know what is at stake here in Pennsylvania.
We are in desperate need of a Paul Revere moment if we hope to save Pennsylvania. Tell it to all who will listen: MAGA is about to seize Pennsylvania and to save it we must rush to the aid of Democrats there.
If you are able to [donate](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eJnN5EnKrcQd0Oum-GIPCwSVZRjlg_PKmxN5E11P5emUzNhYj6GIs2JpVdsC4iflInhZPLS-ZpmR27UdDa28VMkrdeEHA4ai4wvCFfKZX7JOJ7Wts8jFTMQszBxhzGJMDDwwkwKT678YoP96hqFTf6bhKvsmDatOCDDjTbcVjU7CzDt4xd2_egV0IhkIZPMLwYj7ukJj5ZrJedTOgolx-MLt8xmCLNWcjpHz3vDVEpw=&c=5V2afRKPSjFH6po7pE4AOltjkOhHM8pfLPqbGjcHWWRxOM9Ku4dZdg==&ch=R8WirCYV7o6jLPf4nw0ZLOTlB8W8P1SNH641mOgFQMoaMkk5pYAnzg==) and at a minimum please tell at least one friend or family member about this race. Even better: post on your socials about the race, text the family group chat, tell your local Congressman, do anything in your power to get the word out.
If the word gets out - we win.
---
| | | [Rush a donation to Pennsylvania](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eJnN5EnKrcQd0Oum-GIPCwSVZRjlg_PKmxN5E11P5emUzNhYj6GIs2JpVdsC4iflInhZPLS-ZpmR27UdDa28VMkrdeEHA4ai4wvCFfKZX7JOJ7Wts8jFTMQszBxhzGJMDDwwkwKT678YoP96hqFTf6bhKvsmDatOCDDjTbcVjU7CzDt4xd2_egV0IhkIZPMLwYj7ukJj5ZrJedTOgolx-MLt8xmCLNWcl7b2jgQP5uI=&c=5V2afRKPSjFH6po7pE4AOltjkOhHM8pfLPqbGjcHWWRxOM9Ku4dZdg==&ch=R8WirCYV7o6jLPf4nw0ZLOTlB8W8P1SNH641mOgFQMoaMkk5pYAnzg==)

clean_body: Since May this Summer we have been ringing the alarm bells and shouting to anyone who will listen: Democrats are headed for catastrophe in the most critical race of 2025 that no one knows about. | | | | | == | Friend, Since May this Summer we have been ringing the alarm bells and shouting to anyone who will listen: Democrats are headed for catastrophe in the most critical race of 2025 that no one knows about--the upcoming Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election. If MAGA takes this critical court, we will lose in Pennsylvania for the next decade and beyond. 19 electoral college votes, gone for good. Now over the past few days, slowly but surely, the Democratic movement has begun to wake up. | == | After months of going it on our own this news is a massive reprieve for Democrats in Pennsylvania but we can't let it be too little late. If the race were held today Democrats would still lose, but we have 24 days to change that and to do it we need to wake up every Democrat in the country about this race. In 2021 Senators John Ossoff and Raphael Warnock were able to garner that level of attention, and the entire movement came together to push them over the line for their historic victory. Coming back and winning this race will require nothing short of the overwhelming support we saw in Georgia. Unfortunately most Democrats still don't know what is at stake here in Pennsylvania. We are in desperate need of a Paul Revere moment if we hope to save Pennsylvania. Tell it to all who will listen: MAGA is about to seize Pennsylvania and to save it we must rush to the aid of Democrats there. If you are able to == and at a minimum please tell at least one friend or family member about this race. Even better: post on your socials about the race, text the family group chat, tell your local Congressman, do anything in your power to get the word out. If the word gets out - we win. | | | == | == Thank you in advance for your support at this critical moment. Team Defend our Courts | | | | == | | == | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | == | | | | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | | |

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Are you in it to win with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
You can make the difference.
I don’t mess around with something as important as representing my home. Every race I’ve ever run, I’ve been in it to win — even when the odds seemed long. You’ve been there with me every time, and together, we’ve succeeded. Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. [**_So when I ask you to split a donation between our campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand, it’s because your contribution could make the difference between victory and defeat._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117099832/575344971/-1000027786?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.11_Roy-Cooper-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmRjMTI1NS1iYmE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CPM4Gi5bkI5v4LP69vkLf-hN-PqKy8TecIq6rRtGyyA=) **Republicans see me as the top threat to their Senate majority. They know that we have the team, the support, and the momentum to win.** That means national attention will be on us. I will always be straightforward about this campaign: our plans, where we stand in the polls, what we expect to come, and what we need from you. Right now, we’re preparing for national GOP money groups to spend hundreds of millions against us, and Democrats are being outraised by Republicans. Meanwhile, various polls have shown either a dead heat or us with a slight lead. name: Jason Crow
subject: Things are too damn expensive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
For working class people, this could be life and death. |
#
---
Donald Trump and extreme MAGA Republicans are waging a war on working people. From their reckless tariffs increasing prices, to soaring health care premiums, I’m sure you’re feeling the effects, team —**things are too damn expensive.** Groceries and everyday bills are getting pricier. Folks can’t afford to buy homes to raise their kids. Families are about to see _massive_ health care premium increases and pay more for prescriptions. Too many working class people are one emergency away from losing it all. Let’s be clear about what’s happening here: Republicans are the ones in power right now. Donald Trump and the Republican majority have the ability to make life easier for folks like yourself, _they just don’t care._ Instead, they prioritized tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations. Having worked minimum-wage and construction jobs, I know what it’s like to put in a hard day’s work, and still wonder if you'll be able to make ends meet. **[Life shouldn’t be this hard for working people. That’s why I’m fighting to make life affordable. If you’re able, will you consider pitching in to help me lay the foundation to elect servant leaders who will fight for all of us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117100109/575345685/800828804?amount=&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251011_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzlhOTc5Yy1iYmE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KIU6SjVqbkgPKHRfCXoR55zBLdQ3uY-XJZkk3BRGZsQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117100111/575345687/800828804?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251011_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzlhOTc5Yy1iYmE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KIU6SjVqbkgPKHRfCXoR55zBLdQ3uY-XJZkk3BRGZsQ=)

clean_body: For working class people, this could be life and death. | Donald Trump and extreme MAGA Republicans are waging a war on working people. From their reckless tariffs increasing prices, to soaring health care premiums, I’m sure you’re feeling the effects, team —things are too damn expensive. Groceries and everyday bills are getting pricier. Folks can’t afford to buy homes to raise their kids. Families are about to see massive health care premium increases and pay more for prescriptions. Too many working class people are one emergency away from losing it all. Let’s be clear about what’s happening here: Republicans are the ones in power right now. Donald Trump and the Republican majority have the ability to make life easier for folks like yourself, they just don’t care. Instead, they prioritized tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations. Having worked minimum-wage and construction jobs, I know what it’s like to put in a hard day’s work, and still wonder if you'll be able to make ends meet. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Americans have made it clear that the increasing cost of living is at the top of their list of concerns. Yet, Trump and the Republicans in the House and Senate aren’t doing anything to make it easier. = = Thank you, Jason Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. name: David Hogg
subject: Too many leaders are silent.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
What’s happening in Chicago should horrify everyone — and too many elected officials are failing to meet the moment.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251011-1&t=1&akid=2737%2E587540%2EMyvSkF)
Families woken up with guns in their faces. Kids zip-tied and traumatized for life. U.S. citizens cuffed and detained for hours without a warrant. Homes and personal belongings destroyed. A community and countless lives changed forever.
**This is life in America today** — where military raids against our own people are routine and Black and Brown communities are terrorized.
**What’s happening in Chicago right now should horrify everyone in this country — and every elected official needs to speak out and stop normalizing fascism.**
A South Shore apartment building where families, working people, kids, and seniors live was raided by the military and ICE in the middle of the night.
But turn on CNN or look at too many prominent Democrats' social media, and you’d have no idea our cities are under siege.
A lot of Democrats are staying silent — and it’s normalizing and enabling Trump’s shocking cruelty. They’re not showing enough urgency as our own government puts cities under siege and masked agents grab people from the street and disappear them to foreign countries without telling their loved ones.
We expect complicity from Republicans — but when Democrats are silent, it’s even more disgusting. They represent the communities under attack — and when their constituents need them most, many of them fail to meet the moment.
That’s why we started Leaders We Deserve. The only way to stop this twisted version of “law and order” that tramples over civil rights and common sense is by electing a new generation of leaders who actually give a damn about people and use their power to speak out and protect their communities.
It’s why we back people like State Senator Robert Peters in his run for Congress. He represents the South Shore community — and he’s showing up, meeting with impacted families, and demanding accountability.
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251011_military.f-dTbQ&refcode=em20251011-2737&amount=5&t=3&akid=2737%2E587540%2EMyvSkF)
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251011_military.f-dTbQ&refcode=em20251011-2737&amount=5&t=4&akid=2737%2E587540%2EMyvSkF)
We need more leaders like Robert — ones who meet the moment, use their power, and speak out — not ones who think putting out a press release and going M.I.A. while our rights are destroyed is acceptable.
**[Peter, we’re building that new generation of bold leaders right now — but we can only do it with grassroots support from people like you. Will you pitch in $5 to help elect leaders who fight back against authoritarianism?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251011_military.f-dTbQ&refcode=em20251011-2737&amount=5&t=5&akid=2737%2E587540%2EMyvSkF)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251011_military.f-dTbQ&amount=5&refcode=em20251011-2737&t=24&akid=2737%2E587540%2EMyvSkF)**
The future belongs to us — not authoritarians. Let's claim it.
Thank you,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251011-1&t=25&refcode2=2737_587540_MyvSkF&akid=2737%2E587540%2EMyvSkF)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=2737%2E587540%2EMyvSkF)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2737%2E587540%2EMyvSkF)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Michael Bennet
subject: a grave abuse of power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
President Trump’s use of armed troops on domestic soil to intimidate Americans is a grave abuse of power.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117100662/575347709/-2054079050?refcode=jtk954-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTEwOTcwYy1iY2E2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_R1AvW9UXv7eTeyYeFX82OsLLHo3Lxa9cCXH9gWxZHk=)
---
From L.A. to D.C., Oregon to Illinois – what we are witnessing is not normal, appropriate or remotely legal.
Every day, Donald Trump finds a new way to abuse his power as the president of the United States.
He is urging the military to use American cities as "training grounds."
He is sending masked, unidentified agents to detain entire communities with impunity.

He is using the full force of the Department of Justice against his political “enemies,” like former FBI Director James Comey and New York Attorney General Letitia James.
And he is openly calling for governors and mayors to be jailed for expressing dissent and exercising the states' constitutionally reserved rights.
**Trump’s actions are unprecedented, dangerous and authoritarian, plain and simple.**
President Trump’s deployments of armed troops and federal agents on U.S. soil to intimidate Americans isn't just a grave abuse of power; it's a significant threat to our free and fair democracy.
And at this pivotal moment in our nation's history, Washington, D.C., is not coming to rescue us. But all is not lost – if we all stand united against him.
So as the states emerge as the first line of defense, I stand in solidarity with leaders like Govs. Pritzker, Kotek, and Newsom as they reject Trump's escalating overreach and defend the people in their states from his campaign of harassment and terror.
And as Colorado's next governor, I’ll stand with them to defend our democracy and our freedoms. Because I believe that Colorado can provide the vision our country urgently needs on how to best fight Trump and uphold the principles of American democracy.
**Together with you alongside me, I firmly believe that no matter what the president has in store, we can and we will make Colorado the best state to live, work and raise a family.**
Keep the faith,

Michael
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117100665/575347716/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk954-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTEwOTcwYy1iY2E2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_R1AvW9UXv7eTeyYeFX82OsLLHo3Lxa9cCXH9gWxZHk=)

name: Team McBride
subject: [Survey] How are you feeling about the shutdown?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Sarah wants to know how you’re feeling about the shutdown and how it’s impacting you.
#
We know that the **Republican government shutdown** is putting enormous strain on families who rely on paychecks for federal employees and others who count on government services.
We also know that it’s critical that we fight back against the GOP’s attempts to repeal tax credits that make health insurance affordable. Without those credits, premiums could _double_ for millions of people across the country.
**Sarah wants to know how you’re feeling about the shutdown and how it’s impacting you.**[**Will you take a few moments to fill out our brief survey now?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/survey/mcb-em-20251011-1?source=em20251011-2401&t=1&akid=2401%2E21716%2E24bP3S)
**[Take The Survey »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/survey/mcb-em-20251011-1?source=em20251011-2401&t=2&akid=2401%2E21716%2E24bP3S)**
Washington may be chaotic right now, but Sarah’s focus is exactly where it should be: on making government work for Delaware families. Sharing your experience will help her keep fighting for solutions that actually meet this moment.
Thank you,
Team McBride

Donald Trump has done what no president ever should — attacking political opposition by weaponizing the Department of Justice to indict former FBI director James Comey.
Federal prosecutors even put in writing that the case was too weak to take to trial — because Comey was just doing his job. Those prosecutors got fired and replaced with a wildly unqualified Trump loyalist.
**The message is clear** : If you oppose Donald Trump and refuse to submit to his authority, _you will be punished_.
We can’t let Donald Trump get away with this, or our democracy is at risk — and no one is safe.

Peter,

Adelita Grijalva just won her special election in Arizona's 7th Congressional District by nearly **40 points**. Southern Arizonans made their voices heard loud and clear: they want Adelita fighting for them in Congress.

But instead of respecting the will of voters, **Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans are trying to delay Adelita's swearing-in — playing games with our democracy for their own political gain**. EMILYs List is calling on Speaker Johnson to seat Rep.-elect Grijalva _immediately_. (Did we mention that when two Republicans won special elections earlier this year, Mike Johnson swore them in _less than 24 hours later_?)

Arizona's 7th has been left without representation for too long. With a government shutdown underway and health care for millions on the line, Republicans are showing us exactly why we need more Democratic pro-choice women in Congress: they will never stop putting politics before people.

That's why EMILYs List is fighting not just to seat Adelita, but to elect more women like her who can help **flip the House** in 2026.

clean_body: These partisan power grabs will end when we take back the House. | = Peter — Two weeks ago, Arizonans elected Adelita Grijalva to represent them in Congress. Nine days ago, we let you know that Speaker Mike Johnson was refusing to swear her into office. And today, he's still refusing — silencing hundreds of thousands of voters and denying them their voice in Congress. Over the past week, EMILYs List women — including Rep. Yassamin Ansari and Rep. Katherine Clark — have confronted Johnson on the House floor, demanding that he do his job. But instead of acting, he's making excuses and telling lies to justify this blatantly partisan power play. Our democracy only works when every vote counts and every community has a voice. We can't let extremists like Mike Johnson get away with these partisan power grabs. = | = — the EMILYs List Campaigns team \--------------Original Message---------------- Sent: October 2, 2025 From: EMILYs List Campaigns team = Peter, Adelita Grijalva just won her special election in Arizona's 7th Congressional District by nearly 40 points. Southern Arizonans made their voices heard loud and clear: they want Adelita fighting for them in Congress. But instead of respecting the will of voters, Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans are trying to delay Adelita's swearing-in — playing games with our democracy for their own political gain. EMILYs List is calling on Speaker Johnson to seat Rep.-elect Grijalva immediately. (Did we mention that when two Republicans won special elections earlier this year, Mike Johnson swore them in less than 24 hours later?) Arizona's 7th has been left without representation for too long. With a government shutdown underway and health care for millions on the line, Republicans are showing us exactly why we need more Democratic pro-choice women in Congress: they will never stop putting politics before people. That's why EMILYs List is fighting not just to seat Adelita, but to elect more women like her who can help flip the House in 2026. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Together, we can make sure Republicans don't get away with silencing voters — and that in 2026, we have a House majority made up of women who will defend our rights and our democracy. Thank you for being in this fight, — the EMILYs List Campaigns team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States | ---|---

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: Justin J. Pearson vs. Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Justice Democrats’ new 2026 primary challenger, State Rep. Justin J.
Pearson, isn’t even in Congress yet, and he’s already taking on
billionaire Elon Musk.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251011-jp.zSS6nn&refcode=em20251011-37101&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37101%2E1203867%2EOPXuMT ]Screenshot from MSNBC.com with the headline: Opinion | My Black
community in Memphis is the David to Elon Musk’s Goliath. The subheading
reads: We are known as an “asthma capital” in the U.S., and recent
statistics found that we had the most asthma-related ER visits in
Tennessee. Below is a photo of Justin J. Pearson speaking at a rally.

Justin lives 3 miles away from xAI’s South Memphis data center, aka
Colossus, which was established in 2024 to power the xAI chatbot known as
Grok. The monstrous data center is using 33 methane-powered gas turbines,
when it only has legal permits for 15. As a result, this facility:

* Consumes enough electricity that could instead power 100,000 homes;
* Increases smog levels in Memphis by 30-60 percent;
* Produces 1,200 to 2,000 tons of smog-forming nitrogen oxides annually,
which are linked to higher rates of asthma and respiratory illnesses.

It’s happening in a poor, predominantly Black community plagued by a long
history of industrial pollution and resulting health issues. As Justin
pointed out in his MSNBC op-ed, his community has:

* Received an “F” for air quality from the American Heart Association in
four of the last five years (and a “D” in the fifth year);
* Been dubbed an “asthma capital” of the United States;
* Experienced the most asthma-related emergency room visits in the
state.

South Memphis is being treated as a sacrifice zone for Big Tech, and it’s
a perfect example of a nationwide trend under Trump’s oligarchic
administration: our health and well-being are being threatened for the
benefit of billionaires and their corporate profit.

And if tech billionaires like Musk are allowed to get away with this
environmental racism — all while our federal environmental protections are
ripped to shreds by Trump — more communities across the country will be at
risk of the same harm.

As a state representative and community activist, Justin is directly
fighting back to stop this public health emergency created by Musk and
corporate greed — we desperately need more of that kind of fight from the
Democratic Party.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251011-jp.zSS6nn&refcode=em20251011-37101&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37101%2E1203867%2EOPXuMT ]Help Justice Democrats send Justin to Congress next year so he can take
on Musk and Trump from the nation’s capital: split a contribution of
$5 or more today.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251011-jp.zSS6nn&refcode=em20251011-37101&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37101%2E1203867%2EOPXuMT ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Geoff Simpson
Campaigns Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251011-37101-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37101_1203867_OPXuMT&akid=37101%2E1203867%2EOPXuMT

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37101%2E1203867%2EOPXuMT

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

With so much at stake, I came to Washington ready to get to work. But instead of swearing me in, Speaker Mike Johnson cancelled session and sent members home — not only delaying my ability to take office, but also allowing the government to shut down without even letting the House work toward a solution. That’s how far Republicans are willing to go to block me from serving. Republicans know that once I’m sworn in, it won’t just chip away at their razor-thin majority — I will become the decisive 218th signature to force a vote on releasing the Epstein files. This is nothing more than a desperate power play to protect Trump while denying the people of my district a voice in Congress when it’s needed the most. As Speaker Johnson drags this out, we’re going to prove that our grassroots power can’t be silenced. Each day he continues to delay, we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 to keep our momentum going as we work to take back the House in 2026. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi friend, it's Adelita Grijalva. I want to thank Gabe Vasquez for giving me the chance to reach out to you directly. Last month, voters overwhelmingly rejected the MAGA agenda and chose me to represent them in Congress in Arizona’s 7th District special election. With so much at stake, I came to Washington ready to get to work. But instead of swearing me in, Speaker Mike Johnson cancelled session and sent members home — not only delaying my ability to take office, but also allowing the government to shut down without even letting the House work toward a solution. That’s how far Republicans are willing to go to block me from serving. Republicans know that once I’m sworn in, it won’t just chip away at their razor-thin majority — I will become the decisive 218th signature to force a vote on releasing the Epstein files. This is nothing more than a desperate power play to protect Trump while denying the people of my district a voice in Congress when it’s needed the most. As Speaker Johnson drags this out, we’re going to prove that our grassroots power can’t be silenced. Each day he continues to delay, we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 to keep our momentum going as we work to take back the House in 2026. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now and be split evenly between Adelita Grijalva and Gabe Vasquez. | = | = | = | = | = | = Juntos, Adelita S. clean_body: We don't expect you to donate to every email we send, but here's why it's so important that you donate to Abigail's campaign for Governor today. = We don't expect you to donate to every email we send, but please give us 30 seconds to explain why it's so important that you donate to Abigail's campaign for Governor today. = Here's the deal: Abigail needs your support today to win the biggest election of 2025. Donald Trump is repeatedly attacking Abigail, and the latest polls show our opponent Winsome Earle-Sears gaining ground. She's spent nearly $10 million against us so far, with national Republicans piling on more each and every day. This is our only chance in the country to flip a Governor's office blue – so we can't take anything for granted. Your $25 will fund TV and digital ads in key media markets. Your $25 will provide organizers with literature and yard signs to gain support on the ground. Your $25 will empower us to counter Trump's attacks and keep putting Virginia first. We could keep going, but the bottom line is this: your $25 today will have a huge impact. = = = = = = = Thanks for stepping up, Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: On the brink
subject: The tip of the spear for Democrats last stand in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
If MAGA wins this election, it is game over for Democrats.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dZF6uZFrgWyLjpmiDQw8tfoxmDIxLzaktbV6_pkR-kVjVOnl-_KHfYPK7dOkJYNm6GqQ6-zQr_8OXzXme7lujCaGfysNmm5fLPGl63iaVW4BhURKXRv4R4QGt7qyJId5qn5RYzO6SHlI8KAovuQV9BTaLZDDucJip9oYwarJAkeBdgxsFum_gaaa9Fnp82xeT__9QAX5aZ8Yeu2areFnhuGZNM52edws&c=zoISFv1XhgbegxsTG1ZTmVh0hEcJCl5eoihOEI6ys9VZ-gfyfbkwQQ==&ch=xK8QivOWTwbSwgCGfd0gnn_0U-edjR7cutIo0B1xWi-HFL6I6agh3A==)
---
| Peter,
A life or death battle for the Democratic Party is currently being waged in Pennsylvania.
MAGA billionaire, Jeff Yass, has assumed Elon Musk's former role as financier for MAGA's most insidious schemes--pouring tens of millions of dollars into the November Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election to topple the democratic majority on the court.
---
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dZF6uZFrgWyLjpmiDQw8tfoxmDIxLzaktbV6_pkR-kVjVOnl-_KHfYPK7dOkJYNm6GqQ6-zQr_8OXzXme7lujCaGfysNmm5fLPGl63iaVW4BhURKXRv4R4QGt7qyJId5qn5RYzO6SHlI8KAovuQV9BTaLZDDucJip9oYwarJAkeBdgxsFum_gaaa9Fnp82xeT__9QAX5aZ8Yeu2areFnhvX_OSilqBkV&c=zoISFv1XhgbegxsTG1ZTmVh0hEcJCl5eoihOEI6ys9VZ-gfyfbkwQQ==&ch=xK8QivOWTwbSwgCGfd0gnn_0U-edjR7cutIo0B1xWi-HFL6I6agh3A==)
---
If MAGA wins this election, it is game over for Democrats.
MAGA will seize control of the court responsible for overseeing the election laws in the most important swing state in the country, giving Trump carte blanche to do whatever he can to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections--ensuring Democrats can never win PA or the White House again for at least a decade:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dZF6uZFrgWyLjpmiDQw8tfoxmDIxLzaktbV6_pkR-kVjVOnl-_KHfYPK7dOkJYNm6GqQ6-zQr_8OXzXme7lujCaGfysNmm5fLPGl63iaVW4BhURKXRv4R4QGt7qyJId5qn5RYzO6SHlI8KAovuQV9BTaLZDDucJip9oYwarJAkeBdgxsFum_gaaa9Fnp82xeT__9QAX5aZ8Yeu2areFnhtf55r4NW2bU&c=zoISFv1XhgbegxsTG1ZTmVh0hEcJCl5eoihOEI6ys9VZ-gfyfbkwQQ==&ch=xK8QivOWTwbSwgCGfd0gnn_0U-edjR7cutIo0B1xWi-HFL6I6agh3A==)
---
While Yass and Trump plot behind closed doors, Defend Our Courts has been the tip of the spear--one of the first major Democratic organizations to strike back when we launched one of the first ads about this race to hit the airwaves in July.
We have been warning about this threat before anyone else and have rallied tens of thousands of Democrats nationwide to come to PA's defense--raising nearly 3 million dollars. And now, as Yass floods the airwaves and mailboxes of PA voters, we're one of the best positioned Democratic organizations to fight back--immediately and everywhere.
Every ad we run, every organizer we train, every door we kock--is the tip of the spear in the battle for the Democratic Party's survival in PA.
But with only 24 days left until Election Day, we are still being outspent 10 to 1 by Jeff Yass. Every dollar you give sharpens the spear, keeps our ads live, and fuels the counter-offensive. Now's the moment to hit back harder than ever:
[Will you rush $50, $25, or even $10 to help fuel Defend Our Court's counter-offensive against Jeff Yass and save this crucial court?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dZF6uZFrgWyLjpmiDQw8tfoxmDIxLzaktbV6_pkR-kVjVOnl-_KHfYPK7dOkJYNmO5-RMqodcJkOGqqzNwRjvAtYj3Sibp1CGKjTdpYP8-HdzFQdLFICgPRLeiYOS7wgwxMzIeEH8YiMZkol1n_4nWdhuTIarzt78XBC5_X1665GeWoj17wlEuWwgez2JY4EsTsmkx_Ar5rRPOkYwsawXB6d9rs-dEV5tJfpDGtJDCE=&c=zoISFv1XhgbegxsTG1ZTmVh0hEcJCl5eoihOEI6ys9VZ-gfyfbkwQQ==&ch=xK8QivOWTwbSwgCGfd0gnn_0U-edjR7cutIo0B1xWi-HFL6I6agh3A==)

MAGA billionaire, Jeff Yass, has assumed Elon Musk's former role as financier for MAGA's most insidious schemes--pouring tens of millions of dollars into the November Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election to topple the democratic majority on the court. | | | | | == If MAGA wins this election, it is game over for Democrats. MAGA will seize control of the court responsible for overseeing the election laws in the most important swing state in the country, giving Trump carte blanche to do whatever he can to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections--ensuring Democrats can never win PA or the White House again for at least a decade: | == While Yass and Trump plot behind closed doors, Defend Our Courts has been the tip of the spear--one of the first major Democratic organizations to strike back when we launched one of the first ads about this race to hit the airwaves in July. name: Squad Victory HQ
subject: Trump is weaponizing the military — and we can’t stay silent
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251011-1570-foote&t=1001&akid=1570%2E342411%2EWKomKb ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Trump is turning the U.S. military into a weapon — not to protect
communities, but to intimidate people, undermine local leadership, and
distract from his broken promises.

This is about consolidating power, not public safety.

Troops have been sent to D.C., Memphis, and Chicago, and they’re ready to
be sent to Portland. Even with lawsuits underway — including federal
judges blocking troops in Portland and Chicago — Trump is moving forward,
showing just how far he’ll go to silence dissent.

This isn’t just about the cities under threat today. If we let this go
unchecked, it sets a dangerous precedent: military force could be used to
target communities anywhere that challenge him.

This is the authoritarian future he’s trying to create — and it’s a threat
to all of us.

That’s why the Squad Victory Fund is building the resistance. By
supporting progressive champions in Congress, amplifying the truth to
expose Trump’s abuses, and mobilizing grassroots power in affected
communities, we’re working to strengthen our people-powered movement.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251011-movement.bqlFBL&refcode=em20251011-1570&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1570%2E342411%2EWKomKb ]We can’t do it without you. Will you chip in $3 to help
defend our cities, protect democracy, and show Trump that Americans will
not be intimidated — and we will not back down?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251011-movement.bqlFBL&refcode=em20251011-1570&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1570%2E342411%2EWKomKb ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

Squad Victory HQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1570%2E342411%2EWKomKb

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com
