name: Letitia James
subject: Donald Trump and his admin just indicted me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251011-1.qZ1jI3&refcode=em20251011-5520&t=1001&akid=5520%2E420207%2EC4TECC ][IMG]

Peter, by now,
you've likely heard the news: Donald Trump and his administration have
indicted me on baseless charges – all because I’ve done my job as Attorney
General.

For months now, we've seen Trump manipulate the justice system in a
coordinated effort to go after his political opponents for defending the
rule of law.

I knew that holding the most powerful and corrupt accountable – especially
the president – could make me a target. But I'm not about to back down
now, and I know you aren't either,
Peter.

Trump is escalating his political retribution campaign – and I need your
immediate help to fight back.

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251011-1.qZ1jI3&refcode=em20251011-5520&t=1002&akid=5520%2E420207%2EC4TECC ]We must show, right now, that the American people reject his dangerous
political revenge campaign. I'm calling for 20,000 rapid-response
donations today to send an unmistakable message: We won’t back down. Will
you rush a donation split between my campaign and Pramila Jayapal right
now to help me stand firm and keep fighting?

[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251011-1.qZ1jI3&amount=3&refcode=em20251011-5520&t=1021&akid=5520%2E420207%2EC4TECC ]Contribute $3

Thank you for being in this with me.

– Letitia James

"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. ACT FAST and grab yours now before it's gone: If you've been watching the headlines... You already know the threat of food shortages, blackouts and supply chain failures is more real than ever. That's why demand is surging and thousands have already claimed their 2 Months of FREE Survival Food with this Exclusive Limited-Time deal. Did you miss out? [[Hurry – click here to see if this deal is still available]]() These food kits are flying off the shelves, selling out time and time again. People are waking up to the truth: you can't count on the system anymore. We gave our warehouse manager, Matt, one mission: "Produce as many kits as humanly possible!" And wow... did he ever deliver. The result? A tidal wave of inventory just crashed into our warehouse – more kits than we have space for. Now we're on the hook for major storage costs... and we need your help. This is your chance to take advantage of our mistake. We're slashing prices and practically giving away these premium survival food kits just to move them fast. When you claim yours today, you're not only securing peace of mind for your family, you're helping an American-owned company stay afloat through a supply chain nightmare. And yes – you'll also get a 2 additional FREE BONUSES as our thank you! This is more than just food. It's freedom in a box. These 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are loaded with hearty, satisfying meals that are built to last 25 years. That's right – no junk fillers, no sketchy ingredients – just real food, crafted for real emergencies. Get 5 Months of Food, Security & Peace of Mind – All In One Kit Hand-packed in a small American facility by people who actually care, these meals are designed to keep you nourished, calm, and strong when everything else falls apart. And thanks to the recent upgrades, these kits contain more food than ever. It's a massive value – and right now, it's the lowest price you'll ever see. Don't wait for a crisis to wish you had prepared. Right now, this overstock deal gives you the chance to save big, feed your family in an emergency, and protect what matters most. But this inventory won't last long. Stay Safe. Stay Prepared. Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. Real People. Real Emergencies. Real Gratitude. Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. subject: Jeffrey Yass wants to buy our courts

Hi Peter,

Billionaire Jeffrey Yass has more money than anyone in Pennsylvania. And now, he’s using his $65 billion fortune to bankroll Republican attacks on our Supreme Court. This means more misleading ads and mailers, more confusion for voters, and potentially, the removal of three Democratic justices who have consistently defended our rights. This November, we can't let his money decide our court's future.

**Let’s be clear:** this isn’t about fairness or “accountability.” It’s about power. Yass and his MAGA allies want to dismantle reproductive rights, shred voting protections, and rig Pennsylvania’s courts for the next decade.

Outside activists have called Yass our state’s Elon Musk. Both have one thing in common: an obsession with using their billions to buy political outcomes they could never win on the merits.

The power to stop Yass lies in the hands of the voters. **By voting YES to retain Justices Donohue, Dougherty, and Wecht, we can ensure that the Court remains in the hands of judges who have consistently defended our rights.** But to achieve this, we need the resources to counter Yass’ overwhelming financial influence. Your contribution, no matter how small, can make a significant difference.

**_[Your support is crucial in our fight against Yass' misinformation. We're 24 days out from the most critical climate election since Donald Trump returned to the White House. **This is our first major test. And the stakes couldn't be higher.**
Since the moment Trump set foot back into the Oval Office, he’s gutted the EPA's scientific research arm, opened millions of acres of public lands to drilling, forced dirty coal plants to stay open, and handed billions in giveaways to oil and gas executives through his _Big Ugly Bill._
Now, he’s betting that we’ll be too tired, frustrated, or overwhelmed to take action, but he couldn’t be more wrong.
**Together, we’ve elected over 160 climate champions from school boards to Congress. Each of these climate victories was possible because people like you made a choice. A choice to care, to volunteer, to spread the word to your friends and family, and to _vote._**
**[So today, we’re polling folks in Cresco to get an estimate of how many people will be voting to elect leaders up and down the ballot this year who will fight for our communities, not corporate polluters.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117102569/575354681/726330210?refcode=ea.5db99267-c3a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.5db99267-c3a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVkYjk5MjY3LWMzYTYtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wLyI2OD9i1J8nqQGMJDKjKwsWvjcx4mgtb5FCRMszTI=&emci=5bb99267-c3a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=5db99267-c3a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4823105)**

The world is drowning in debt and investors are seeking refuge in assets that promise stability amid economic turmoil. The so-called _**" debasement trade"**_--a strategic pivot toward hard assets like precious metals - and more recently Bitcoin - as hedges against fiat currency erosion--has gained unprecedented momentum.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/087eab36-a505-49b3-a436-75c8d08a145a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Escalating fiscal burdens in the U.S., Japan, and France, coupled with political uncertainty, have sparked a flight to safety, propelling gold, silver, and Bitcoin to remarkable heights. Over the past five years, and especially in the last five weeks, these assets have charted distinct yet interconnected paths, reflecting investor anxiety about global debt and currency devaluation.
**The Debt Crisis Catalyst**
Global debt levels are sounding alarms. The U.S., Japan, and France face mounting fiscal pressures, with deficits echoing the precarious conditions of the 2008 financial crisis and the subsequent quantitative easing eras that followed. Japan's new Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's push for stimulus has weakened the yen against the dollar, while France's political gridlock, marked by Prime Minister Sebastien Lecornu's resignation, has eroded the Euro. These currency slippages, alongside a U.S. government shutdown on October 1, 2025, that disrupted payroll data, have amplified fears of currency debasement. Investors are responding by pouring capital into assets perceived as immune to fiat erosion: gold, silver, and now Bitcoin.

AI is booming.
But there's a growing problem no one wants to admit: **our infrastructure isn 't ready for it**.1
The U.S. grid is already stretched thin. In many states, it's decades overdue for upgrades. Now layer on thousands of energy-hungry AI data centers -- and it's a recipe for blackouts, water shortages, and failure.1
In fact, just this month, Bloomberg reported that AI data centers are **draining millions of gallons of water** from drought-prone areas in the U.S.9
Meanwhile, Saudi Arabia is going the opposite direction -- investing **$100 billion** to build ultra-modern AI power hubs running on next-gen energy tech.
**The U.S. needs a breakthrough. That 's where [Next Thing Technologies](https://substack.com/redirect/878bdd35-b5df-4223-be86-ccad6c39efe6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) comes in.**
They're the first American company9 to develop a commercially-viable1 sodium-ion battery pack that can power AI infrastructure.1
Why it matters:
* Sodium is **1,400 × more abundant than lithium**9
* Batteries are projected to be **up to 60% cheaper** 6
* They're safer and scalable1

* * *
**Gold, Silver, and Bitcoin: Five-Year Trends vs. Five-Week Surge**
Over the past five years, gold, silver, and Bitcoin have each carved unique trajectories, reflecting their distinct roles as safe-haven assets. Gold, a timeless store of value, has risen steadily. Silver, often overshadowed by its shinier sibling, has seen more volatile but still substantial gains driven by industrial demand and speculative interest. Then there is Bitcoin, the self-proclaimed "digital gold," has been the standout, fueled by rapid institutional adoption and its fixed supply of coins.
In the last five weeks, however, the pace has accelerated dramatically with all three assets hitting All Time High's. Gold has jumped to $4,077.90 per ounce, driven by safe-haven demand amid the U.S. shutdown and global currency weakness. Silver, more sensitive to market momentum, surged to $50.03 per ounce, reflecting speculative fervor. Bitcoin, however, has stolen the spotlight, rocketing to $126,160. That explosive rally, concentrated over a single weekend in London, underscores Bitcoin's growing appeal as a hedge against fiat debasement. With its decentralized nature and capped supply it has resonated with investors who are suddenly wary of central bank policies in relation to both personal financial freedom and inflation.
**Bitcoin ETFs and the "Digital Gold" Narrative**
The surge in Bitcoin's price has been supercharged by unprecedented inflows into U.S. Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs). In early October 2025, investors poured $3.2 billion into these funds, marking the second-highest inflow since their 2024 debut. BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust alone saw open interest hit $49.8 billion, while the combined open interest on Deribit and BlackRock's ETF reached $80 billion--a tenfold increase from early 2024. Bullish call options, accounting for over 60% of activity in the past six months, reflect a speculative frenzy amplifying Bitcoin's ascent.
This rally has for some cemented Bitcoin's moniker as "digital gold," a term that has surged in prominence since May 2025. Google Trends data shows a sharp uptick in searches for "digital gold," with interest nearly tripling from May to October 2025, as investors both retail and institutional increasingly view Bitcoin as a modern counterpart to gold's store-of-value properties.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/90f3ccd9-b4f9-424c-b95d-0276d8b39fe2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Unlike gold, which relies on physical scarcity, Bitcoin's appeal lies in its algorithmic scarcity and decentralized architecture, making it a compelling hedge in an era of digital finance and eroding trust in fiat systems.
**Physical vs. Digital: A Complementary Flight to Safety**
While gold and silver remain stalwarts of the debasement trade, Bitcoin's meteoric rise highlights a growing divide between physical and digital safe havens. Yet, the two asset classes are not rivals but complements. Gold and silver offer tangible stability, while Bitcoin provides (near) instant liquidity and huge future growth potential.
Together, they form a robust defense against currency devaluation and to see them move in relative lockstep and the movement upwards being fueled by broadly the same underlying impetus means that Gold may finally have something akin to a rival in the hard asset space.
**Risks and the Road Ahead**
The debasement trade is not without risks. Bitcoin's rally, while spectacular, is fueled by leverage, with analysts at FalconX warning of potential liquidation cascades if the bullish momentum were to falter. The next resistance level (the point where the selling pressure from those wishing to exit a position outweighs the buying pressure of those who want to take on a position) at $135,000 looms, if it can surpass that then $150,000 as a potential target is viable, but volatility remains a concern. Gold and silver, while less volatile, face pressures of their own.
A perfect case study of the differences between these assets would be the announcement by President Trump about upcoming tariffs in retaliation to China's tightening of export restrictions on rare earth minerals. Gold and Silver prices moved up slightly, where as at its lowest Bitcoin lost 4.01%. However, crypto is notoriously volatile, outsize swings are not uncommon and in the grand scheme of things the Bitcoin drop could be seen as negligible when compared to its growth this year.
Experts at both Pepperstone and JPMorgan have noted that self-reinforcing sentiment in both precious metals and crypto could sustain the rally long term.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bf03fffb-720b-4328-aa68-555922be93f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**BREAKING UPDATE: The Great Crypto Armageddon of 2025.**
At 5:15 PM on October 10th the Crypto market suffered the biggest liquidation in its history. As of this morning (October 11th.) the costs are still being calculated. The numbers are simply staggering. As much as $19 Billion in assets may have been wiped out. Posts on X show traders personally losing millions of dollars in altcoins and leveraged bets on crypto. It turns out that the analysts at FalconX were way more correct than they knew. Right now nobody knows how bad it will be when the markets reopen.
However, amongst the wreckage, in the smoking crater of what was a burgeoning crypto market on Thursday morning, some very important takeaways exist.
Bitcoin itself is down a little over 8% ($14,000) from its highs, but when compared to its meteoric rise of 85% this year and its 950% rise over 5 years is not an End of Days situation yet. Also more interesting is that BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF (IBIT,) down as much as 10% during the eye of the crypto crash hurricane, has rebounded making back 4% of its losses by the time trading ceased on the 10th. This certainly lends some credibility to those who argue that Bitcoin is resilient enough to be considered a safe haven (especially for strong nerved traders willing to hold through the rough seas Crypto is known for and a willingness to "buy the dip")
Also with **[$770 Billion being wiped off of tech stocks](https://substack.com/redirect/a08a4900-d610-48f3-8b08-6d45a363b8ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Friday and questions starting to be raised about the future sustainability of the AI Boom of the last two years, (which are only likely to increase now.) Investors around the world both retail and institutional may choose to rotate their investments in to less risky bets, and these Hard Asset Superheroes would be the likely beneficiaries.
Gold, silver, and Bitcoin, each in its own way, embody the flight to safety in an era of currency weakness and political uncertainty. Over the past five years, Bitcoin's surge has outpaced gold and silver's gains, but in the last five weeks, all three have seen sharp upticks, (albeit with Bitcoin still leading the pack.) The $3.2 billion flood into Bitcoin ETFs and the rising prominence of the "digital gold" narrative underscore its growing legitimacy.
The fact that the debasement trade is taking place at the scale and pace that it is reflects a profound shift in investor psychology as global debt concerns and long held fears about fiat currency intensify. **These systemic worries have not gone away just because Crypto crashed spectacularly on Friday.**
As fiat currencies wobble, the debasement trade is not just a trend--it's a warning. Investors are betting on hard assets, both physical and digital, to weather the coming storm.

This certainly lends some credibility to those who argue that Bitcoin is resilient enough to be considered a safe haven (especially for strong nerved traders willing to hold through the rough seas Crypto is known for and a willingness to "buy the dip") Also with on Friday and questions starting to be raised about the future sustainability of the AI Boom of the last two years, (which are only likely to increase now.) Investors around the world both retail and institutional may choose to rotate their investments in to less risky bets, and these Hard Asset Superheroes would be the likely beneficiaries. Gold, silver, and Bitcoin, each in its own way, embody the flight to safety in an era of currency weakness and political uncertainty. Over the past five years, Bitcoin's surge has outpaced gold and silver's gains, but in the last five weeks, all three have seen sharp upticks, (albeit with Bitcoin still leading the pack.) The $3.2 billion flood into Bitcoin ETFs and the rising prominence of the "digital gold" narrative underscore its growing legitimacy. The fact that the debasement trade is taking place at the scale and pace that it is reflects a profound shift in investor psychology as global debt concerns and long held fears about fiat currency intensify. These systemic worries have not gone away just because Crypto crashed spectacularly on Friday. As fiat currencies wobble, the debasement trade is not just a trend--it's a warning. Investors are betting on hard assets, both physical and digital, to weather the coming storm. The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117104346/575361320/1435897075?refcode=email_101125_trail&refcode2=sl1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjBlODliYS1jNGE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VybBxleRkj52EmSeYga2mI4d909qvYLjllwDB6ZYyVQ=&emci=c00e89ba-c4a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=c20e89ba-c4a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=7280715) Howdy folks, it’s John. Every little bit helps.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117104347/575361321/1531865432?amount=15&refcode=email_101125_trail&refcode2=sl1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjBlODliYS1jNGE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VybBxleRkj52EmSeYga2mI4d909qvYLjllwDB6ZYyVQ=) | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117104348/575361322/1531865432?refcode=email_101125_trail&refcode2=sl1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjBlODliYS1jNGE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VybBxleRkj52EmSeYga2mI4d909qvYLjllwDB6ZYyVQ=)

I went down to the Colorado State Fair, and spoke with Coloradans of all backgrounds about the issues that matter to just about everyone — like affordability, health care, and protecting Colorado’s public lands. _Yes, I even got a chance to attend the annual market hog show!_
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117104349/575361323/477745408?amount=15&refcode=email_101125_trail&refcode2=sl1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjBlODliYS1jNGE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VybBxleRkj52EmSeYga2mI4d909qvYLjllwDB6ZYyVQ=)
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117104350/575361324/477745408?amount=15&refcode=email_101125_trail&refcode2=sl1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjBlODliYS1jNGE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VybBxleRkj52EmSeYga2mI4d909qvYLjllwDB6ZYyVQ=)
---
We’ve also made stops in communities all over the state, like in Grand Junction, where I grabbed a beer with some folks in the community and talked shop about our nation’s path forward. Before I ever considered running for office, I opened Colorado’s very first brewpub — _Wynkoop Brewing Company_ — so any time we’re able to hash out political disagreements over a refreshing pint feels like coming home to me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117104351/575361325/477745408?amount=15&refcode=email_101125_trail&refcode2=sl1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjBlODliYS1jNGE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VybBxleRkj52EmSeYga2mI4d909qvYLjllwDB6ZYyVQ=)
Look, I only ran for office in the first place because I felt like the concerns of everyday folks like you simply weren’t being heard. That’s why it’s so important to me to get out into the community and hear directly from as many Colorodans as I can face to face.
But the thing is, everywhere I go, I’m hearing over and over again just how much chaos Trump and the MAGA Republicans are causing as they push their extreme agenda over the interests of everyday Americans.
We hear you, and we’re fed up with their nonsense as well. **And we’re doing everything we can to fight back and defend working people.**
[_**But it’s going to take all of us, standing together. So if you’re in, I have to ask: please, will you chip in now to keep this seat blue and help us defend Colorado’s values from MAGA attacks?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117104352/575361326/1531865432?amount=15&refcode=email_101125_trail&refcode2=sl1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjBlODliYS1jNGE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VybBxleRkj52EmSeYga2mI4d909qvYLjllwDB6ZYyVQ=)

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: The countdown is on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
There are no kings in America—no matter what the Supreme Court says. | |
---
Peter, **The MAGA justices on the Supreme Court have done everything they can to erode constitutional separation of powers and give Trump the powers of a King in America.** They’ve given him permission to break the law, stopped lower courts from putting him in check, greenlit his violent anti-immigrant agenda, and more. This term, they’re poised to let him singlehandedly control our economy and rig our politics even further. **But We the People know that none of this is right. And as Trump attempts to silence dissent in cities across the country, Americans are standing up.** Next weekend, United for Democracy is joining Americans across the country to stand up and fight back. **Thousands of people in communities across the United States are coming together for another day of No Kings rallies on October 18th.** [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbIwXrUx9efdTq_vbf4FLD3URDpUTRPLMOBPwnpnZ57QKKWV6UYCIcDz3eLjBrBc3k2O1e-DEiQv9Piu4Wc_OT93U4br6ofHJqss8rms8UETFHu0Z5VmkO6IYVH5IunuEZaYK-b2vtSRLFnF2ysdb7QBw0XefXfjp8dht0jzo3zFBwpZHJXZ7iev2m8iLP5HZP2RWoNY1kl7hv6lEDrvgFwW2fdA9NUW3PbT-_hjIsWaSIe57_2aHM1xqF_9OBcbuA/4kn/GuSVyeyJR9apL40uH7mFYg/h0/h001.MxvTDJQfKqWCbXRJ-K_egnSuMXflNfy77W-qs0KpuQM) [**Join us! Tell the wannabe dictator and his MAGA Supreme Court justices: There are no kings in America. Find an event near you now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbIwXrUx9efdTq_vbf4FLD3URDpUTRPLMOBPwnpnZ57QMhKlSIbOK4DgP4Bebu2gJj-_ovJX-ynedOdj6znp3vGH57jtnT9An7xCiQWw3ACKbxlE3tK7sXqgKfIJh7ClRKAym0u7ejoa6pQsWXQXXtGqB2pX8_W4GOnb7nAZyUaf88-0P79QdAx3T92uN3RtKYX5Iqpp8L28F2ZMFSdQ7vv5STukA31A_fGUxXZBKZ_1hxHh_ZQnqb-MYpD0CWVmiA/4kn/GuSVyeyJR9apL40uH7mFYg/h1/h001.Jn4zxpEqcUssb6Hcipkv2C4zQr70yOXOoRE_18plVW8) [JOIN US](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbIwXrUx9efdTq_vbf4FLD3URDpUTRPLMOBPwnpnZ57QJiXYGASdtgzWdDNzHKWkCE2xW-Sz88dhclgYcpPXhtbom3zdNZiR5j2vQfX9FXSmhxQ9nfxVm__ltlA5K4wo345SzmW-gWRZYZJAQhEEcPx0Vn_pRke-JTuJuwdu1qMdjoTtfdEInu4EjnouNITArEn2LadKAx-bN8g8K_BILu7536xIqiLnEhB7GCWc5WEc2t6GYc1h39ncDScLlV192w/4kn/GuSVyeyJR9apL40uH7mFYg/h2/h001.ytUhTVqomT_DeTnqr1l7vw0jjAgV-CMu12dRQ_MsqGY) The wannabe dictator, his authoritarian administration, and his Supreme Court cronies want us to be too scared to defend our democracy. They’re betting on our silence as they take away our freedoms and trample our Constitution. **But our constitution and our democracy are by and for the people, not the executive branch. clean_body: There are no kings in America—no matter what the Supreme Court says. | | Peter, The MAGA justices on the Supreme Court have done everything they can to erode constitutional separation of powers and give Trump the powers of a King in America. They’ve given him permission to break the law, stopped lower courts from putting him in check, greenlit his violent anti-immigrant agenda, and more. This term, they’re poised to let him singlehandedly control our economy and rig our politics even further. But We the People know that none of this is right. And as Trump attempts to silence dissent in cities across the country, Americans are standing up. Next weekend, United for Democracy is joining Americans across the country to stand up and fight back. Thousands of people in communities across the United States are coming together for another day of No Kings rallies on October 18th. The wannabe dictator, his authoritarian administration, and his Supreme Court cronies want us to be too scared to defend our democracy. They’re betting on our silence as they take away our freedoms and trample our Constitution. But our constitution and our democracy are by and for the people, not the executive branch. And the people aren’t afraid to stand up for what’s right. We’re at a critical juncture in our country’s history. We can watch our democracy get ripped away from us, or we can use our First Amendment rights to fight back. Thank you for being in this fight, Morgan Stahr United for Democracy P.S. body:
Let’s not let Republicans define the narrative on this shutdown.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117104961/575363185/1866411932?refcode=251011_sm_shutdown2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTMzZGFmMS1jNmE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WymUEl2Vg5RezVifb9_5-lYIyIko7Cm4UYkwlhUyDWo=)

Hi team, Nobody wants a shutdown, but it’s important to understand why we’re here. Instead of working toward a solution, Republicans went on vacation. Shameful. As the government shut down for the first time since Trump’s first administration, the Trump White House plastered government websites with propaganda falsely claiming that the shutdown is because of the “Radical Left” and that Democrats were motivated by wanting open borders and healthcare for undocumented immigrants. That’s a blatant lie. Republicans control the House, the Senate, and the White House. This is their shutdown. This is their choice. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117104962/575363186/2005830277?refcode=251011_sm_shutdown2&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTMzZGFmMS1jNmE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WymUEl2Vg5RezVifb9_5-lYIyIko7Cm4UYkwlhUyDWo=) **[I know what I stand for, and that’s keeping healthcare costs affordable for Americans. If you’re with me, chip in and let’s send a message to Republicans in power that we won’t be fooled by their tactics.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117104963/575363187/2005830277?refcode=251011_sm_shutdown2&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTMzZGFmMS1jNmE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WymUEl2Vg5RezVifb9_5-lYIyIko7Cm4UYkwlhUyDWo=)** | | [**CHIP IN**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117104964/575363188/1866411932?refcode=251011_sm_shutdown2&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTMzZGFmMS1jNmE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WymUEl2Vg5RezVifb9_5-lYIyIko7Cm4UYkwlhUyDWo= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

body:
The Democratic Party of Wisconsin just endorsed Judge Chris Taylor!
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251011-680&t=1&akid=692%2E294397%2ENAoJqP)
Folks,
Big news: **The Democratic Party of Wisconsin just endorsed Judge Chris Taylor!**
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/endorsement_petition_oct/source=em20251011-680?t=2&akid=692%2E294397%2ENAoJqP)
This endorsement is a huge show of confidence in Judge Chris Taylor’s record of fairness, integrity, and standing up for people’s rights.
It shows that Wisconsinites across the state are rallying behind a candidate who will ensure everyone gets a fair shot in our judicial system.
**But building a winning coalition takes more than one big endorsement — it takes thousands of grassroots supporters standing shoulder to shoulder.**
[**That’s why we’re asking: Will you endorse Judge Chris Taylor for Wisconsin Supreme Court today?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/endorsement_petition_oct/source=em20251011-680?t=3&akid=692%2E294397%2ENAoJqP)

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Republicans shut down the government.
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-header-2.png]

Friend, Republicans shut down the government last week. They chose to chase headlines and partisanship, and working families are paying the price.

My Democratic colleagues and I were ready to negotiate on a deal that would protect access to health care, invest in our communities, and lower costs — but Republicans walked out.

Now, the livelihoods of thousands of federal workers are in limbo. The healthcare of 15 million people is in jeopardy. Hospitals across Ohio, especially those in rural areas, are at risk of cutting services or closing entirely.

All because Republicans care more about showing partisan loyalty than delivering for Americans.

I’m ready to reopen the government, pass a responsible, bipartisan budget, and deliver for the American people. Will you sign our petition to demand that Republicans do the same?

Demand Republicans end the shutdowN >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t184JyQtIEWlMQPKquwfPQ2?amp;refcode=251011_mk_shutdown]Thank you, friend.

— Marcy
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/95655/images/kaptur-email-headshot.jpg]

About Marcy Kaptur
Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House.

My Democratic colleagues and I were ready to negotiate on a deal that would protect access to health care, invest in our communities, and lower costs — but Republicans walked out. Now, the livelihoods of thousands of federal workers are in limbo. The healthcare of 15 million people is in jeopardy. Hospitals across Ohio, especially those in rural areas, are at risk of cutting services or closing entirely. All because Republicans care more about showing partisan loyalty than delivering for Americans. I’m ready to reopen the government, pass a responsible, bipartisan budget, and deliver for the American people. Will you sign our petition to demand that Republicans do the same? Demand Republicans end the shutdowN >> [ you, friend. — Marcy [] About Marcy Kaptur Marcy Kaptur is a fighter for high-wage jobs, growing a workforce to meet the needs of the 21st century, and protecting our region’s most vital natural resource, the Great Lakes. She’s worked with both parties to secure investments in our communities and has been a true friend of veterans, seniors, first responders and working people. She’s a voice for us all in the People’s House. Donate Now [] Give Monthly [] Follow Marcy [] [] Checks may also be mailed to: Kaptur for Congress - PO Box 899, Toledo, OH 43697 Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [] . subject: Iowa's farmers have been left behind

body:
Miller-Meeks and her colleagues are trying to slap a bandage on it with a bailout.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117105522/575365083/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTliMjlhYy1jYmE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKNlaPdufF4qHa7j_iTaDR1lyIbkBxkzEgSEHg3XDn4=)

Peter,

Harvest season in Iowa is a time that's usually filled with pride and gratitude. But this year, it's marked by something else: **uncertainty.**

**China is backing out of key U.S. crop imports — including soybeans from Iowa — because of reckless tariffs that Mariannette Miller-Meeks has supported time and again.** These trade wars have slammed Iowa's farmers, costing them an estimated $1.5 billion in losses from slimmer profit margins and higher costs to keep their farms running. The Iowa Soybean Association is calling it the worst farm economy since the 1980s.

**Miller-Meeks and her colleagues are trying to slap a bandage on it with a bailout. But economists agree — it won't fix the real problem. Iowa's farmers are still facing unstable markets and rising costs, and even this short-term aid won't reach the many other industries that are suffering alongside them.**

The Iowa Soybean Association is pleading for the president to end the tariffs and strike a deal with China — not throw cash at the problem. But Miller-Meeks keeps ignoring them, voting to prop up the same disastrous policies that caused this mess.

And as if that weren't enough, unseasonably high temperatures and too little rain have forced farmers to rush their harvests to avoid crop disease and field fires. That's not normal — and it's being made worse by the ongoing government crisis, which has halted critical USDA crop progress reports that farmers rely on to plan their work.

Thanks to Mariannette Miller-Meeks and her allies in Congress, Iowa's farmers aren’t able to do what they do best. **[Christina knows Iowa's farmers deserve better. She understands that agriculture isn't just an industry here — it's a way of life. subject: Two Republicans are now running against me.
body:
|

My re-election campaign just got much tougher. Last month, news broke that our first Republican challenger filed papers to run against me. Then this week, we got word that a second, high-profile Republican entered the race. **We officially have TWO Republicans who have launched campaigns to unseat me.** **[I want to shed light on why this is so significant, but first, it's critical that we respond to this news with a groundswell of grassroots support. Can you send in $3 to keep this seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117105738/575365946/-1516755731?refcode=em-10.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODljMDVjM2MtY2NhNi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fFkxZXkuwawqkFpN7NuocHrXF0er3hfG8F4kvrlmQp8=)** | **[Donate $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117105740/575365949/-1516755731?refcode=em-10.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODljMDVjM2MtY2NhNi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fFkxZXkuwawqkFpN7NuocHrXF0er3hfG8F4kvrlmQp8=)**

As you know, California's congressional districts could undergo some big changes if Prop 50 passes. Key battlegrounds will be redrawn to counter the GOP’s election-rigging schemes in Texas and other red states.
**But even under new lines, CA-45 will remain one of the most competitive districts in the country, and one of the few places Republicans can go on offense.**
The GOP knows this, and we expect more Republicans to announce soon. And we expect them to treat CA-45 as one of its top takeover targets in the _entire country_ – and that’s no exaggeration.
**[The GOP is betting big on this district. Let’s prove no amount of dark money can drown out our voices. clean_body: | = My re-election campaign just got much tougher. Last month, news broke that our first Republican challenger filed papers to run against me. Then this week, we got word that a second, high-profile Republican entered the race. We officially have TWO Republicans who have launched campaigns to unseat me. = | = As you know, California's congressional districts could undergo some big changes if Prop 50 passes. Key battlegrounds will be redrawn to counter the GOP’s election-rigging schemes in Texas and other red states. But even under new lines, CA-45 will remain one of the most competitive districts in the country, and one of the few places Republicans can go on offense. The GOP knows this, and we expect more Republicans to announce soon. And we expect them to treat CA-45 as one of its top takeover targets in the entire country – and that’s no exaggeration. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
The game isn’t over until the final whistle blows | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117106035/575367042/-1112981798?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.11_VTech-Game_B1_F1_S1_C1_U2_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg2MTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDViYjhkNjQtY2NhNi1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=F49rThkVaqLt-XDWu2Rdqu9sXT2zMdEH6DbQA0rdpZA=)

| | Hey, the Hokies are about to take on Georgia Tech, so I’ll keep this short. **Everybody knows that in football, the game isn’t over until the final whistle blows.** In my race for Attorney General here in Virginia, we’re in the 4th quarter — and it’s shaping up to be a nail-biter.A recent poll shows Jason Miyares just one point behind me, and he’s _still_ outraising us more than 2-to-1. | Friend,
A life or death battle for the Democratic Party is currently being waged in Pennsylvania.
MAGA billionaire, Jeff Yass, has assumed Elon Musk's former role as financier for MAGA's most insidious schemes--pouring tens of millions of dollars into the November Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election to topple the democratic majority on the court.

| If MAGA wins this election, it is game over for Democrats.
MAGA will seize control of the court responsible for overseeing the election laws in the most important swing state in the country, giving Trump carte blanche to do whatever he can to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections--ensuring Democrats can never win PA or the White House again for at least a decade:
---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZDB92XDdJUEQfZwGQRA5m2kwwQm2uhJI9roZ_ghLQrv5NHCO5Y7I8LV7g8s1KJUSsOH1yPqRxJJcX9ofz59k632E-unZ95iZYDxm0q65athzbr9uVXujUeS1eK8UTAUkloefm0eba4cjK5lgDhhqWX4AiWEHJ1wagHKxOeyx6EMtCFo1YmrQuFtK9CnL6r_SPFwxLTlyqSPaZDrUUB0lv3mS0b7aFS8LDcFqX0ON440=&c=-ZcIN_wyblxCD61Wi8Nrwe6byb9NiiN0FsF1R1YDRGfruhxVLVkpHw==&ch=A8W46waS7IhGEZCQSX9_-pmQbDV1KWkrAFACCWuRbUodmFCghPTSmA==)

| While Yass and Trump plot behind closed doors, Defend Our Courts has been the tip of the spear--one of the first major Democratic organizations to strike back when we launched one of the first ads about this race to hit the airwaves in July.
We have been warning about this threat before anyone else and have rallied tens of thousands of Democrats nationwide to come to PA's defense--raising nearly 3 million dollars. And now, as Yass floods the airwaves and mailboxes of PA voters, we're one of the best positioned Democratic organizations to fight back--immediately and everywhere.
Every ad we run, every organizer we train, every door we kock--is the tip of the spear in the battle for the Democratic Party's survival in PA.
But with only 24 days left until Election Day, we are still being outspent 10 to 1 by Jeff Yass. Every dollar you give sharpens the spear, keeps our ads live, and fuels the counter-offensive. Now's the moment to hit back harder than ever:

clean_body: If MAGA wins this election, it is game over for Democrats. | | | | | == | Friend, A life or death battle for the Democratic Party is currently being waged in Pennsylvania. MAGA billionaire, Jeff Yass, has assumed Elon Musk's former role as financier for MAGA's most insidious schemes--pouring tens of millions of dollars into the November Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election to topple the democratic majority on the court. | == | If MAGA wins this election, it is game over for Democrats. MAGA will seize control of the court responsible for overseeing the election laws in the most important swing state in the country, giving Trump carte blanche to do whatever he can to rig the upcoming '26 and '28 elections--ensuring Democrats can never win PA or the White House again for at least a decade: | | == | While Yass and Trump plot behind closed doors, Defend Our Courts has been the tip of the spear--one of the first major Democratic organizations to strike back when we launched one of the first ads about this race to hit the airwaves in July. We have been warning about this threat before anyone else and have rallied tens of thousands of Democrats nationwide to come to PA's defense--raising nearly 3 million dollars. And now, as Yass floods the airwaves and mailboxes of PA voters, we're one of the best positioned Democratic organizations to fight back--immediately and everywhere. Every ad we run, every organizer we train, every door we kock--is the tip of the spear in the battle for the Democratic Party's survival in PA. But with only 24 days left until Election Day, we are still being outspent 10 to 1 by Jeff Yass. Every dollar you give sharpens the spear, keeps our ads live, and fuels the counter-offensive. Now's the moment to hit back harder than ever: == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == The future of the Democratic Party is hanging by a thread-- we need Democrats across the nation to rally to PA's defense before it's too late. Thank you, Team Defend our Courts | | | | == | | == | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | == | | | | Defend Our Courts | P.O. Box 45569 | Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | | |

name: Team Pou
subject: Republicans want to break America’s promise
body:
Nellie says no cuts. No raising the retirement age.

| |
---
Hi friend, Republicans are once again coming after Social Security. They are openly talking about raising the retirement age. They are floating cuts to benefits. And they are threatening the very program that millions of Americans depend on after a lifetime of work. Let’s be clear: they are doing this all to help their billionaire friends. Nellie Pou will never accept raising the retirement age. She will never accept cuts to benefits. And she will never accept Republicans dismantling Social Security so they can keep giving tax breaks to billionaires. The only way to stop them is to take back the House. That is what this campaign is about. clean_body: Nellie says no cuts. No raising the retirement age. | | Hi friend, Republicans are once again coming after Social Security. They are openly talking about raising the retirement age. They are floating cuts to benefits. And they are threatening the very program that millions of Americans depend on after a lifetime of work. Let’s be clear: they are doing this all to help their billionaire friends. Nellie Pou will never accept raising the retirement age. She will never accept cuts to benefits. And she will never accept Republicans dismantling Social Security so they can keep giving tax breaks to billionaires. The only way to stop them is to take back the House. That is what this campaign is about. And it is why we need you with us. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. This fight is too important to sit out. Social Security is not up for debate. And Nellie will always stand up to Republicans who want to tear it down. Onward, Team Pou | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: MAHA Action
subject: Be in the Know: What's Coming Up
body:
Movie Premieres, Celebrating Moms & Constitution Discussions: Join inspiring conversations, connect with advocates, and catch an exclusive movie debut this weekend.

| | | [ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=1)
---
---
# Can’t-Miss Events Coming Soon
We’re excited to share a lineup of MAHA-themed events happening this weekend and beyond. Each one is a chance to come together with others who care about health, freedom, and a better future. Whether you join in person or online, don’t miss the opportunity to connect, learn, and take action alongside our growing movement.
---
#### October 10-11
Purcellville, VA

### **Medical Freedom and The Constitution – Protecting Yourself >From Government Overreach**
---
[ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=Xm_p2S5Vp_3s2DfekW3no1SertuR-KRRGyupBb88xBBptjJ9rsT1iyew5SD5Sjs9FtmzOZsRgS7LPHOJNFedhXIn9fR9DK5zCvXxdOEkM9nt2oS3ZPZRvn2IpVPFAfjzgrrFm5mPTRdsCV4sl025Pg&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=2)
---
Join the Virginia Medical Freedom Alliance and Feds for Freedom event on October 10 and 11 at Patrick Henry College in Purcellville, Virginia. Be shaped by the wisdom and experience from national speakers, and join discussions on constitutional principles and medical freedom. Take this weekend to forge new relationships and be empowered with the foundational principals of our Constitution. Students attend free! **[Learn more and register now →](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=Xm_p2S5Vp_3s2DfekW3no1SertuR-KRRGyupBb88xBBptjJ9rsT1iyew5SD5Sjs9FtmzOZsRgS7LPHOJNFedhXIn9fR9DK5zCvXxdOEkM9nt2oS3ZPZRvn2IpVPFAfjzgrrFm5mPTRdsCV4sl025Pg&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=3)**
---
---
#### October 12
Virtual & Malibu, CA
### **Virtual & In Person Movie Premiere: _An Inconvenient Study_**
---
[ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=C2cbGJKIhuJ9rW-GfVoh2Jy7nQIfmV2zverus25-U7peSgq-iPFy_7Im2_CpGA42&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=4)
---
In 2016, journalist Del Bigtree challenged a top infectious disease expert to a vaxxed vs. unvaxxed study. The study, intended to disprove Del, was never released—until now, when its results are finally being revealed. Join us **[in person for the premiere at the Malibu film festival](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=C2cbGJKIhuJ9rW-GfVoh2Jy7nQIfmV2zverus25-U7poepMFd_lytO8iABXGEqnn&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=5)** on Sunday, October 12 at 10am PST, with a panel discussion featuring Del Bigtree to follow. You can **[catch the global ONLINE premiere event on Sunday, October 12th at 5:00pm PST](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=C2cbGJKIhuJ9rW-GfVoh2Jy7nQIfmV2zverus25-U7peSgq-iPFy_7Im2_CpGA42&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=6)**. You won’t want to miss this epic piece with exclusive content.
---
---
#### **October 16
Austin, TX**
### **Moms Across America Fundraiser**
Join Kristina and Evan Baehr for a happy-hour event on October 16 celebrating Moms Across America’s advocacy for healthier families across the nation, featuring founder **Zen Honeycutt**. Enjoy great food and drinks, connect with others who share your passion, and support the continued growth of this nationwide movement for children’s health and safety. **[Be a part of this special night →](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=AFwzpHQMu3CMjOjpPG92yXq8Hv81wd7LOjgede51ITE&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=7)**
---
---
#### October 21
Washington, DC
### MAHA Institute Presents "Weaponization of Science Round Table: Flaws and Fraud in Research"
---
[ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=YmOSYJYZ5T0wUQpBKrzpY2uzmR7BLO4R_Zlw0BXQifOymg0LQTgxoWJ8Zcm710rN&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=8)
---
While Secretary Kennedy and President Trump are pushing for radical transparency in science, medical journals remain mired in corporate and ideological bias. Join the MAHA Institute for a roundtable discussion to uncover how the medical journal ecosystem became a swamp of corruption and how new models of information delivery can restore trust and revolutionize the way science is communicated. [Learn more and register **→**](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=YmOSYJYZ5T0wUQpBKrzpY2uzmR7BLO4R_Zlw0BXQifOymg0LQTgxoWJ8Zcm710rN&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=9)
---
---
#### **November 7–9
Austin, TX**
### **Children’s Health Defense 2025 Annual Conference**
---
[ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=QALdKcSWg4FvNT83KeZmGjgDSKnJOj12Mb9MFseEhIzFxkwOqwaDSzKQZWwnRdXjIQY9hZmiy9mPyD9EPdu_1JlTGLc11HjhoNccV42NFM4&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=10)
---
Join MAHA and the medical freedom community in Austin for one of the biggest events of the year — the Children’s Health Defense 2025 Annual Conference. Hear from leading voices including **Sen. Rand Paul** , **Sen. Ron Johnson** , **Russell Brand** , **Bret Weinstein** , and many more. This landmark gathering will unite advocates from across the country for three days of powerful conversations, inspiring leadership, and bold ideas for a healthier future. **[Learn more and register for the CHD 2025 Annual Conference →](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=QALdKcSWg4FvNT83KeZmGjgDSKnJOj12Mb9MFseEhIzFxkwOqwaDSzKQZWwnRdXjIQY9hZmiy9mPyD9EPdu_1JlTGLc11HjhoNccV42NFM4&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=11)**
---
---
| [ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=PWPiYaxM73AUiFXZdpyaD6J06ilu2zt1fAqVrE3TX3Ix555D9UXBZGDfYa-9cIVPpx_hZG96qsGyfz8slBi0Zuu1W3HeoOFHPYNWW7Xh-FR5M8MifFbSo6UH2pZwvhGub4-qf8UfetDOQ2g3UMOJ5xnbuvIKIbZDRob8VysUnEQ&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=12)
---
|
### Show Up Decked-Out
Joining an event this weekend? Why not show up repping the mission? Every purchase supports this movement. **[Shop now →](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=PWPiYaxM73AUiFXZdpyaD-ZW8wA453sr9FdgH4jFytc&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=13)**
---
---

All rights reserved. 307 W 36th St, 11FL, New York, NY 10018, United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.mahaaction.com/unsubscribe?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=15) [Privacy Policy](https://www.mahaaction.com/privacy?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=16) • [Terms of Use](https://www.mahaaction.com/terms?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=17) • [Contact Us](https://www.mahaaction.com/contact?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=18) [](http://www.mahaaction.com/?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=19) [](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=bAwW8ZhAEzrKnTyUHZNOq0o_nLCNlOFL7e8zIkoBwNw&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=20) [](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=RELWhBZZXDRtGtBAPQCiyd4JKJyS84PV6J8jRa2Uknw5tLJ0EtiZSOSFFNVCqEMj&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=event_roundup&n=21)

name: Wes Moore HQ
subject: We’re reaching out while Wes is busy
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=748%2E1086043%2EvEK-A_)
Wes is busy traveling across MD, Peter, so we’re reaching out with a quick ask for your help. If you’re already on board, you can power our reelection campaign with a donation here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20251011-1?refcode=em-20251011-1](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251011-1.3xwLlY&refcode=em-20251011-1&t=4&akid=748%2E1086043%2EvEK-A_)**
**Wes Moore is fighting for Maryland, but there are four important reasons why he can’t do it alone.**
1. **Democratic governors like Wes are facing down the Trump administration’s worst.** The pressure is on, and we need to show that this large grassroots movement stands with Wes no matter what they throw our way.
2. **Republicans are already jumping into the race, and more could follow.** There’s no telling how strong an opponent Wes could face, or how much money could pour into Maryland to defeat him.
3. **Maryland has flipped red before, and could again in 2026.** Even though some consider it a “blue state,” two of our last four governors were Republicans — and they might have their eyes on making Wes a one-term governor.
4. **There’s no better time than now to make a difference.** Whatever we can raise now can be put to use much more efficiently — and powerfully — than in the final stretch of the election. That’s why we have to ask for your help today.

**[So with that in mind, Peter, are you in? Please make a donation of any amount today to Wes’ reelection campaign.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251011-1.3xwLlY&refcode=em-20251011-1&t=5&akid=748%2E1086043%2EvEK-A_)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251011-1.3xwLlY&amount=5&refcode=em-20251011-1&t=24&akid=748%2E1086043%2EvEK-A_)**
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Moore

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251011-1&t=25&refcode2=748_1086043_vEK-A_&akid=748%2E1086043%2EvEK-A_)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=748%2E1086043%2EvEK-A_)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=748%2E1086043%2EvEK-A_)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

You already know the threat of food shortages, blackouts and supply chain failures is more real than ever. That's why **demand is surging** and thousands have already claimed their **2 Months of FREE Survival Food** with this Exclusive Limited-Time deal. Did you miss out? [**[Hurry – click here to see if this deal is still available]**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=14pegjudqirj4etkosso4oedcj4vk2qagbxongreay4087o9k6uurpc3jptt934ychtz40n7j81mb02xi4qb3q6b4q5l88e33xx1yd0rm2mla1j0o58uvzu1qgif1ow6gee7ornl1bd7jfd9hmdxf1xz1tinx4siuk3irxli2nci9n1jrlj21ynn8sgnkjtabzmxshunhnaejjx6g3gg0lq3nbs3gwgomv2nqd0wadaiwdkpehdlth&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3zd8j&__onlt=h) These food kits are flying off the shelves, selling out time and time again. People are waking up to the truth: you can't count on the system anymore. We gave our warehouse manager, Matt, one mission: **"Produce as many kits as humanly possible!"** And wow... did he ever deliver. The result? **A tidal wave of inventory just crashed into our warehouse – more kits than we have space for.** Now we're on the hook for major storage costs... and we need your help. **This is your chance to take advantage of our mistake.** We're slashing prices and practically *giving away* these premium survival food kits just to move them fast. When you claim yours today, you're not only securing peace of mind for your family, **you're helping an American-owned company stay afloat through a supply chain nightmare.** And yes – **you'll also get a 2 additional FREE BONUSES** as our thank you! [**Click Here To Get Your 2 Months of FREE Survival Food When You Get Our 3-Month Survival Food Kit (Only While Supplies Last!)**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=14pegjudqirj4etkosso4oedcj4vk2qagbxongreay4087o9k6uurpc3jptt934ychtz40n7j81mb02xi4qb3q6b4q5l88e33xx1yd0rm2mla1j0o58uvzu1qgif1ow6gee7ornl1bd7jfd9hmdxf1xz1tinx4siuk3irxli2nci9n1jrlj21ynn8sgnkjtabzmxshunhnaejjx6g3gg0lq3nbs3gwgomv2nqd0wadaiwdkpehdlth&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3zd8j&__onlt=h) [](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=14pegjudqirj4etkosso4oedcj4vk2qagbxongreay4087o9k6uurpc3jptt934ychtz40n7j81mb02xi4qb3q6b4q5l88e33xx1yd0rm2mla1j0o58uvzu1qgif1ow6gee7ornl1bd7jfd9hmdxf1xz1tinx4siuk3irxli2nci9n1jrlj21ynn8sgnkjtabzmxshunhnaejjx6g3gg0lq3nbs3gwgomv2nqd0wadaiwdkpehdlth&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3zd8j&__onlt=h) This is more than just food. It's **freedom in a box.** These 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are loaded with hearty, satisfying meals that are built to last 25 years. [**Click Here To Get Your 2 Months of FREE Survival Food When You Get Our 3-Month Survival Food Kit (Only While Supplies Last!)**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=14pegjudqirj4etkosso4oedcj4vk2qagbxongreay4087o9k6uurpc3jptt934ychtz40n7j81mb02xi4qb3q6b4q5l88e33xx1yd0rm2mla1j0o58uvzu1qgif1ow6gee7ornl1bd7jfd9hmdxf1xz1tinx4siuk3irxli2nci9n1jrlj21ynn8sgnkjtabzmxshunhnaejjx6g3gg0lq3nbs3gwgomv2nqd0wadaiwdkpehdlth&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3zd8j&__onlt=h) That's right – **no junk fillers, no sketchy ingredients** – just real food, crafted for real emergencies. **Get 5 Months of Food, Security & Peace of Mind – All In One Kit** Hand-packed in a small American facility by people who actually care, these meals are designed to keep you nourished, calm, and strong when everything else falls apart. And thanks to the recent upgrades, **these kits contain more food than ever.** It's a massive value – and right now, it's the lowest price you'll ever see. Don't wait for a crisis to wish you had prepared. Right now, this overstock deal gives you the chance to save big, feed your family in an emergency, and protect what matters most. But this inventory won't last long. [**Click Here To Get Your 2 Months of FREE Survival Food When You Get Our 3-Month Survival Food Kit (Only While Supplies Last!)**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=14pegjudqirj4etkosso4oedcj4vk2qagbxongreay4087o9k6uurpc3jptt934ychtz40n7j81mb02xi4qb3q6b4q5l88e33xx1yd0rm2mla1j0o58uvzu1qgif1ow6gee7ornl1bd7jfd9hmdxf1xz1tinx4siuk3irxli2nci9n1jrlj21ynn8sgnkjtabzmxshunhnaejjx6g3gg0lq3nbs3gwgomv2nqd0wadaiwdkpehdlth&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3zd8j&__onlt=h) Stay Safe. Stay Prepared.

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Real People. Real Emergencies. Real Gratitude.** [](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=14pegjudqirj4etkosso4oedcj4vk2qagbxongreay4087o9k6uurpc3jptt934ychtz40n7j81mb02xi4qb3q6b4q5l88e33xx1yd0rm2mla1j0o58uvzu1qgif1ow6gee7ornl1bd7jfd9hmdxf1xz1tinx4siuk3irxli2nci9n1jrlj21ynn8sgnkjtabzmxshunhnaejjx6g3gg0lq3nbs3gwgomv2nqd0wadaiwdkpehdlth&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3zd8j&__onlt=h) **_Rory H._**_
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_ [**Click Here To Get Your 2 Months of FREE Survival Food When You Get Our 3-Month Survival Food Kit (Only While Supplies Last!)**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=14pegjudqirj4etkosso4oedcj4vk2qagbxongreay4087o9k6uurpc3jptt934ychtz40n7j81mb02xi4qb3q6b4q5l88e33xx1yd0rm2mla1j0o58uvzu1qgif1ow6gee7ornl1bd7jfd9hmdxf1xz1tinx4siuk3irxli2nci9n1jrlj21ynn8sgnkjtabzmxshunhnaejjx6g3gg0lq3nbs3gwgomv2nqd0wadaiwdkpehdlth&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t3zd8j&__onlt=h)
---

Peter, When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn't famous. He wasn't filling arenas. He wasn't a household name. A few people told me, _" You've gotta meet this guy -- he's doing something big out in Illinois."_ So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs -- surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving.

_**Above:** The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began -- just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. _
Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... _I knew._ Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn't have much. But what we had was conviction -- and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. **Faith, family, freedom** -- and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? _He did it._ He didn't just build a brand... _He built a machine._ First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation -- a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it _from the start._ Charlie and I weren't just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together.

We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us... We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense -- in the very states the GOP had given up on. **And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. ** We didn't just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right -- _and it delivered real results._ 10 for 10. **In every single state we operated in... Trump won.** In Arizona _alone,_ we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes -- well beyond the margin of victory. _In Wisconsin?_ 60,000+. _In Nevada?_ 6,000+ -- and we won back a district we hadn't carried in 20 years. _In Michigan?_ 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn't just make noise... _We made history. _

_**Above:** Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That's me on the left -- still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. _
Peter, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. _Because Charlie never stopped. _ He didn't build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they're losing their kid to the Left... For every student who's afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? **We have to carry the torch. We have to keep the machine running -- ****_and make it stronger than ever._** Everything we've felt since the day we lost Charlie -- _we must turn it into action._ He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: _" What are we building next?"_ **Well, Peter, here 's the answer: We're building the next generation of grassroots power -- one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time.**

He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: " What are we building next?" Well, Peter, here 's the answer: We're building the next generation of grassroots power -- one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time. But it doesn 't happen without you. So, here 's my ask... Go to church for Charlie. Start a family for Charlie. Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie. Register to vote for Charlie. Chase votes for Charlie. Run for office for Charlie. Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started. That's what Charlie would've wanted. I'm not stopping until we save our country. I'm all in -- and if you're reading this, I'm betting that you are, too. If so, I'm honored to fight alongside you. And if you've already been with us for a while -- thank you. Now, let's get to work. For Charlie. God Bless, Tyler Bowyer Chief Operating Officer Turning Point Action P.S. I would give anything to have Charlie back. But he left us with something powerful -- a machine that works... a machine that's proven and battle-tested. Now it's time to run it -- and run it like never before. Bigger. Bolder. More battlegrounds. More victories. Because right now, thanks to a generous supporter of Turning Point Action, your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar -- up to $500,000, through October 31. That means, with your gift today: ✅ 2X the activists trained ✅ 2X the voters registered ✅ 2X the pressure on weak-kneed politicians ✅ 2X the ballot-chasing operations ✅ 2X the grassroots strength the Left can't stop We don't need to reinvent anything. Charlie already drew the blueprint and turned the key. So, if you've been wondering how to help... If you've been asking " what now?" Then, Peter, this is your moment to step in, fuel the fight, and take Charlie 's vision to the next level. Let's turn this energy -- this momentum -- into action. PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION.COM) AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE 4930 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Amanda Sherman Baity
subject: Medical experts shut him down then, and we'll shut him down now...
body:
Remember what he did with Tylenol? Now he's coming after abortion pills. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117107686/575373081/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ23_20251011_RFKPlaybookRS_PL&sourceid=1057203&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTZkZWI3Yy1kNGE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEYnucYWARAzYuF_1FHiKp0A6Zvm542sM37NNqgSbJY=) Hi Peter,

RFK Jr. is continuing to weaponize his position as head of the Department of Health and Human Services to target mifepristone, an abortion medication with a 25-year safety record that's been used by more than seven million people.

His playbook? Manufacture doubt, undermine trust, and restrict access.

**[**But EMILYs List women are the frontline defense for abortion access across the country. Before I explain more, will you chip in today to support the Democratic pro-choice women running to take back power and protect our fundamental freedoms?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117107690/575373083/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ23_20251011_RFKPlaybookRS_PL&sourceid=1057203&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTZkZWI3Yy1kNGE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEYnucYWARAzYuF_1FHiKp0A6Zvm542sM37NNqgSbJY=)** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/117107693/575373087/-1403821653?refcode=WUEFEJ23_20251011_RFKPlaybookRS_PL&sourceid=1057203&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTZkZWI3Yy1kNGE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UEYnucYWARAzYuF_1FHiKp0A6Zvm542sM37NNqgSbJY=)
---
RFK Jr. announced that the DHHS, through the FDA, will conduct a new "study" of mifepristone, including its safety protocols and how it's dispensed.

We've seen this before, Peter. This is the exact same tactic he used with Tylenol — spreading baseless fears to pregnant women about autism risks, despite decades of evidence proving the safety of acetaminophen. Medical experts shut him down then, and we'll shut him down now.

EMILYs List women in the U.S. House and Senate are the ones leading the fight to combat RFK Jr.'s dangerous disinformation campaign. This cycle, we can elect even more Democratic pro-choice women who will be the stopgap between the Trump administration's anti-science, anti-choice agenda and the vast majority of Americans, who are pro-choice.

clean_body: Remember what he did with Tylenol? Now he's coming after abortion pills. | = Hi Peter, RFK Jr. is continuing to weaponize his position as head of the Department of Health and Human Services to target mifepristone, an abortion medication with a 25-year safety record that's been used by more than seven million people. His playbook? Manufacture doubt, undermine trust, and restrict access. = | = RFK Jr. announced that the DHHS, through the FDA, will conduct a new "study" of mifepristone, including its safety protocols and how it's dispensed. We've seen this before, Peter. This is the exact same tactic he used with Tylenol — spreading baseless fears to pregnant women about autism risks, despite decades of evidence proving the safety of acetaminophen. Medical experts shut him down then, and we'll shut him down now. EMILYs List women in the U.S. House and Senate are the ones leading the fight to combat RFK Jr.'s dangerous disinformation campaign. This cycle, we can elect even more Democratic pro-choice women who will be the stopgap between the Trump administration's anti-science, anti-choice agenda and the vast majority of Americans, who are pro-choice. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Talk soon, Amanda Sherman Baity (she/her/hers) Chief Communications Officer, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. body:
Janelle Stelson is running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/57CdP-wFgkuQm58EpOgxvQ2?unsubscribedata=LdKifHmPzcXksqnJE94tE%2FY%2Fj9STNn3CKMYO5ofE%2BJOmzgPePkdPNJFTRY83UTuFi3RxuUnKlPXadwcfpvnx24A49y2QKjLzc29DE7RRIjCyXY31vTktPCp%2F88zsxPTBrXqUQwUdnkRPIGikwKmSb1EjXup0YIbVQ7IubmrsI6zTe0t%2Fl7CzHU89Kaj1BLfDSIS%2Fstt8Jx2G5Vrx2kTJYOWmDCK7nXDIlAhCxbE0Elz9RxAfYFZyDelVRkDT2FPNJZG5QVT9MJ0iK1MmXbsxRWz6wieF030imDOjo8q9Ij0OepoQ8M6uZG860v8RrkhGNm19giOZkWUrfs27zViyX6gA4PogsUA%2F5FETqeXfaJWZDY2IyxfDwo3AdyOCPvI2qju4V1cc9D5yGn3mbLaGTjhAZYOS01xfMQEcH1yzD8fSD00%2F98qqjYDDiqAQ67bh)
