Which ones poured $100 billion into corrupting American universities? If you can't answer those questions, you don't understand the difference between Qatar and our actual allies. "Yeah but, but, but... Singapore trains at Mountain Home Air Force Base too!!" | | ---|---|--- Yes but you know what Singapore doesn't do? Fund terrorism. Enforce Sharia law. Shelter Hamas. Bankroll anti-American propaganda on US universities. Comparing Qatar to Singapore is like comparing a convicted arsonist to a firefighter because they both carry matches. "We sold them jets so we have to train them" | | ---|---|--- Wait, so, "standard business practices" override security concerns? Commerce justifies everything? So if Iran wanted to buy F-15s tomorrow, we'd let them build a facility here to train their pilots? If North Korea placed an order, would we station their military personnel in Montana? If Russia said they wanted to purchase American weapons systems, would we roll out the training program? Of course not. Because the identity of the buyer matters. The "it's just business" argument assumes all customers are equally trustworthy. They're not. If selling weapons justifies training the buyer regardless of who they are, then we should sell to anyone with money. Al-Qaeda has funding. Should we train them? ISIS had millions. Should they get a facility too? The logic breaks down immediately. Selling weapons to a country that funds terrorism isn't "just business." It's arming our enemies and calling it commerce. It's the military-industrial complex convincing you that because money changed hands, principles don't matter anymore. Qatar bought F-15s. Great. Train their pilots in Qatar. They have an entire country. They have airspace. They have bases. Why Idaho? Why American soil? "America has the best military training" | | ---|---|--- So what? 1. Should we train Chinese pilots because we have the best training? 2. Should we teach Russian special forces our tactics? 3. Should we share our military doctrine with Iran because they're interested in learning from the best? Having the best training doesn 't mean we should sell it to hostile actors. It means we should protect it more carefully. It means we should be more selective about who gets access. If "we're the best" justifies training anyone, then we should open our training programs to every adversary (after all, they all want to learn from the best). China would love access to our pilot training. Russia would love to study our tactics. Under this logic, we should accommodate them! Qatar has flat desert terrain and small airspace. So do plenty of other countries we could train them in. Saudi Arabia. UAE. Jordan. Egypt. All have suitable terrain and are closer to Qatar. Why Idaho specifically? Why do they need to train in American airspace? What makes Idaho so special that Qatar can't train in the Middle East? The answer isn't about training quality. It's about establishing a foothold on American soil. And everyone making the "best training" argument knows it. "You're being hysterical" Raising security concerns about foreign influence is [CHECKS NOTES]... " irrational hysteria" now? Was it hysteria to question Chinese students in sensitive research programs? Was it hysteria to investigate Confucius Institutes? Was it hysteria when we finally acknowledged that foreign influence operations exist? Was it hysteria when we discovered that China was stealing billions in intellectual property? No. We were late to recognize those threats. We were told not to worry. We were told it was normal. We were called hysterical. And we were wrong to listen. If questioning foreign influence is always hysteria, then we should never investigate anything. Foreign money in politics? Stop being hysterical. Foreign operatives on campuses? You're fear-mongering, bro. Foreign governments buying influence? That's just paranoia. That "logic" means giving up on national security completely. The China Connection Here's where it gets really interesting... Some of the same people defending Qatar spent years making excuses for China! Jake Sullivan traveled to Beijing for what the White House called "candid, substantive, and constructive" talks. Antony Blinken made the pilgrimage. So did Janet Yellen and Gina Raimondo. All of them smiling, shaking hands, talking about "managing the relationship." This happened while China was stealing our technology. While they were infiltrating our universities through Confucius Institutes. While they were preparing for war with us (while they were committing genocide against the Uighurs 🤫🤫🤫). And yes of course- the Biden crime family has ties! | | ---|---|--- Hunter collected millions from Chinese companies and his uncle James received monthly payments totaling over $100,000. For what services? Nobody knows. But the money flowed while Sleepy Joe was making policy decisions about China. After he left office as VP more millions arrived. Remember when Hunter threatened a Chinese associate on WhatsApp, saying his father "was sitting next to him and there would be consequences if $10 million didn't arrive?" Days later, $5 million showed up. Some of that money made its way to Joe himself through his brother James. They called it a "loan repayment." How convenient. This is the same crew now telling us Qatar is fine. China was stealing from us. Spying on us. Preparing to fight us. But Hunter was getting rich off them, so the response was always measured. Always diplomatic. Always "managing the relationship." The Qatar Playbook vs. The China Playbook | | ---|---|--- Yes, with Trump's mighty comeback we finally started pushing back on China, but here's the problem: the exact same arguments people made for China work better than the arguments for Qatar. 1. " We need them for trade." China's economy dwarfs Qatar's. 2. " They help with diplomacy." China mediates conflicts too. 3. " We have shared interests." China claims counterterrorism cooperation. 4. " It's just training." Would you accept Chinese J-20 pilots training in Idaho? Every single defense of Qatar applies more to China. China's economy is vastly more important to us than Qatar's. China has more diplomatic leverage. China has more to offer strategically. And we correctly say no to China. So why are we saying yes to Qatar? Because Qatar bought their way in, that 's why. They gave Trump a 747 to use as Air Force One. They host our biggest Middle East base so we're trapped in the relationship. They broker deals with terrorists they themselves fund. They donated $100 billion to our universities to corrupt the next generation. They invested $45 billion in the US economy. They own us. And now they get a military facility in Idaho. The Subversion Playbook This is the kind of subversion where you buy influence openly. Where you fund universities until they teach your ideology. Where you donate to think tanks until they parrot your talking points. Where you host military bases until the host country can't afford to offend you. Where you give presidents planes until they stop asking hard questions. And then you get whatever you want. Including the right to station hundreds of personnel who live under Sharia law on American soil! Sharia law is pure evil and 100% NOT compatible with the Constitution. It's a system where apostasy means death. Where women need male permission to marry. Where religious law supersedes civil law. And we're importing it... to Idaho. What Changed? So... my BIG QUESTION still is... what changed? Trump himself said it in 2017: Qatar "has historically been a funder of terrorism at a very high level."~Donald Trump So what changed between 2017 and now? 1. Did Qatar stop funding Hamas? No. They still shelter Hamas leadership in Doha. 2. Did they abandon the Muslim Brotherhood? No. The royal family remains spiritually bound to them. 3. Did they stop pumping billions into American universities to promote antisemitism? No. It got worse after October 7. So what changed? We decided the money was too good to refuse. This is an ACTUAL case of "access politics." Qatar spent $100 billion subverting American education. They funded the campus chaos we saw after October 7. They paid for the professors teaching students that America is the real enemy. This is the exact same playbook China used. Confucius Institutes. Research partnerships. Donations. Access. Influence. Slow infiltration until you control the discourse. We finally woke up to China. We shut down Confucius Institutes during the "pandemic." Last year I even I sponsored a bill to stop China, from stealing American genetic information (the first bill like that in the nation - ). We woke up to China and called it what it was: foreign influence operations. So why are we rolling out the red carpet for Qatar? The Hostage Situation Because they trapped us by hosting our base. We painted ourselves into a corner decades ago when we built Al Udeid Air Base in Qatar, and now we're stuck. We "can't" say no because we need them more than they need us. That's being held hostage and calling it friendship. That's what happens when you build your critical infrastructure on someone else's territory and then act surprised when they have leverage over you. It's no secret that Qatar plays both sides and cooperates with us against the terrorists they finance. They shelter Hamas leadership. They fund the Muslim Brotherhood. They channels money to radical groups worldwide. Then they turn around and "help" us negotiate with those same groups. They create the problem, then get credit for "helping" solve it. That's quite the racket! It's like praising an arsonist for calling the fire department. And some folks say we're scared they'll run to China if we say no. Soooooo..... we're being blackmailed. "Let us build on your soil or we'll align with your enemies." And we're accepting it. How We Got Here This is what happens when: 1. You let money buy policy. 2. You let foreign governments purchase influence. 3. You decide that strategic relationships matter more than principles. 4. You're so terrified of losing "access" that you'll compromise on anything. | | ---|---|--- China did it. Now Qatar is doing it. Funding universities. Giving presidents planes. Hosting our bases. Buying influence in Washington. And getting a military facility in Idaho in return. The Bottom Line We're not importing allies. We're importing our enemies. People who fund terrorism. People who live under Sharia law. People who have spent $100 billion subverting American institutions. People who sheltered Hamas while they planned the murder of 1,200 Israelis. And we're giving them a military facility on American soil. Because they bought us. Simple as that. They bought our universities with $100 billion in donations. They bought our politicians with investments and deals. They bought our military with the Al Udeid base we can't afford to lose. They even bought our president a 747. And until we're willing to admit that our foreign policy has been purchased, we'll keep making the same mistakes. We'll keep letting countries that hate us operate on our soil. We'll keep funding our own subversion. We'll keep calling it "partnership" while they work to destroy us from within. Qatar funds the Muslim Brotherhood whose explicit goal is to destroy Western democracy. They've said it openly. They've written it in their founding documents. They've preached it from their pulpits. The Qatari royal family has sworn a spiritual oath to this organization. They follow its religious rulings. They advance its agenda. They fund its operations worldwide. And we just gave them a foothold in Idaho. The Warning We Ignored Steve Bannon was right. Qatar's fingerprints are all over the financing of both jihadist operations abroad and radical political movements at home. The same playbook seen in Europe, where Islamist enclaves fuse with hard-left activism, is now underway in America. We 've seen this movie before. We've seen it in London, where neighborhoods operate under informal Sharia law. We've seen it in Paris, where entire suburbs are no-go zones. We've seen it in Sweden, where gang violence and Islamic radicalism have transformed once-peaceful cities. The defenders say "this is different." They say "we're just training pilots." They say "stop being hysterical." They said the same thing about Confucius Institutes. They said the same thing about Chinese infiltration. They said the same thing about every foreign influence operation until it was too late to stop it. Qatar is not our ally. They're playing both sides. They host our base while funding our enemies. They broker peace deals while sheltering terrorists. They invest in our economy while corrupting our universities. And now they're building a military facility in Idaho. Hundreds of military-aged men from a country that enforces Sharia law. From a country whose royal family is sworn to the Muslim Brotherhood. From a country that sheltered Hamas while they planned October 7. On American soil. Stop defending this. Stop pretending this is normal. () | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Brian Lenney ? ?

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: I just ran 69 laps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon

We've seen it firsthand: Trump is sending troops into our cities, working to undermine the courts, and openly embracing political violence. That's why this Race to Save the Senate matters so much. It's about standing up for the rule of law, free speech, democracy, and every American's right to live in a country where government serves the people — not the powerful.

Now, let's finish strong — together.

name: Tyler Bowyer, Turning Point Action
subject: When I first met Charlie — I knew.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION
body:
A tribute to Charlie & Turning Point Action—see how to help and double your impact today.
|
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fe6dbb94663d4b268140ad116645f40b&_e=qasLesQUrhRgXX2GTIe5GX4q2xSNHqU5VjplwBlpMoAsEtsUpI-VPb5s5efjPjEeOHAdFB55D4xfhDh4Hdl9B0L1fWIsS6umKX5LrjcuCVM_oXrXFyJZdX9fQQWkKgDir2pIrYDLw5RV6V0waNFra1WvQqv4Edp2hxnA8B_KyZMw_v6ehPNHP1Ls-bZfiEzaomfwKfogR8trerit7S4lL9IgzcGhveiBoQHqFeHVpcdj2PrqfmETZge-ZPLHNlUXZnsqwz9l-Zf8XmP_xutJ1qdLEkrG6-5vzNtJRPDySYyK_CyuczCbcydq89DgYYNyXK8x6gKsxMAn55A2HFef3m9kie2oZRHLUe-p-fUS_miuOI1_L-9A_AOzoFLTjq1pdwYhwD2JhlDS3V3AeotC9Kg9BRjh1Hl-IutPTedV8oEn3AUVPNnMKoTLFEyt38scETS29ZYBuAnk89GNjVKAD0Wi62t1kJZOfBmxXr2y_bCtADrpvjAMR15fotdfXTtzNN3Y3xKEFFRYDk0YSZHC_NV2CSAd_R1wswpvBLd_dR2s_BGIQz1Rv2FaWMmy9DmUymWKdD7igosdgsrlU5VS1gVqh5wFMqX_sNdQRE9xCSrydCey4YSBYLaJzgTPn256AlKKUyoJ1Qc24fyZmXOleGxYshukS5m75nGouJb02EBltm7jC49iqWD-NMXhfGZpx23yoeWLU6s9Oan4mDkZiw%3D%3D)
Patriot,When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn’t famous. He wasn’t filling arenas. He wasn’t a household name. A few people told me, _“You’ve gotta meet this guy — he’s doing something big out in Illinois.”_ So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs — surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving.
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fe6dbb94663d4b268140ad116645f40b&_e=qasLesQUrhRgXX2GTIe5GX4q2xSNHqU5VjplwBlpMoAsEtsUpI-VPb5s5efjPjEeOHAdFB55D4xfhDh4Hdl9B0L1fWIsS6umKX5LrjcuCVM_oXrXFyJZdX9fQQWkKgDir2pIrYDLw5RV6V0waNFra1WvQqv4Edp2hxnA8B_KyZMw_v6ehPNHP1Ls-bZfiEzaomfwKfogR8trerit7S4lL9IgzcGhveiBoQHqFeHVpcdj2PrqfmETZge-ZPLHNlUX4Pp3QCCPFQoXnTY_OrznKzCgB_2gEQU_o_RPMydC0xhOe8g0Itpu5MFngc_7tlpXRvKr98nfxmuSpq8JyViVZZxux761HtNdQvzdUMSBWhEfsnA4efalTJSroR4y0sdzFO8zHhPUnooB-ycJV7GAPepedSMm7QVEf5HX1jBnnpbSLctFsGeAp1hI6DfOZ73GN6v4cAdIRO8jSKejP8V4JzdB17D1xPeTYz_O66ZuhHYcRKpms76FGRD78R3zC1LV27VUdkxLl30jYLzdM-8ywUU-yWSNFjYedf3R3XbRMMk5dkHGQ3B-QOGpWf8GNknfxKxHmoAjScZU7Kfqw4js0GgWVBaCx_3oJtByYoGA2BdfqQQ5VSerhjp2kLhl5LAk7g6d7NeIfKZxg2J7wAYO2Cq-L4xB32vmm9Ff7Fk8UJyzbH3j9NczqyvUEb16zI6JNBDaMQ-oLy-9RBbsS29M2Q%3D%3D)
_**Above:** The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began — just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. _
Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... _I knew._ Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn’t have much. But what we had was conviction — and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. **Faith, family, freedom** — and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? _He did it._ He didn’t just build a brand... _He built a machine._ First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation — a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it _from the start._ Charlie and I weren’t just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together.
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fe6dbb94663d4b268140ad116645f40b&_e=qasLesQUrhRgXX2GTIe5GX4q2xSNHqU5VjplwBlpMoAsEtsUpI-VPb5s5efjPjEeOHAdFB55D4xfhDh4Hdl9B0L1fWIsS6umKX5LrjcuCVM_oXrXFyJZdX9fQQWkKgDir2pIrYDLw5RV6V0waNFra1WvQqv4Edp2hxnA8B_KyZMw_v6ehPNHP1Ls-bZfiEzaomfwKfogR8trerit7S4lL9IgzcGhveiBoQHqFeHVpcdj2PrqfmETZge-ZPLHNlUXDgkkYm9EdN5SZU5eGE1a7jHbezQEJVVZwsPL3BXsvnROfMVzAsn2olGplBsCRFuiP9omcl29VKqBYbBkm7nzf19yqevY3V6LS0RMqU_OSHBpjD6xBgCZ7-N560NYsWJxBimD_LNPK3vCLNd9qkqMDlTt36mPSjr_cJ8qcj3hkUwDuneEjAhl93TWY94cahynHEyjl3ipXsIztrPNaXjDj0AruNa3qCZIwxXmMCERb-HxGP8sL8c764reBuPup2Yoto_BqLbsM5Y5mdj2jKuOrV5iKFo3YDOYSm9K-K11hJc7exW26Icc4_xrbbUedqDDvDOH9eOG6ctJ7oHz7d4xOFtINiWUcvwjuIuZbi7C1AHJaNF0lSwUUngp_GdmUFXrcodiSViLlrRahGkc4p_iL2Kse2ClUmJJwGpiP7ArXIK0iz_thaYdKEzxigXTB1JhpAnv3yoUPnWFPC9rF-Nt8Q%3D%3D)
We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us...We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense — in the very states the GOP had given up on. **And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. ** We didn’t just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right — _and it delivered real results._ 10 for 10. **In every single state we operated in... Trump won.** In Arizona _alone,_ we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes — well beyond the margin of victory. _In Wisconsin?_ 60,000+. _In Nevada?_ 6,000+ — and we won back a district we hadn’t carried in 20 years. _In Michigan?_ 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn’t just make noise... _We made history. _
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fe6dbb94663d4b268140ad116645f40b&_e=qasLesQUrhRgXX2GTIe5GX4q2xSNHqU5VjplwBlpMoAsEtsUpI-VPb5s5efjPjEeOHAdFB55D4xfhDh4Hdl9B0L1fWIsS6umKX5LrjcuCVM_oXrXFyJZdX9fQQWkKgDir2pIrYDLw5RV6V0waNFra1WvQqv4Edp2hxnA8B_KyZMw_v6ehPNHP1Ls-bZfiEzaomfwKfogR8trerit7S4lL9IgzcGhveiBoQHqFeHVpcdj2PrqfmETZge-ZPLHNlUXe7annWBbxzaT-h_e1TB7ASlND-cs0_rvebQz1OJnm4pzU3GtRPL6ZhT1E2Xd6B5b92QGhENys3upQ4ARShpdq24u6pxitnBUhH3pvzR5zBVlKdB3a5UO32qiUG8czW8Qhz1wtPKpQ7bH7YeMuoWgI4KcPtaHu7T8CYWI70wSaJzNYTcHUOT4Aba362RbK4P-RHsRpjFtPZrQG1GBGf71EPws-cMLxh2VUWArviDtw_mqeUcgHXSBH2Y-uTlgubfeJmqvX_Pb9rR50YzwG-lBuCr9tl2lhquBYuiS-jmehgIQGdlsROf-_H07RKRa4f2BF5oKPlXZrjdlBxRYLuPmUD72Xn8OLhYpFOFqFvjQh_SsC6-XGemqtjAfE0v5XlUQ9AVX502WUh9RiZ5iPw7O92eSspzgtPTPeH3j3OXLFYMOb_CElcwBq21sbDOwvMIiY0Ir3YQDQeUzc4TVJng7dw%3D%3D)
_**Above:** Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That’s me on the left — still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. _
Patriot, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. _Because Charlie never stopped. _ He didn’t build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they’re losing their kid to the Left... For every student who’s afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? **We have to carry the torch. We have to keep the machine running —**** _and make it stronger than ever._** Everything we’ve felt since the day we lost Charlie — _we must turn it into action._ He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: _“What are we building next?”_ **Well, Patriot, here’s the answer: We’re building the next generation of grassroots power — one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time.**
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fe6dbb94663d4b268140ad116645f40b&_e=qasLesQUrhRgXX2GTIe5GX4q2xSNHqU5VjplwBlpMoAsEtsUpI-VPb5s5efjPjEeOHAdFB55D4xfhDh4Hdl9B0L1fWIsS6umKX5LrjcuCVM_oXrXFyJZdX9fQQWkKgDir2pIrYDLw5RV6V0waNFra1WvQqv4Edp2hxnA8B_KyZMw_v6ehPNHP1Ls-bZfiEzaomfwKfogR8trerit7S4lL9IgzcGhveiBoQHqFeHVpcdj2PrqfmETZge-ZPLHNlUX9DMoYeJwZ4FurnYKUFqytLNTExuV6ZfW7e92U8mup11EAWx1bfMxd_qifLyYKVw0yL1cEdr7z7U8RTW-NYglQc2pfup2XKU497g8YFVExGFqyeem9qnIpPHKbbJ6EifjAyAgONgJYvn9ZfJg-SUmdDiWShRE_6VR2nHV1zkayLPEkgMC-nU9ruXgZWgN798tTKti1ItMlMM-7lMzzYkzDNdNHUW5aJ6YM7MHrGiYFn_Nkx9kqxs4rJYLNjA57bBm8xqCXQbddht8gAQKX2OGUaMoMRxKPApsgy4gZ8I2a6Yo4youDcAShSspI-ViIgtYe-FapylDkOF8tOwSeA2JkVDVzJuOKGNbTjkX7a1CGniLAs4DDlNHV2yc9M0fOVYL71q3BtFFFGCi6DFQHFBUTVhsZgpc7KsMmOCruW7AYq3h-LZOBqCj6L6dn7AFF0yIAq5_NM6nwh2dfmvMunLbjw%3D%3D)
**But it doesn’t happen without you.** _So, here’s my ask..._ Go to church for Charlie. Start a family for Charlie.Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie. Register to vote for Charlie.Chase votes for Charlie.Run for office for Charlie. Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started. That’s what Charlie would’ve wanted.I’m not stopping until we save our country. I’m all in — and if you’re reading this, I’m betting that you are, too. If so, I’m honored to fight alongside you. And if you’ve already been with us for a while — thank you. Now, let’s get to work.
**For Charlie.** **God Bless,** **Tyler Bowyer**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point Action
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fe6dbb94663d4b268140ad116645f40b&_e=qasLesQUrhRgXX2GTIe5GX4q2xSNHqU5VjplwBlpMoAsEtsUpI-VPb5s5efjPjEeOHAdFB55D4xfhDh4Hdl9B0L1fWIsS6umKX5LrjcuCVM_oXrXFyJZdX9fQQWkKgDir2pIrYDLw5RV6V0waNFra1WvQqv4Edp2hxnA8B_KyZMw_v6ehPNHP1Ls-bZfiEzaomfwKfogR8trerit7S4lL9IgzcGhveiBoQHqFeHVpcdj2PrqfmETZge-ZPLHNlUXNTIa7OdEm1pr9ONJSvBUHNXW2xDYWyR7Dyokv-BcjhwtCh7GhGozHA4WLeGlUECzTlhXzaJ2M6a04nFGIA4aP7gs4uiasozWwtMmikcq_GrKFH3KpL0xaZ66LY2D93JgZguEfoAy-fRqwbZnvUJs6rYeemzu-mJs-RiCEoPXhegDNO6KqZp4SfDKhZ757CpmK2rOGuNa3d85RGQCzLv-5v336P40DjMdSIrKLG18RDSPTDSWG4EdcVmCBFortIj3gmgfkZRHeimB4Q3Buc2j7teGwI49aAUogvf5KstU6usKFUwQtRDz5aub9rc9NV_ouHPjzDN5LDdjgz9Mz0RJvB1_L0jiO17uLBPiOe7z8ma9MO-KbRrLs6O8MLzfzslxuDKlkceBQojhEN3CjJzRUdtkBPp7fJbv70c3aa6_jTu9Jm7uLD8oEDiTyq5GFDMVvTq0406dOOLx6fuTZ0NvpA%3D%3D)
[**Support Turning Point Action**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fe6dbb94663d4b268140ad116645f40b&_e=qasLesQUrhRgXX2GTIe5GX4q2xSNHqU5VjplwBlpMoAsEtsUpI-VPb5s5efjPjEeOHAdFB55D4xfhDh4Hdl9B0L1fWIsS6umKX5LrjcuCVM_oXrXFyJZdX9fQQWkKgDir2pIrYDLw5RV6V0waNFra1WvQqv4Edp2hxnA8B_KyZMw_v6ehPNHP1Ls-bZfiEzaomfwKfogR8trerit7S4lL9IgzcGhveiBoQHqFeHVpcdj2PrqfmETZge-ZPLHNlUX24Y6P_HjOZWJmcWFjOdGFGgmBk4m5I_kvrNCt7V3tciS3BUJ7lsIbedIiQ9IY9owT7nz7g9qzV2EaPH8rV1swKk8F-hUDoSCVyCv8SCOi43-Gvgz40_9t1ukuH4kPp3-AjgHPNbLdlJ4PHy0M7b77bIR1aCgIZZVzJ0eEdHQ9avhS6JNXD8w079UEUUHVJCtuMBCsHZYQCBA-fjpVt69TNyhCNhMfH5jGgf3BMD-9a3y2p6snwMm2YNxfztRRVnla0znaTrB3ufIgVtktHxZ8aWkmzTh8C-n00-hbkoc50_N53MSPhnyIjUhXtGhTPyDiCF27WgsyBOPhRvSwDVyMa_GeTKuQ-FNHU7DY359tKSMbtHJHYr6wjvJHDCZrJ0M9jArle-y8b_8Q3oCS8RjIDLBL2utAULRcq4IxlKK1mI2Y19nhXPDUf98ME9lyrJeG3ilPzpHgy4uR2AHHmE7Vw%3D%3D) **P.S.** I would give anything to have Charlie back. But he left us with something powerful — a machine that works... a machine that’s proven and battle-tested. Now it’s time to run it — _and run it like never before._ Bigger. Bolder. More battlegrounds. More victories. **Because right now, thanks to a generous supporter of Turning Point Action, your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar — up to $500,000, through October 31.** That means, with your gift today: ✅ 2X the activists trained
✅ 2X the voters registered
✅ 2X the pressure on weak-kneed politicians
✅ 2X the ballot-chasing operations
✅ 2X the grassroots strength the Left can’t stop We don’t need to reinvent anything. Charlie already drew the blueprint and turned the key. So, if you’ve been wondering how to help... And many more for years to come. Make your gift to Turning Point Action today and immediately double your impact.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=fe6dbb94663d4b268140ad116645f40b&_e=qasLesQUrhRgXX2GTIe5GX4q2xSNHqU5VjplwBlpMoAsEtsUpI-VPb5s5efjPjEeOHAdFB55D4xfhDh4Hdl9B0L1fWIsS6umKX5LrjcuCVM_oXrXFyJZdX9fQQWkKgDir2pIrYDLw5RV6V0waNFra1WvQqv4Edp2hxnA8B_KyZMw_v6ehPNHP1Ls-bZfiEzaomfwKfogR8trerit7S4lL9IgzcGhveiBoQHqFeHVpcdj2PrqfmETZge-ZPLHNlUX5qyx6ekR-ybqg95UtRc-JUjrk_00waHdO_n56Fqjd5rG8PfOh0AgYH2tjYlTwHVuTQDvknEH9E5p3mpGmyW9ON4jL8dKq3r7v2xOi7BkEBkj_VdApTozWrcBH2A5y3fzp_J1f1jb3dBbvFMlhncpY9nRpLrTYCA2F3IbZ7Zcy0ciROLqAyzYm1jhAY2OKwseFPGFCDZ-_WkhaaqfNoSGmUp_PLaI9dZVT31gXfP9ljgPomyUPnPp_evz3Sl9jW276bKMHQej0YYdfNKfPWTACQfsEnsehnxvGq2HsKqecAztl9TJgPYCzCE8AMhERXxhYQbXC7tn_XBf2xrdgAfJ2tI1naSQv1vyTIvYFcZMbGy7dOYiok1H_Z4ATRbPl-AwkScppBjDw9-G_XZm6RfLbacjk_v2i3VMEHFjRZ10Sr1Xx052BLINAn01miPHGdldHX14vtdI509K9EIapxvtXQ%3D%3D)**

clean_body: A tribute to Charlie & Turning Point Action—see how to help and double your impact today. | Patriot,When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn’t famous. He wasn’t filling arenas. He wasn’t a household name. A few people told me, “You’ve gotta meet this guy — he’s doing something big out in Illinois.” So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs — surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving. Above: The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began — just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... I knew. Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn’t have much. But what we had was conviction — and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. Faith, family, freedom — and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? He did it. He didn’t just build a brand... He built a machine. First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation — a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it from the start. Charlie and I weren’t just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together. We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us...We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense — in the very states the GOP had given up on. And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. We didn’t just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right — and it delivered real results. 10 for 10. In every single state we operated in... Trump won. In Arizona alone, we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes — well beyond the margin of victory. In Wisconsin? 60,000+. In Nevada? 6,000+ — and we won back a district we hadn’t carried in 20 years. In Michigan? 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn’t just make noise... We made history. Above: Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That’s me on the left — still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. Patriot, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. Because Charlie never stopped. He didn’t build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they’re losing their kid to the Left... For every student who’s afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? We have to carry the torch. We have to keep the machine running — and make it stronger than ever. Everything we’ve felt since the day we lost Charlie — we must turn it into action. He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: “What are we building next?” Well, Patriot, here’s the answer: We’re building the next generation of grassroots power — one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time. But it doesn’t happen without you. So, here’s my ask... Go to church for Charlie. Start a family for Charlie.Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie. Register to vote for Charlie.Chase votes for Charlie.Run for office for Charlie. Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started. That’s what Charlie would’ve wanted.I’m not stopping until we save our country. I’m all in — and if you’re reading this, I’m betting that you are, too. If so, I’m honored to fight alongside you. And if you’ve already been with us for a while — thank you. Now, let’s get to work. For Charlie. God Bless, Tyler Bowyer Chief Operating Officer Turning Point Action P.S. I would give anything to have Charlie back. But he left us with something powerful — a machine that works... a machine that’s proven and battle-tested. Now it’s time to run it — and run it like never before. Bigger. Bolder. More battlegrounds. More victories. Because right now, thanks to a generous supporter of Turning Point Action, your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar — up to $500,000, through October 31. That means, with your gift today: ✅ 2X the activists trained ✅ 2X the voters registered ✅ 2X the pressure on weak-kneed politicians ✅ 2X the ballot-chasing operations ✅ 2X the grassroots strength the Left can’t stop We don’t need to reinvent anything. Charlie already drew the blueprint and turned the key. So, if you’ve been wondering how to help... If you’ve been asking “what now?” Then, Patriot, this is your moment to step in, fuel the fight, and take Charlie’s vision to the next level. Let’s turn this energy — this momentum — into action. PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION.COM) AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE 4930 East Beverly RoadPhoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Why I’m proud to support Deb Haaland for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I’m reaching out today with an important message.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4963%2E400544%2Eqnjal9)
It's Jane Fonda! You may know me as an actor or as a bit of a troublemaker in Washington for, well, decades. And I'm proud to still be at it.
There’s a lot of noise in politics these days, but when you find someone like Deb Haaland, you pay attention.
**Deb and I have been in the climate fight together for some time now, and I can say with my whole heart she’s exactly the kind of leader I had in mind when I launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC: someone who listens to their community, stands up to powerful polluters, and never hesitates to put people over profits.**
And in New Mexico, the stakes couldn’t be higher: extreme heat, scarce and contaminated water, the Rio Grande — the lifeblood of the state — drying up before our eyes. Deb’s on the frontlines of this fight. That’s why I’m throwing my hat in to support her, and I need you with me.
**[You can bet the pundits and corporate polluters will be watching to see if Deb has the grassroots strength to become the next governor of New Mexico. I know she does. But she needs each and every one of us. Will you make a donation today to directly support Deb’s campaign for Governor?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251011_2_fonda.5k8XvO&amount=5&refcode=em20251011-4963&t=2&akid=4963%2E400544%2Eqnjal9)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251011_2_fonda.5k8XvO&amount=5&refcode=em20251011-4963&t=21&akid=4963%2E400544%2Eqnjal9)**
I’ve always admired Deb. She’s a 35th-generation New Mexican who has traveled to every corner of her state — not out of obligation, but out of love for the people who call New Mexico home.
As Secretary of the Interior, she fought to protect our public lands and water. She created the Climate Task Force and launched the American Climate Corps to prepare young people for good-paying clean energy jobs and climate careers.
_Some of you may even remember that I personally urged President Biden to nominate her as Interior Secretary because she’s just that good._
As a member of Congress, she fought alongside local governments and Tribal partners to defend public lands, protect access to water, and preserve our wildlife.
And as Governor, she’s determined to expand renewable energy and put New Mexico on the path to zero emissions by 2050.
Deb is a leader of integrity, vision, and true public service. She’s who we need protecting New Mexico’s lands, waters, and air from Donald Trump, polluters, and profiteers.
**But no one — not me, not even someone as fearless as Deb — can do this work alone. It will take all of us chipping in what we can, when we can to elect a true champion for climate and working people as the next Governor of New Mexico.**
**[I’m asking again because this race truly matters for the future of our country: Will you join me in supporting Deb by making your first donation to her campaign today?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251011_2_fonda.5k8XvO&amount=5&refcode=em20251011-4963&t=22&akid=4963%2E400544%2Eqnjal9)**
Your donation, along with contributions like it from people all over the country, is how we will defend this critical seat and chip away at Trump’s dangerous agenda once and for all.
Thank you for being a part of this movement.
With gratitude,
Jane Fonda
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251011-2&t=23&refcode2=4963_400544_qnjal9&akid=4963%2E400544%2Eqnjal9)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=24&akid=4963%2E400544%2Eqnjal9)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=25&akid=4963%2E400544%2Eqnjal9)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Justin Kwasa, LCV
subject: Join Us for No Kings 2 and tell the Election Assistance Commission to Keep Our Elections Free and Fair
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMwNTI1MDgS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjMyMDE0NjA1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter, While the government may have shut down, our determination to advocate for our
democracy has not. Here are two actions you can take THIS WEEK to actively
resist Trump and his authoritarian agenda. Right now, you can: Submit a quick public comment to the Election Assistance Commission to advocate against a rule change that would restrict millions of Americans from accessing votingSign up to be part of an event that has the potential to be the largest mass mobilization in American history. On July 16, 2025, the Election Assistance Commission (EAC) — the federal agency
that helps election officials improve the administration of elections — received
a petition from a far-right organization asking the Commission to unnecessarily require proof of citizenship to register to vote. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Pwb7C7PKjNf0/all2OW9oY1lFWXRJRnVtaUxQTUxHc2FySmt4MlZWYldva3JmbE5adURKUnlzdFZ5UStabmN5QjUyaDVjdmpOTERkM2IwSHdsbUxDOFBIU21tWTNTc2FKRHROT3UxSjhiTkwwZThocDZSZ1k9S0/ This request could block more than 21 million eligible voters from registering https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6sXNKkpSm/all2OW9oY1lFWXRJRnVtaUxQTUxHc2FySmt4MlZWYldva3JmbE5adURKUnlzdFZ5UStabmN5QjUyaDVjdmpOTERkM2IwSHdsbUxDOFBIU21tWTNTc2FKRHROT3UxSjhiTkwwZThocDZSZ1k9S0/ and make it harder to register for millions more. So far, over 200,000 comments have been submitted to the EAC about this
dangerous proposal, with too many being in support. We need to counteract this with as many pro-voter comments as possible by the
October 20 deadline. It only takes two minutes. Go to this website https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/7RYwsXL-DkSg/all2OW9oY1lFWXRJRnVtaUxQTUxHc2FySmt4MlZWYldva3JmbE5adURKUnlzdFZ5UStabmN5QjUyaDVjdmpOTERkM2IwSHdsbUxDOFBIU21tWTNTc2FKRHROT3UxSjhiTkwwZThocDZSZ1k9S0/ and use this customizable template https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/mkyVHmVkAWs7/all2OW9oY1lFWXRJRnVtaUxQTUxHc2FySmt4MlZWYldva3JmbE5adURKUnlzdFZ5UStabmN5QjUyaDVjdmpOTERkM2IwSHdsbUxDOFBIU21tWTNTc2FKRHROT3UxSjhiTkwwZThocDZSZ1k9S0/ to make your voice heard today. Tell the EAC to keep our elections free and fair https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_4bqMEv6K~fY/all2OW9oY1lFWXRJRnVtaUxQTUxHc2FySmt4MlZWYldva3JmbE5adURKUnlzdFZ5UStabmN5QjUyaDVjdmpOTERkM2IwSHdsbUxDOFBIU21tWTNTc2FKRHROT3UxSjhiTkwwZThocDZSZ1k9S0/ Then, after you submit your comment to the EAC, make plans for your weekend by
joining millions of others for No Kings October. On Saturday, October 18 join
this peaceful movement of millions of Americans from all walks of life rising up
to make it clear: We don’t do dictators or kings in America. We never will. Sign up for a No Kings October event near you https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZMNezr6SP/all2OW9oY1lFWXRJRnVtaUxQTUxHc2FySmt4MlZWYldva3JmbE5adURKUnlzdFZ5UStabmN5QjUyaDVjdmpOTERkM2IwSHdsbUxDOFBIU21tWTNTc2FKRHROT3UxSjhiTkwwZThocDZSZ1k9S0/ To get involved, go to the No Kings website to find an event in your area.
You’ll also find other helpful resources like virtual safety trainings https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/2zZrMNwgxLSY/all2OW9oY1lFWXRJRnVtaUxQTUxHc2FySmt4MlZWYldva3JmbE5adURKUnlzdFZ5UStabmN5QjUyaDVjdmpOTERkM2IwSHdsbUxDOFBIU21tWTNTc2FKRHROT3UxSjhiTkwwZThocDZSZ1k9S0/ and messaging toolkits to inform others in your community on social media. We
can’t hold Trump accountable if we’re not united. Thank you for supporting us on
October 18 and beyond, because this isn’t a moment, it’s a movement! In solidarity, Justin Kwasa
Director, Democracy Program
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: To view this mail in a browser, copy into your browser. Peter, While the government may have shut down, our determination to advocate for our democracy has not. Here are two actions you can take THIS WEEK to actively resist Trump and his authoritarian agenda. Right now, you can: Submit a quick public comment to the Election Assistance Commission to advocate against a rule change that would restrict millions of Americans from accessing votingSign up to be part of an event that has the potential to be the largest mass mobilization in American history. On July 16, 2025, the Election Assistance Commission (EAC) — the federal agency that helps election officials improve the administration of elections — received a petition from a far-right organization asking the Commission to unnecessarily require proof of citizenship to register to vote. This request could block more than 21 million eligible voters from registering and make it harder to register for millions more. So far, over 200,000 comments have been submitted to the EAC about this dangerous proposal, with too many being in support. We need to counteract this with as many pro-voter comments as possible by the October 20 deadline. It only takes two minutes. Go to this website and use this customizable template to make your voice heard today. Tell the EAC to keep our elections free and fair Then, after you submit your comment to the EAC, make plans for your weekend by joining millions of others for No Kings October. On Saturday, October 18 join this peaceful movement of millions of Americans from all walks of life rising up to make it clear: We don’t do dictators or kings in America. We never will. Sign up for a No Kings October event near you To get involved, go to the No Kings website to find an event in your area. You’ll also find other helpful resources like virtual safety trainings and messaging toolkits to inform others in your community on social media. We can’t hold Trump accountable if we’re not united. Thank you for supporting us on October 18 and beyond, because this isn’t a moment, it’s a movement! In solidarity, Justin Kwasa Director, Democracy Program League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Haley Stevens
subject: Here's what's at stake:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Are you on my team?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1042%2E49239%2Eukz3mb)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6608?t=2&akid=1042%2E49239%2Eukz3mb)
---
null, it's Haley.
I know that there's a lot of fear and uncertainty in our country right now – which is why I'm running for Senate. **But I need you to know exactly what's at stake in my battleground Senate race, and _[why I'm about to ask you to chip in $5 today.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6609?t=3&akid=1042%2E49239%2Eukz3mb)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6610?t=4&akid=1042%2E49239%2Eukz3mb)
---
Democrats need to gain four seats in the 2026 midterm elections to win a Senate majority – and our seat right here in Michigan is crucial. If we win, we’ll be able to put a critical check on Trump and his chaos agenda.
That means real leverage to fight back against Trump’s misguided policies – cuts to cancer research, SNAP, and health care – and to rein in the shoot-from-the-hip tariffs that have given massive companies the green light to jack up prices on the goods and services we rely on every day.
**I'm running for Senate to fight for working Michiganders and protect them from even more of this harmful chaos.**
But to do that, my team needs the resources to compete with MAGA Mike Rogers, Trump's _handpicked_ candidate. This is shaping up to be the most expensive race in Michigan’s history. Republicans are expected to spend at least **$80 million** against me trying to buy Michigan’s Senate seat, and a GOP super PAC has already raised $5 million to back Rogers.
**That means I’m going to need the strongest possible grassroots campaign to win.[Will you chip in $5 or $25 right now to join me in this fight?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6610?t=5&akid=1042%2E49239%2Eukz3mb)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6609?t=6&akid=1042%2E49239%2Eukz3mb)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6616?t=7&akid=1042%2E49239%2Eukz3mb)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6612?t=8&akid=1042%2E49239%2Eukz3mb)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6610?t=9&akid=1042%2E49239%2Eukz3mb)
---
Thanks for being on my team,
Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6613?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=1042%2E49239%2Eukz3mb) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/6608?t=11&akid=1042%2E49239%2Eukz3mb)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251011_2_ossoff.0-VKJ9&refcode=em20251011-2&t=1&akid=2837%2E582294%2ExEVm3l)
Good afternoon,
[**If you can afford it, we’re humbly asking you to split a $5 contribution between Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign and Chris Pappas.**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251011_2_ossoff.0-VKJ9&refcode=em20251011-2&t=2&akid=2837%2E582294%2ExEVm3l)
Sorry to be so direct, but Jon is the ONLY Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state Trump won. **He is without a doubt MAGA’s number one target.**
The latest polls show this race statistically tied. And experts at the Cook Political Report have officially named this race a “Toss-Up.”
National Republicans see this race as their best opportunity to stop Democrats from retaking control of the Senate, and they’ve already spent millions of dollars on ads attacking Jon.
So we’re asking for your help to ensure we have the resources to respond to the onslaught of right-wing money flooding into Georgia and set the record straight.
**Because the truth is we either respond now or risk losing Georgia to a full-blown MAGA takeover.**
[**Please, split a donation of $5 between Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign and Chris Pappas today. We wouldn’t ask if it was not so important.**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251011_2_ossoff.0-VKJ9&refcode=em20251011-2&t=3&akid=2837%2E582294%2ExEVm3l)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251011_2_ossoff.0-VKJ9&amount=5&refcode=em20251011-2&t=22&akid=2837%2E582294%2ExEVm3l)**
This team has won in Georgia before. We know what it takes. And together, we will do it again.
Thanks so much for chipping in.
We promise, if we all do our part, it will pay off on Election Day.
Gratefully,
Team Ossoff
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251011-2&t=23&refcode2=2837_582294_xEVm3l&akid=2837%2E582294%2ExEVm3l)**

name: Troy Downing
subject: It hasn’t panned out like I hoped.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I need help TONIGHT

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)I'm staring defeat in the face.
As a combat veteran, Christian, husband, and father, I thought I could count on fellow Patriots like you to stand with me against the radical Left. But it hasn’t panned out like I hoped.
**I'm Troy Downing, a freshman GOP Congressman fighting to put America First.**
Our House Majority hangs by a thread – just a few seats separate us from the Democrats' socialist agenda.
I'm facing a brutal truth: the October mid-month deadline is looming, and my campaign could be over if we fail to meet our goal. Democrats are waiting to pounce with their massive cash advantage.
_We can't let them see weakness now._
I'm not asking for a bailout or a massive donation. **[I just need a small contribution from patriots like you to keep my campaign alive:](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**[ SEND A CARE PACKAGE NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Without your help, I'll be forced to surrender this critical House seat to the radical Left. But if you chip in right now, you’ll help deliver a victory over the Democrats' agenda.
We’re not just aiming to win an election– We’re in this for our country's future.
[So please, will you make a small contribution to help a combat veteran take down the Democrat machine?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
Your support is my last line of defense.
God Bless You and God Bless America,
Troy Downing | |

body:

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117110273/575381845/823540626?refcode=ea.2a148541-f1a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.2a148541-f1a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTE0ODU0MS1mMWE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Mg9BFJCSFY-thNTOrY1kHhIhm0LkMzVldlbYwVfj6k=&emci=f6d57c8a-f8a5-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2a148541-f1a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17205535)
North Carolina is one of the last true swing states on the map, Peter. I should know. I won both my elections for Governor in years that Donald Trump carried the state. It wasn’t easy, but with a groundswell of grassroots enthusiasm, we prevailed. We’ve begun building out a team that can win here again — this time for a seat in the United States Senate. We have a plan that we know can provide Democrats with success here in NC. And it’s only been possible through your support. **[I have to ask for that support again today, Peter, because we’re preparing for this to become the most expensive U.S. Senate race in history. With your help, we’ll engage with voters from every corner of this state and prove that our vision for the future is right for North Carolina. Please give what you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117110274/575381846/-1743631236?refcode=ea.2a148541-f1a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.2a148541-f1a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTE0ODU0MS1mMWE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Mg9BFJCSFY-thNTOrY1kHhIhm0LkMzVldlbYwVfj6k=)** Statewide elections here are competitive and expensive. Republicans are already planning to spend hundreds of millions against us because they know this seat is the key to the Senate majority. But as we begin sharing our message with North Carolinians — a message rooted in respect for the values we share and the fundamental rights we’ve spent so long fighting for — I am confident that we’ll be able to bring voters onto our team. We can succeed here in North Carolina if we work together. **[If I can count on you to stand with me in the fight, please pitch in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117110275/575381847/-1743631236?refcode=ea.2a148541-f1a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.2a148541-f1a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTE0ODU0MS1mMWE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Mg9BFJCSFY-thNTOrY1kHhIhm0LkMzVldlbYwVfj6k=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117110276/575381848/-1743631236?refcode=ea.2a148541-f1a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.2a148541-f1a6-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTE0ODU0MS1mMWE2LWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Mg9BFJCSFY-thNTOrY1kHhIhm0LkMzVldlbYwVfj6k=)**

clean_body: Let’s do this again. | North Carolina is one of the last true swing states on the map, Peter. I should know. I won both my elections for Governor in years that Donald Trump carried the state. It wasn’t easy, but with a groundswell of grassroots enthusiasm, we prevailed. We’ve begun building out a team that can win here again — this time for a seat in the United States Senate. We have a plan that we know can provide Democrats with success here in NC. And it’s only been possible through your support. = Statewide elections here are competitive and expensive. Republicans are already planning to spend hundreds of millions against us because they know this seat is the key to the Senate majority. But as we begin sharing our message with North Carolinians — a message rooted in respect for the values we share and the fundamental rights we’ve spent so long fighting for — I am confident that we’ll be able to bring voters onto our team. We can succeed here in North Carolina if we work together. = | = Thanks so much, Roy Cooper = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. ### **🔥 Indigenous People's Weekend Celebration--25% Off!🔥**
[Give Me 25% Off!](https://substack.com/redirect/67664783-bb08-4610-bf2d-6ed831417a7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Oh, you're so condescending. Your gall is never ending. We don't want nothing, not a thing from you. Your life is trite and jaded. Boring and confiscated. If that's your best, your best won't do...
We're right. We're free. We'll fight. You'll see.
We're not gonna take it. No, we ain't gonna take it. We're not gonna take it anymore."
**\- Dee Snider, "We're Not Gonna Take It" [acoustic version]**
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae234ad2-56ed-44f9-9e3c-e965b77b8242?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I often like to quote songs that reflect my mood when I'm scribing along, but that also tell the story of those about whom I wish to opine.
And oh did this one perfectly enscapsulate MAGA. But specifically, the pretentious and poisonous Pam Bondi and her [appearance in front of the Senate Judiciary Committee ](https://substack.com/redirect/9dd70d53-a9c2-470f-8034-f788aa0a2849?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)this past week.
Back to that in a second, but does anyone think Dee Snider didn't make his feelings beyond clear when Trump and other mortifying Morlocks of MAGA began using his song as an anthem at their Reichsparteitag (Nuremburg Rallies)?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/78bc5ef7-e42f-4a53-9c49-97722d8f5c3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Thank you for your service, Dee.
As you can see, not a lot left to nuance. Yet, somehow the few free-floating brain cells possessed by your basic MAGA a-putz pre-daters, each isolated in mom's basement but totally happy with the snacks, lack the plenary authority to deduce.
And speaking of MAGA-mind, can you find any better description of Pamela Jo Bondi, Attorney General to the criminal underworld inhabiting 1600 PA Avenue than the lyrical stylings of "We're Not Gonna Take It?"
Sometimes it almost seems like bowling-ball-bellied, cranial contusion, Narcissus, Donald J., loves himself so much he found a way to create a clone in female form named Pam.
That way he also always has someone to lust after when Ivanka's out of town.
If you watched Pam Bondi's anger mismanagement performance under oath this past week--you might call it "condescending," and one where her "gall was never ending."
If you then take just a cursory glance at her life, so "trite and jaded," it's very easy to see how she fits into Trumpworld.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/78bc5ef7-e42f-4a53-9c49-97722d8f5c3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
No sign of ethical compass, conscience, intelligence, critical thinking or self awareness. She's willing to toss out absurdities without shame, and wears the thinnest skin this side of Trump--and that only gets worse each midnight when she molts.
In fact, as far as I can tell, denied, lied and chose to hide was her plan for any [legitimate questions one would expect the top law enforcement officer in the land](https://substack.com/redirect/09036268-7d75-47bd-961d-005022c12268?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to answer. Especially as, in theory, she represents the American people.
Welp. All we got with Bondi was an ethics-free-zone with the moral clarity of Christopher Columbus (Happy Indigenous People's Day!).
Or your average microscopic slide of mutated hantavirus.
She is the banality of evil. Or what you'd call "boring and confiscated."
[GIve Me 25% Off!](https://substack.com/redirect/67664783-bb08-4610-bf2d-6ed831417a7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The fun began when Democrats--who have now been joined by elected members of Trump's party--started asking questions about Trump's [White House crime and American sabotage syndicate](https://substack.com/redirect/34c0b3e0-ea0e-4b9c-8f26-cf24431802fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), including his friendship with late pedophile and sex trafficker Jeffrey Epstein.
Bondi is so sad she actually brought a folder of pre-written personal attack lines for the Senators questioning her. Because you wouldn't want to be forced to solely rely on that Big Brain of yours.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9dd70d53-a9c2-470f-8034-f788aa0a2849?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As TNR put it:
> Bondi had collected screenshots of social media posts, prewritten comebacks, and handwritten notes she hoped could give her a good "gotcha" moment.
Ya know, stuff like "you are a total hypocrite," _a complicated phrase you wouldn 't want to take a chance you'd forget, so of course you'd write it down_.
I mean, holy s*t, what next, reciting _A Tale of Two Cities_?
Senator Sheldon Whitehouse--one of the Democrats who tends to take no guff--asked Bondi about tax returns of human thumb, Tom Homan. [The thug who runs ICE and is on video accepting a $50,000 bribe](https://substack.com/redirect/9dd70d53-a9c2-470f-8034-f788aa0a2849?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but of course went scot free unlike the brown people he leads attacks against daily
Bondi's rage-filled response was:
> Senator, I would be more concerned if I were you when you talk about corruption and money, when you pushed for legislation that subsidized your wife's company!
Ooh. Sick burn.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/67664783-bb08-4610-bf2d-6ed831417a7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Whitehouse then asked her [if the FBI had gotten ahold of photographs of "Trump with half-naked young women." And whether she had "seen any such thing."](https://substack.com/redirect/78bc5ef7-e42f-4a53-9c49-97722d8f5c3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Pretty specific, pretty easy to deny if not true, no?
But Bondi was on a predator-protecting mission, there would be no answering this question. But there would be a lot more anger:
> You know, Senator Whitehouse, you sit here and make salacious remarks, once again trying to slander President Trump left and right, when you're the one who was taking money from one of Epstein's closest confidants, Reid Hoffman.
Why so angry bro-ette?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/67664783-bb08-4610-bf2d-6ed831417a7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.vffcJ8DjOJYmZZQgKL65ZqNSrw9W42biY87G60YXxTs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175798887)
As you might expect, after this little outburst Bondi shut down, like Stephen Miller's brain during a CNN interview. Because she clearly had no defense.
The rest of the hearing went along similarly, with Senators asking Bondi questions, and Bondi snarling like a hyena, or a hungry Ted Cruz. She called Senators names and insinuated corruption from trash she seemingly picked up from Glenn Greenwald's Twitter feed on the way there.
Sen. Adam Schiff went down a list of questions Bondi refused to answer. From Buzzfeed:
> At one point, Sen. Adam Schiff (D-CA)**** ran down a laundry list of questions Bondi wouldn't answer Tuesday, like what role she had in flagging any reference to Trump's name in the Epstein Files, whether she approved of the mass firing of anyone who criminally investigated Trump at the DOJ or if she supported the creation of a compensation fund for Jan. 6 rioters.
Maybe they should have asked her favorite color?
Perhaps her best answer was when Sen. Blumenthal (D-CT) asked about _her_ possible conflicts of interest with [Trump accepting a $400 million plane](https://substack.com/redirect/34c0b3e0-ea0e-4b9c-8f26-cf24431802fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--also known as a bribe, and a violation of the Constitution's Emoluments Clause.
Look, data points aren't that hard to track.
The first time Trump really stood up to Netanyahu was when Israel launched an attack inside Qatar. _Right now_ we're letting Qatar, a dictatorial monarchy that housed Hamas terrorist leaders, build a training base _on our soil_ , in Idaho (also a dictatorial monarchy, I believe).
So why did Sen. Blumenthal ask Bondi about _her_ potential conflicts of interest? **Guess who was Qatar 's lobbyist in the U.S. in between stints as Florida AG and her appointment by Trump?**
Betcha can't guess!
Why, none other than Pam Bondi!
Perhaps Blumenthal hit a bit too close to home. Bondi proceeded to blow a gasket, howl at the moon, chew on the left femur of her weakest lawyer, sharpen her spikes, give up on the day's wordle, smash her guitar on the table and demand a Snicker's Bar.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/67664783-bb08-4610-bf2d-6ed831417a7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
> How dare you? I am a career prosecutor! Don't you ever. Challenge. My. Integrity!
So, Pam-Pam, you don't want the Senator questioning your integrity, huh? Ok, I'll do it!
* As we discussed, Bondi was cool lobbying for a foreign, autocratic regime and registering as a **foreign agent** --even though she'd been AG of the third largest state in the country. _**On Bondi 's first day as U.S Attorney General, she closed the FBI's "Foreign Influence Task Force." Then (presumably on her second day) cut enforcement of the Foreign Agents Registration Act, that thing she had to register for! **_
Totally non-incriminating! Wait, you want non-Qatari corruption? Oh we got that too, with Mz "Don't Challenge My Integrity!!"
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.vffcJ8DjOJYmZZQgKL65ZqNSrw9W42biY87G60YXxTs?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=175798887)
* In 2013 Bondi convinced Governor Rick Scott to delay a scheduled execution. Not because she was opposed to it. _But it conflicted with a fundraising event_ for her (we getting Trump vibes yet?).
* Pammy hosted two Fox programs while sitting Florida AG in 2018. She said the Florida Commission on Ethics approved it. They responded with "what the f*k you talkin' about?" The _Tampa Bay Times_ called it "unprecedented" for a sitting elected official to host a TV show (Trumb vibes! TV attention + lies!)
* Bondi received 20+ fraud complaints as Florida AG about "Trump University" in 2013 and said she would join a New York lawsuit vs Trump U. (a suit that led him to eventually settle for $25 million).
Four days later, the Donald J. Trump Foundation made a $25,000 donation to her PAC. She magically decided to back out of the suit. Well that doesn't look bribe-y. **And** Trump donated to her PAC from his tax free foundation--that's illegal.
* I could go on with pre-Trump chicanery, but there's more than enough post-Trump. Bondi claimed a judge's "oral directive is not enforceable" to halt a flight of immigrants to El Salvador, and ignored it. (It's why you never see judges talk. If they don't write it down it didn't happen). Then she said the judge was "meddling in our government." She may wanna brush up on _Marbury vs. Madison_.
* [She backs Trump's illegal use of troops on domestic soil, per our courts and the law called posse comitatus](https://substack.com/redirect/09036268-7d75-47bd-961d-005022c12268?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (in Trump's defense, he saw the name, thought it was something else and tried to call Epstein before remembering he was dead).

There was a time when Bondi' resume of dingle-headed douchery, her "late great Hannibal Lecter" sensibilities and behaving like angrier-Ted-Nugent would've disqualified someone from being within 100 yards of the President or her job.
Then there's the rogue's gallery of tv-movie villains with Roscoe P Coltrane intellects that are Team Trump. To say you're one of the worst is _a_ _statement_ when one looks at Miller, Noem, Patel, Leavitt, Hegseth.
That's a murderer's row, and no I don't mean the 1927 Yankees.
Bondi's utter contempt for the law, ethics, other humans, children, at least seven of the 10 commandments...[it all showed its ugliness on live tv, in front of the Senate](https://substack.com/redirect/271bd925-3a6f-4790-b376-534e1098d62d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Americans got a view of who she truly is. And that's a good thing. A very good thing.
The rage filled loon garnered headlines like this:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/34c0b3e0-ea0e-4b9c-8f26-cf24431802fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I honestly don't know how Trump's first choice, Matt Gaetz, could've done a worse job. Which says a lot.
I'm feeling very optimistic for the first time in a long while we're gonna get through this period and hold the lot of these rancid rotters accountable.
Take stock in Trump's plummeting numbers--even among his voters--fight, prepare for the coming Epstein files (_we have a special series coming up at Blue Amp Media_), fight more and enjoy (+ instigate) as former Trumpers turn on him. They too they sense his weakness.
And Bondi's behavior in front of the world only made things worse.
Let's fight for our FDR moment. Let's show up on No Kings Day. Let's take our country back.
### **🔥 Indigenous People's Weekend Celebration--25% Off!🔥**

clean_body: Watch now (48 secs) | If Donald Trump invented a female version of himself--it would turn out exactly like Pam Bondi | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? | | If Donald Trump invented a female version of himself--it would turn out exactly like Pam Bondi | | | Oct 11 | | | | | | | | | | | | 🔥 Indigenous People's Weekend Celebration--25% Off!🔥 "Oh, you're so condescending. Your gall is never ending. We don't want nothing, not a thing from you. Your life is trite and jaded. Boring and confiscated. If that's your best, your best won't do... We're right. We're free. We'll fight. You'll see. We're not gonna take it. No, we ain't gonna take it. We're not gonna take it anymore." \- Dee Snider, "We're Not Gonna Take It" [acoustic version] | | ---|---|--- I often like to quote songs that reflect my mood when I'm scribing along, but that also tell the story of those about whom I wish to opine. And oh did this one perfectly enscapsulate MAGA. But specifically, the pretentious and poisonous Pam Bondi and her past week. Back to that in a second, but does anyone think Dee Snider didn't make his feelings beyond clear when Trump and other mortifying Morlocks of MAGA began using his song as an anthem at their Reichsparteitag (Nuremburg Rallies)? | | ---|---|--- Thank you for your service, Dee. As you can see, not a lot left to nuance. Yet, somehow the few free-floating brain cells possessed by your basic MAGA a-putz pre-daters, each isolated in mom's basement but totally happy with the snacks, lack the plenary authority to deduce. And speaking of MAGA-mind, can you find any better description of Pamela Jo Bondi, Attorney General to the criminal underworld inhabiting 1600 PA Avenue than the lyrical stylings of "We're Not Gonna Take It?" Sometimes it almost seems like bowling-ball-bellied, cranial contusion, Narcissus, Donald J., loves himself so much he found a way to create a clone in female form named Pam. That way he also always has someone to lust after when Ivanka's out of town. If you watched Pam Bondi's anger mismanagement performance under oath this past week--you might call it "condescending," and one where her "gall was never ending." If you then take just a cursory glance at her life, so "trite and jaded," it's very easy to see how she fits into Trumpworld. | | ---|---|--- No sign of ethical compass, conscience, intelligence, critical thinking or self awareness. She's willing to toss out absurdities without shame, and wears the thinnest skin this side of Trump--and that only gets worse each midnight when she molts. In fact, as far as I can tell, denied, lied and chose to hide was her plan for any to answer. Especially as, in theory, she represents the American people. Welp. All we got with Bondi was an ethics-free-zone with the moral clarity of Christopher Columbus (Happy Indigenous People's Day!). Or your average microscopic slide of mutated hantavirus. She is the banality of evil. Or what you'd call "boring and confiscated." The fun began when Democrats--who have now been joined by elected members of Trump's party--started asking questions about Trump's , including his friendship with late pedophile and sex trafficker Jeffrey Epstein. Bondi is so sad she actually brought a folder of pre-written personal attack lines for the Senators questioning her. Because you wouldn't want to be forced to solely rely on that Big Brain of yours. | | ---|---|--- As TNR put it: Bondi had collected screenshots of social media posts, prewritten comebacks, and handwritten notes she hoped could give her a good "gotcha" moment. Ya know, stuff like "you are a total hypocrite," a complicated phrase you wouldn 't want to take a chance you'd forget, so of course you'd write it down. I mean, holy st, what next, reciting A Tale of Two Cities? Senator Sheldon Whitehouse--one of the Democrats who tends to take no guff--asked Bondi about tax returns of human thumb, Tom Homan. , but of course went scot free unlike the brown people he leads attacks against daily Bondi's rage-filled response was: Senator, I would be more concerned if I were you when you talk about corruption and money, when you pushed for legislation that subsidized your wife's company! Ooh. Sick burn. | | ---|---|--- Whitehouse then asked her Pretty specific, pretty easy to deny if not true, no? But Bondi was on a predator-protecting mission, there would be no answering this question. But there would be a lot more anger: You know, Senator Whitehouse, you sit here and make salacious remarks, once again trying to slander President Trump left and right, when you're the one who was taking money from one of Epstein's closest confidants, Reid Hoffman. Why so angry bro-ette? | | ---|---|--- As you might expect, after this little outburst Bondi shut down, like Stephen Miller's brain during a CNN interview. Because she clearly had no defense. The rest of the hearing went along similarly, with Senators asking Bondi questions, and Bondi snarling like a hyena, or a hungry Ted Cruz. She called Senators names and insinuated corruption from trash she seemingly picked up from Glenn Greenwald's Twitter feed on the way there. Sen. Adam Schiff went down a list of questions Bondi refused to answer. From Buzzfeed: At one point, Sen. Adam Schiff (D-CA)** ran down a laundry list of questions Bondi wouldn't answer Tuesday, like what role she had in flagging any reference to Trump's name in the Epstein Files, whether she approved of the mass firing of anyone who criminally investigated Trump at the DOJ or if she supported the creation of a compensation fund for Jan. 6 rioters. Maybe they should have asked her favorite color? Perhaps her best answer was when Sen. Blumenthal (D-CT) asked about her possible conflicts of interest with known as a bribe, and a violation of the Constitution's Emoluments Clause. Look, data points aren't that hard to track. The first time Trump really stood up to Netanyahu was when Israel launched an attack inside Qatar. Right now we're letting Qatar, a dictatorial monarchy that housed Hamas terrorist leaders, build a training base on our soil , in Idaho (also a dictatorial monarchy, I believe). So why did Sen. Blumenthal ask Bondi about her potential conflicts of interest? Guess who was Qatar 's lobbyist in the U.S. in between stints as Florida AG and her appointment by Trump? Betcha can't guess! Why, none other than Pam Bondi! Perhaps Blumenthal hit a bit too close to home. Bondi proceeded to blow a gasket, howl at the moon, chew on the left femur of her weakest lawyer, sharpen her spikes, give up on the day's wordle, smash her guitar on the table and demand a Snicker's Bar. | | ---|---|--- How dare you? I am a career prosecutor! Don't you ever. Challenge. My. Integrity! So, Pam-Pam, you don't want the Senator questioning your integrity, huh? Ok, I'll do it! As we discussed, Bondi was cool lobbying for a foreign, autocratic regime and registering as a foreign agent --even though she'd been AG of the third largest state in the country. On Bondi 's first day as U.S Attorney General, she closed the FBI's "Foreign Influence Task Force." Then (presumably on her second day) cut enforcement of the Foreign Agents Registration Act, that thing she had to register for! Totally non-incriminating! Wait, you want non-Qatari corruption? Oh we got that too, with Mz "Don't Challenge My Integrity!!" In 2013 Bondi convinced Governor Rick Scott to delay a scheduled execution. Not because she was opposed to it. But it conflicted with a fundraising event for her (we getting Trump vibes yet?). Pammy hosted two Fox programs while sitting Florida AG in 2018. She said the Florida Commission on Ethics approved it. They responded with "what the fk you talkin' about?" The Tampa Bay Times called it "unprecedented" for a sitting elected official to host a TV show (Trumb vibes! TV attention + lies!) Bondi received 20+ fraud complaints as Florida AG about "Trump University" in 2013 and said she would join a New York lawsuit vs Trump U. (a suit that led him to eventually settle for $25 million). Four days later, the Donald J. Trump Foundation made a $25,000 donation to her PAC. She magically decided to back out of the suit. Well that doesn't look bribe-y. And Trump donated to her PAC from his tax free foundation--that's illegal. I could go on with pre-Trump chicanery, but there's more than enough post-Trump. Bondi claimed a judge's "oral directive is not enforceable" to halt a flight of immigrants to El Salvador, and ignored it. (It's why you never see judges talk. If they don't write it down it didn't happen). Then she said the judge was "meddling in our government." She may wanna brush up on Marbury vs. Madison. (in Trump's defense, he saw the name, thought it was something else and tried to call Epstein before remembering he was dead). There was a time when Bondi' resume of dingle-headed douchery, her "late great Hannibal Lecter" sensibilities and behaving like angrier-Ted-Nugent would've disqualified someone from being within 100 yards of the President or her job. Then there's the rogue's gallery of tv-movie villains with Roscoe P Coltrane intellects that are Team Trump. To say you're one of the worst is a statement when one looks at Miller, Noem, Patel, Leavitt, Hegseth. That's a murderer's row, and no I don't mean the 1927 Yankees. Bondi's utter contempt for the law, ethics, other humans, children, at least seven of the 10 commandments.... Americans got a view of who she truly is. And that's a good thing. A very good thing. The rage filled loon garnered headlines like this: | | ---|---|--- I honestly don't know how Trump's first choice, Matt Gaetz, could've done a worse job. Which says a lot. I'm feeling very optimistic for the first time in a long while we're gonna get through this period and hold the lot of these rancid rotters accountable. Take stock in Trump's plummeting numbers--even among his voters--fight, prepare for the coming Epstein files (we have a special series coming up at Blue Amp Media), fight more and enjoy (+ instigate) as former Trumpers turn on him. They too they sense his weakness. And Bondi's behavior in front of the world only made things worse. Let's fight for our FDR moment. Let's show up on No Kings Day. Let's take our country back. 🔥 Indigenous People's Weekend Celebration--25% Off!🔥 You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?
